college_info.college_name: CSJMU Kanpur University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2026, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary: Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University, Kanpur admissions 2025 are open for UG and PG courses (ODL/OL). Interested candidates can apply for their desired course by visiting the official univdersity's website. A few more updates are as follows:

faqs.question: Is Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University Kanpur campus safe?
faqs.answer: Yes, Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University Kanpur campus is safe for girls and boys. The college campus is located in center of Kolkata. It has a good connection with roads and public transports. CCTV cameras are installed in the campus to keep a check on students safety.

faqs.question: Is Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University private or government?
faqs.answer: CSJM is a private university in Kanpur. Earlier, it was known as the Kanpur University and is recognised by the UGC. It has more than 60 years of experience in the education industry. The university has also been accredited by NAAC with A+ grade.

faqs.question: Is CSJMU good for placement?
faqs.answer: CSJMU placement 2025 was good. According to the Admission brochure 2026 released, 81 campus drives and 440 selections were made. The median and highest package this year was 12.5 LPA and 3.2 LPA. The median package in BTech and MBA courses was 3.25 LPA and 3.5 LPA in 2024.

faqs.question: Is CSJM good for LLM?
faqs.answer:
LLM is one of the popular courses of Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University (CSJMU). As per the data collated from an unofficial source, the return on investment is good. As per the below data, the average package of INR 2.5 Lacs is offered in comparison to the fee paid by the student.
Particulars Statistics
Total tuition fee INR 1.1 lakh
Average package INR 2.5 lakh

college_info.intro:
Shivaji University Kanpur offers various courses to students at the UG, PG, and PhD levels. The university offers BTech and MBA programmes to students as its flagship courses. These courses are offered for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively. The university offers more than 400 UG, PG, certificate and diploma programmes across various specialisations on campus and through its affiliated colleges.
Chhatrapati University Kanpur courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check some of the popular programmes offered at Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
As per the admission brochure 2025-26, the highest package offered during Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University placement 2025 was INR 3.2 LPA. The median package was 3.2 LPA. 440 students were placed and 81 campus drives were held in 2025. Placement 2025 process was ongoing at the time the page was updated.

A total of 16 job fairs were held and 2766 students were placed as well in the affiliated colleges of CSJMU. Earlier, as per the Annual Report 2024, 122 campus drives were held that led to 3550 selections. Candidates can check the placement highlights in the table below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students looking for better jobs
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Organized & proactive placement process
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    The highest package recorded during CSJMU placement 2025 was INR 12.5 LPA as per the admission brochure 2025 released.
faqs.question: What is the highest package of CSJMU Kanpur University?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the Management NIRF report 2025, median package received by MBA students in 2024 was 3.5 LPA. 91 students were placed out of total 121 students during the placement session 2024.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Chhatrapati Shahu University Kanpur offers various courses to students at the UG, PG, and PhD levels. The university offers courses under 10 faculties and 4 institutes across various streams, namely Management, Arts, Commerce, Education, and more. Chhatrapati Shahuji Maharaj University Kanpur eligibility varies from course to course. The duration of most of the CSJMU UG courses is 3 years, whereas PG courses are of 2-year duration.

faqs.answer: A:    Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University offers a BSc programme at the UG level. It is offered in full-time mode for 3 years. The total tuition fee of BSc at Christ Bannerghatta ranges between INR 7,000 and INR 4.8 lakh.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of BSc at CSJMU?

faqs.answer: A:    Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University offers a BTech programme at the UG level. It is offered in full-time mode and is approved by the AICTE. The total tuition fee of BTech at CSJM University ranges between INR 3.6 Lacs and INR 4.6 lakh.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of BTech at Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the latest brochure, the university does not accepts CUET score. Candidates are either selected based on their merit or accepted entrance-exam scores. CSJMU conducts a screening test for admission to some of the programmes such as BPharm, M.Ed, LLM, etc. Aspirants meeting the eligibility and selection requirements can apply for admission at CSJMU.
faqs.question: Does CSJMU accept CUET?

faqs.answer: A:    CSJMU JEE Main Cutoff in 2021 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, ranged from 98162 to 818777 for admission to various BTech programmes in the last round closing ranks. The course which was the toughest of admission was BTech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence), with the last round cutoff being 98162. The course which was the easiest for admission was BTech in Chemical Engineering.
faqs.question: What is the CSJMU JEE Main Cutoff?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: You can prefer this college, CSJM University.

review_content.Placements: You need to work hard in this college for placement. Some normal companies come in campus for placement, and students have no interest in being placed in such companies which came in college. You can expect 3-4 LPA only from this college. The highest package is around 12 LPA. But if you try, you can get more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities of the college are good. Not very well, but you can manage easily. Classrooms are not well. But few classrooms are suitable for studies. In college campus, there's a huge library where you can study and find any book. The quality of mess food is good for some time, but you can prefer the hostel. Foods are oily. You can eat.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University.

review_content.Placements: Placement rate in our course is average, and it is around 55 percent. The average package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA mostly. Recruiting companies that visit our college are mostly mass recruiters like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc. The top role offered is a junior developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is quite good. It has AC classrooms and a big central library with a huge collection of books. Wi-Fi facility is available. The hostel's condition is decent and needs some renovation. The mess food is average. All medical facilities are provided by the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: If you are coming here for B.Tech for any reason, come and work hard.

review_content.Placements: Placements aren't great. However, with the help of our placement cell, placements are improving. The college is approaching reputable companies. Efforts are being made to ensure good placements. This isn't solely the college's fault. Students should also have some responsibility. If students make zero effort, placements won't happen.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are good facilities in my department. All the lab equipment is there. The library is very good. There is Wi-Fi facility in the entire library. The classrooms are also good. In the summer, there are a lot of problems in the classes of our department due to a lack of AC. Overall good. The hostel is also very good. The hostel people are strict. There are a lot of restrictions there. These restrictions have been imposed for the good of the children. Overall, the hostel is good. The food in the mess is average. The breakfast is fine.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good academic environment with scope for improvement in placements.

review_content.Placements: About 60 percent of students got placed through campus recruitment in the recent placement cycle. 12.5 LPA (approximately) is the highest package. The average package is about 3 to 3.5 LPA and the lowest package is between 1 LPA and 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS (Tata Consultancy Services), Infosys, HCL Technologies, and Samsung Electronics. 50 to 60 percent of students got internships in companies like HCL, Infosys, TCS, etc. Top roles offered are Software Developer Engineer, Trainee Engineer, Technical Support, Management Trainee, and Business Associate.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college has everything, but we just cannot enjoy it.

review_content.Placements: The placement scenario is not good at CSJMU till now. The placement coordinator Dr. Praveen Bhai Patel, and the placement cell are working to bring more companies for the placement drive. The main problem is with students who lack technical as well as communication skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are good labs and classrooms. There is a vast central library, which is top-notch. The hostel has a very good infrastructure, but with a lot of restrictions. There is a 75 percent attendance criteria, which is the worst for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is too good in everything.

review_content.Placements: Mostly, students get placed, but packages are not so good. This year, placements have increased. Some seniors got selected with a package of 10 LPA. Our branch placements are excellent. Everyone got placed this year. The CS placements are average. If students want to join this college, then it is a good choice for them.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is too good in everything. The food is also good. Sports ground and rooms are good. It provides food four times. The electricity is also provided full-time. There is a good garden in the hostel. We can eat many things at the hostel. Overall, the hostel life is good.

faqs.answer: Yes, Common University Entrance Test (CUET) 2026 registration commenced at cuet.nta.nic.in. NTA released the CUET 2026 notification on January 03 and reopened the window on February 23. Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, the CUET registration 2026 process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribed CUET eligibility criteria to qualify for the entrance exam.
faqs.question: Q: Is CUET exam registration open?

course_faqs.question: How much is the BA LLB (Hons) fee at CSJMU?
course_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for CSJM University BA LLB (Hons) is INR 3 lakh. The fee is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative. Candidates must check the official website for complete fee details. The fee excludes other fee components like exam, caution deposit, hostel, etc. Aspirants need to pay course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat. Besides, the programme fee, candidates need to pay an application fee in the start.

course_faqs.question: Is BA available at CSJMU?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, the university offers a Bachelor of Arts or BA (Hons) course in the stream of Education, Philosophy, History, English Literature, etc. It is a three-year full-time course. CSJM University admission to a BA course is based on CUET-UG score. Candidates’ scores/aggregate in the last qualifying examination are also taken into consideration for the final selection. Aspirants need to submit the documents proving their eligibility at the time of admission for final selection.

course_faqs.question: Is CSJMU good for pursuing a BA course?
course_faqs.answer: It is one of the top public state universities in Kanpur, UP. Many industry giants like Vodafone Idea, Viraaj Ventures, Intellipaat, and ICICI Prudential Life Insurance participate in the Kanpur University placements drive. The average package offered to placed students of UG courses has stood at INR 2.65 lakh. Further, many of the students also opt for higher studies after completing the BA degree course.

course_faqs.question: What is the fee for BCom at CSJM University?
course_faqs.answer: CSJMU BCom fees includes components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, one-time fees, etc. The BCom tuition fee at CSJMU is INR 1.39 lakh. Additioanlly, candidates seeking accomodation at the university must submit the hostel fee ranging from INR 2.17 lakh. It must be noted that the mentioned fees are sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. They are still subject to change and hence, are indicative.

course_faqs.question: Is B.Com available at CSJMU?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University offer full-time BCom and BCom (Hons) programmes for three-years at the UG level. The selection for BCom courses is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates need to pass Class 12 from any stream, with an aggregate score of 50% to apply for BCom programme.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees of MBA in Kanpur University?
overview_faqs.answer: CSJMU MBA tuition fee for two years is INR 1.5 lakh. This information is sourced from official website of the university/sanctioning body and is subject to change. CSJMU fees include other components such as hostel fees, library fees, caution deposit, etc. After completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to pay course fee to confirm their seat. Apart from the course fee, aspirants also need to pay an application fee in the start for applying for the course of their choice.

admission_overview.college_name: CSJMU Kanpur University Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Application Form, Last Date To Apply

admission_overview.title: CSJMU Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: CSJMU admissions are done on both merit and entrance basis. The university offers a wide range of programmes at the UG, PG, diploma, and PhD levels in several fields. Students need to provide valid entrance exam scores. For certain courses in which counselling is done, students need to either freeze or float their allotted seat. The university releases the results for the entrance exam and merit list on its official website. paragraphs: CSJMU admissionsto some of the courses such as BSc, MA, LLB, BA LLB, and many other courses is based on the score in the entrance exam conducted byCSJMU. While admission is granted on a merit basis to courses like MSc and BA. The university also acceptsJEE Main scores for admission to BTech. CSJMU, formerly known asKanpur University, offers 400+ degree and diploma programmes at UG and PG levels through the campus and affiliated colleges. The university provides these courses in Engineering, Law, Science, Arts, Commerce, Management, etc. The applications for all the courses shall be available on the official website of CSJMU.

CSJM University admission processincludes several steps. Candidates need to begin with registration of the course of their choice. Admission to most of the programmes is based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Find below the step-wise admission details for CSJMU:
CSJMU Application Process
The mode of application is online. Eligible aspirants can apply for the course of their choice on the official website of the university.
Selection Rounds

The university selects candidates for most of the UG courses based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. For PG courses such as MBA, admission is based on CAT, MAT or SEE scores. For some of the programmes such as LLM, MCA, BPharm and M.Ed, the university may conduct an entrance exam.
Counselling

Once the selection rounds are completed, selected candidates are called for counselling and document verification. Selected candidates must confirm their seats by paying theCSJMU feeto avoid rejection.

CSJMU fee includes multiple components such as tuition, exam, admission, caution deposit, etc. Candidates are first required to pay course fee during admission to confirm their seat in the university. Talking about affordability, it is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible but the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge.

courses_data.description: CSJM University offersBAand BA (Hons) programme for three-year spread across six semesters. The university offers BA (Hons) in seven specialisations and BA programme in two specialisations at the campus. Besides, CSJM University also offers BA and BA (Hons) courses through affiliated colleges. Aspirants after completing Class 12 can apply for any of the BA specialisations. Besides, aspirants who do not wish to go for full-time BA can opt forOnline BA courses. These online programmes help students to pursue their degree along with work.

faqs.question: Is CSJMU good for pursuing a BA course?
faqs.answer: It is one of the top public state universities in Kanpur, UP. Many industry giants like Vodafone Idea, Viraaj Ventures, Intellipaat, and ICICI Prudential Life Insurance participate in the Kanpur University placements drive. The average package offered to placed students of UG courses has stood at INR 2.65 lakh. Further, many of the students also opt for higher studies after completing the BA degree course.

faqs.question: What are BA specialisations offered in CSJMU?
faqs.answer: CSJMU offers BA and BA (Hons) programme for three-year spread across six semesters. The university offers BA (Hons) in seven specialisations and BA programme in two specialisations at the campus. Some of the BA specialisations offered at campus are:BA (Hons) EnglishBA (Hons) HindiBA (Hons) SanskritBA (Hons) PsychologyBA (Hons) PhilosophyBA Journalism and Mass Communication, etc.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for a BA at CSJMU?
faqs.answer: The admission procedure commences with the release of the application form. CSJM University releases the application form on its official website of the university. Candidates seeking admission can register and fill out the CSJMU BA (Hons) admission form. Admission to Kanpur University BA (Hons) is based on CUET-UG score and merit in the last qualifying exam. After the conclusion of the application procedure, the university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected students.

placement_data.title: CSJMU Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to admission brochure 2025-26, the highest package offered during Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University placement 2025 was INR 3.2 LPA . The median package was 3.2 LPA . 440 students were placed and 81 campus drives were held in 2025. Placement 2025 process was ongoing at the time the page was updated.

A total of 16 job fairs were held and 2766 students were placed as well in the affiliated colleges of CSJMU. Earlier, as per the Annual Report 2024 , 122 campus drives were held that led to 3550 selections .

tables.context: How many BPharma students were placed during CSJMU

faqs.question: What is the highest package of CSJMU Kanpur University?
faqs.answer: The highest package recorded during CSJMU placement 2025 was INR 12.5 LPA as per the admission brochure 2025 released.

faqs.question: Is CSJMU good or bad?
faqs.answer: CSJMU provides good placement to its students. The overall highest and median package recorded during placement 2025 was 12.5 LPA and 3.2 LPA. 440 students were placed and 81 campus drives were held this year.

faqs.question: How is MBA placement at CSJMU?
faqs.answer: As per the Management NIRF report 2025, median package received by MBA students in 2024 was 3.5 LPA. 91 students were placed out of total 121 students during the placement session 2024.

faqs.question: How many BPharma students were placed during CSJMU placements?
faqs.answer: As per the BPharma placement report 2023, out of 61 BPharma graduates, 21 were placed during 2023 placements. Earlier, 24 out of 62 BPharma students were placed in 2022. From 2021 to 2023, a fluctuating trend was observed in the BPharma placement rate trends. For a better understanding candidates can refer to the table below showcasing the Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University placement trends for BPharma: Particulars BPharma Placement Statistics (2021) BPharma Placement Statistics (2022) BPharma Placement Statistics (2023) Total students 48 62 61 Students placed 10 24 21 Placement rate 21% 39% 34% NOTE: The above details are gathered from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: What is the fees of MBA in Kanpur University?
faqs.answer: CSJMU MBA tuition fee for two years is INR 1.5 lakh . This information is sourced from official website of the university/sanctioning body and is subject to change. CSJMU fees include other components such as hostel fees, library fees, caution deposit, etc. After completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to pay course fee to confirm their seat. Apart from the course fee, aspirants also need to pay an application fee in the start for applying for the course of their choice.

faqs.question: Is CSJM University a good university for doing an MBA?
faqs.answer: CSJMU is good university for pursuing MBA. In terms of placement, median package offered to MBA students in 2024 was 3.5 LPA. Out of total 121 students, 91 students were placed and 16 students were selected for higher studies.

faqs.question: What is the average placement package for CSJMU?
faqs.answer: CSJMU average package 2025 is not available. The overall median package in 2025 was 3.2 LPA. MBA and BTech median package recorded in 2024 was 3.5 LPA and 3.25 LPA.

faqs.question: How much is the BA LLB (Hons) fee at CSJMU?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for CSJM University BA LLB (Hons) is INR 3 lakh. The fee is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative. Candidates must check the official website for complete fee details. The fee excludes other fee components like exam, caution deposit, hostel, etc. Aspirants need to pay course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat. Besides, the programme fee, candidates need to pay an application fee in the start.

faqs.question: What is the fees of MBA in Kanpur University?
faqs.answer: CSJMU MBA tuition fee for two years is INR 1.5 lakh . This information is sourced from official website of the university/sanctioning body and is subject to change. CSJMU fees include other components such as hostel fees, library fees, caution deposit, etc. After completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to pay course fee to confirm their seat. Apart from the course fee, aspirants also need to pay an application fee in the start for applying for the course of their choice.

faqs.question: Is CSJM University a good university for doing an MBA?
faqs.answer: CSJMU is good university for pursuing MBA. In terms of placement, median package offered to MBA students in 2024 was 3.5 LPA. Out of total 121 students, 91 students were placed and 16 students were selected for higher studies.

Generally, the cutoff list is released every year, based on NEET UG results, followed by NEET counselling. In 2024, the cutoff for the Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) stood at 1362741 for the Round 1 seat allotment results. Similarly, for the last round, the BDS cutoff stood at 1063250 for the General Home State category candidates.

CSJMU offers a BDS course through NEET scores, followed by round-wise NEET Counselling for the General Home State Quota. nirf.description:
CSJMU has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Pharmacy' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for CSJMU indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. Classrooms are decent, the library is good, and sports grounds are big and provide every facility. Overall, the infrastructure supports academic and student life quite well.

reviews.review_heading: College: more than just a degree.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is so good. They provides Wi-Fi within full campus. The Hi-Tech labs and classrooms are very good; they have smart board. Here are two specific libraries like one is central library for all students and one is departmental library for department students. CSJM also have a cafeteria included sport and they have also a stadium in it.

reviews.review_heading: College overall provides good placement opportunities for the students.
reviews.review_text: The department for the course is highly motivated. The college provides spacious classrooms and a library that is separate for the computer department and the management department. The students do not need to roam for anything. The canteen is also spacious and airy.

reviews.review_heading: A good college worth joining.
reviews.review_text: The campus is equipped with CCTV cameras everywhere and labs with computers and good Wi-Fi, as well as air conditioners. The library consists of a variety of books for almost every subject required in the course. The hostels are average or above average, the quality of food is good, and the rooms are of good infrastructure. There are grounds and other indoor games equipment available as well for the students.

paragraphs: CSJM University awards financial assistance to economically weak students through mean-based scholarships funded by the University’s distinguished alumni and philanthropic institutions. The scholarships offered to the wards with low annual parental income are 25-50 per cent of the annual fee depending upon the need of the students. Such candidates are required to provide an income certificate issued by the Tehsildar or the Magistrate.

In addition to this, Kanpur University also offers merit-based scholarships to students who have secured a minimum of 60 per cent aggregate or CPI of 6.5 out of 10 in the previous qualifying exam. The names of the students for scholarships are finalised by the University Committee that comprises every year.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at GNDU include BSc (Hons), MSc, BTech & LLM, among others. After doing BSc, students can have a career in IT, Software Development etc. GNDU also has a Directorate of Open & Distance Learning (ODL) located at its main campus for distance & open programmes. By doing various courses from Guru Nanak Dev University, students can get job offers from top recruiters like Amazon, Accenture, Axis Bank etc.
In addition to this, Guru Nanak Dev University offers UG, PG, diploma, short-term, & certificate programmes across various fields eg Engineering, Science, Law, Arts & Humanities, Commerce & Accounting, Computers & IT, Management, Journalism, Architecture & Pharmacy, among others. faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Guru Nanak Dev University's BCom admissions are entrance-based. Admission to all the courses offered at the university is based on a departmental-level entrance exam conducted by  the Head of the (respective) Department offering the programme. GNDU. To appear for this exam, candidates must fill out an application form on the official website of the university. Based on the performance in this exam, a merit list is prepared. review_summary.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev University Amritsar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: No placement, affordable.

content.Placements: No placement is provided by the college. 30% of students get jobs by themselves. There are no big companies. No internship is provided by the college. This college is not for placement. It is only for getting a degree. In Science, we only get knowledge of Science theoretically.
content.Infrastructure: It was average. There was Wi-Fi at the start only. Laboratories were good. Classrooms were good. The library was good. The hostel was good. The canteen was not hygienic at all. Medical facilities were there. Sports and games were available in college. NCC was present. Overall, it was good.

individual_reviews.course: B.A - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I think this college can be improved with some changes.

content.Placements: I guess about 50% of students get placements around 1 LPA. I don’t know much about the exact figures. Around 60% of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The college does not provide hostels. Food quality is not up to the mark and can be improved. Medical facilities are good. For sports and games, the college is not as strong as some other colleges. There is room for improvement in the overall infrastructure.
content.Faculty: Teachers are qualified and very good. Their teaching is also good. Exams are kind of easy, and the pass percentage is around 55%. The college cannot fully make students industry-ready. Students have to gain practical experience themselves. Faculty can do better in this area.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Excellent college campus.

content.Placements: 50 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package offered in our college is Lacs for the entire course and the lowest package offered is 1.2 LPA for the entire course. After completing, we can work in banks and various private sectors. 60 percent of students got internship from our course and are in Ram Financial Limited.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. There are Wi-Fi, smart boards, a library, and all other facilities available. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, with quality food and medical facilities available. We play indoor as well as outdoor games like cricket, volleyball, badminton, tennis, and carrom etc.

individual_reviews.course: M.Com - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: They conduct less interactive classes, which are so boring.

content.Placements: RSM India, BDO India, S. R. Batlibboi College, and Grant Thornton Bharat LLP are a few of the auditing companies that have shown their interest in hiring a large number of candidates from our department. We only depend on the placement cell for internship offers in the nearby companies. Professional and skilled courses are also arranged for us to train us with proper skills.
content.Infrastructure: Only the exact number of students is admitted to all the courses to lessen the crowd and to improve the performance. Sports and other physical activities are scheduled only once a week. There are certain liberties in hostel premises and other things. We visit the library only during free periods and break hours.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are well-qualified, but placement through this college seems next to impossible.

content.Placements: Placement is almost zero. Only 5–10% of students get placed, and the same applies to internships. Many top recruiting companies offer very good packages, but I haven’t seen any link between this college and those companies (campus placements are almost zero). You just get qualified, not educated.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is not bad. It is good enough to stay focused. Surroundings are also clean and tidy. There are no issues with the infrastructure because the classrooms are spacious. Moreover, the library also has a large volume of books in every niche.

paragraphs: GNDU admissionto all courses is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The university offers courses at UG, PG, and doctorate levels. Additionally, students can also pursue certificate courses at the university. Programmes offered atGNDUare in streams including –Engineering,Architecture& Planning,IT & Software,Hospitality & Travel, Teaching & Education, Science, and Law. The application process for the university is conducted online. Students seeking admission to the programmes offered at the university can read the following article to know the detailed process of theGNDU admission procedure.

Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) admissionto some courses is ongoing. The university offers an extensive range of courses across multiple specialisations through its constituent colleges. Guru Nanak Dev University course admissionis both entrance and merit-based depending on the programme selected by the students. Each aspirant must meet the course-specific eligibility requirements to be eligible for the course admission at the university. Candidates can pursue a wide range of programmes across multiple specialisations in a variety of fields at the university. The university accepts various national-level entrance tests. Furthermore, it also conducts its own entrance test for admission to some of the courses. Interested students can refer to the following table to learn about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularGNDU courses:

Guru Nanak Dev University feesvary for each course and specialisation. The university charges multiple components from the students such as admission fees, tuition fees, security deposits etc. GNDU students are required to pay the amount either semester-wise or annually, depending on the course selected. Interested candidates can check out the below table forGNDU course feesin the table below:
Check out completeGNDU Fee Structure
Note:The information mentioned above is taken from official sources. Hence, may vary.

Guru Nanak Dev University Amritsar seatintakevaries for each course. Students are offered seats based on their performance in the selection rounds. Candidates must pay the admission fee to secure their seat at the university. Students can look at the table below to know course-wiseGNDU seat intakefor some of its popular programmes.
Note:The information mentioned above is taken from official sources. Hence, may vary.

As per the information available on the official website of the University,GNDU admissionto various courses is either based on merit or an entrance exam, depending on the course selected. Foradmission to the BTechcourse, aspirants have to appear forJEE Main entranceand admission to the MBA course candidates are required to appear for theGNDU Management Entrance Test (GMET). For all courses, admission is done based on the merit secured by the candidates in the entrance exam conducted by the Head of the Department. Candidates seeking admission to GNDU courses must begin their admission process by filling out the application form before the deadline. The step-wiseGNDU admission processis given in the table below:
Step 1: GNDU application process
Candidates can apply online for the preferred course. Candidates have to fill out the application form and pay the application fees before the deadline.
Step 2: GNDU Selection Process

Admission to most of theGNDU courses is entrance-based. Only for diploma-level courses, the admission criteria is merit-based. Applicants applying to BTech and MBA courses are required to appear forJEE Main and GMET,respectively, to get shortlisted for admission. Apart from BTech and MBA, the University shortlists candidates based on theentrance exam conducted by the Head of the Department.
Step 3: GNDU Merit list and Admission confirmation

After completing the selection process,GNDU releasesa course-wise merit list on its official website. All the candidates, whose name is on the merit list, are required to appear for the counselling/ interview process for seat allocation and document verification process.

courses_data.name: GNDU MBA/PGDM Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) MBAis offered with multiple specialisation options such asFinance,HRM,Marketing, etc. The University Business School and the University School of Financial Studies offer the MBA course.GNDUMBA admission is based on merit in theGuru Nanak Dev University Management Entrance Test (GMET). Selected candidates are allotted seats through counselling. Candidates who have completed their graduation in any stream from a recognised University are eligible to apply for admission atGNDU MBA. More highlights related toGNDU MBAare mentioned below:

faqs.question: How can I take admission in GNDU to pursue MBA?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to GNDU MBA programmes need to take the Guru Nanak Dev University Management Entrance Test (GMET). The university shortlist candidates based on exam score. The selected candidates have to participate in the counselling during which the final seat allotment is carried out. Moreover, to apply for the entrance exam, candidates can visit the official website of Guru Nanak Dev University.

faqs.question: How will I know if I have been shortlisted for GNDU GMET counselling?
faqs.answer: The University will release a merit list of candidates selected for the counselling round on its official website soon after the declaration of GNDU GMET result. The shortlisted candidates will have to appear at the university main campus for interview rounds along with the required documents. Candidates must report at the alloted date and time, failing which candidate's request for change in date and time will not be entertained.

faqs.question: When will GNDU GMET registrations commence?
faqs.answer: Guru Nanak Dev University conducts GMET for admission to Management courses offered at its Main and regional campuses. The university usually opens registration for GMET in May and closes by second week of July. The exam is usually conducted in July every year in online mode for 150 minutes.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in GNDU without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, for some course, GNDU takes admission without entrance exam. The admission to those courses is allotted based on the merit secured in the qualifying exam.Admission to following GNDU courses is based on merit in the qualifying exam:UG CoursesPG coursesBTech (Urban &Regional Planning)MEdBachelor of Tourism & Travel Management .PG Diploma in Mental Health CounselingBAPG Diploma in TranslationBScMCom, MSc MathematicsBPTMBA, MCA, MSc (IT), MSc (Maths), MA (Eco), MA Punjabi, MCom

faqs.question: How much percentage required for GNDU?
faqs.answer: Minimum percentage for GNDU admission in some popular courses are:CoursesEligibilityBE/BTechClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC)MBA/PGDMClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC)UG DiplomaClass 12BScClass 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC)BCAClass 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC)BComClass 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC)

faqs.question: Which entrance test score is accepted by Guru Nanak Dev University for BCom?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Nanak Dev University's BCom admissions are entrance-based. Admission to all the courses offered at the university is based on a departmental-level entrance exam conducted by  the Head of the (respective) Department offering the programme. GNDU. To appear for this exam, candidates must fill out an application form on the official website of the university. Based on the performance in this exam, a merit list is prepared. The applicants who manage to get shortlisted are allotted seats, provided they present the require documents supporting their eligibillity.

placement_data.title: Guru Nanak Dev University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Guru Nanak Dev University has released the salary details for the batch passed out in 2025. The highest package secured by batch 2025 was INR 44 LPA , while the average package offered during GNDU placements 2025 was INR 6.37 LPA . The University has placed 84.89% students in reputed companies. The top recruiters of Guru Nanak Dev University in 2025 include Amazon, Accenture, Coca Cola, Capgemini, Dabur, IBM, etc.

Earlier, 652 students were placed during the 2024 placement session. The highest and average packages stood at INR 18.43 LPA and INR 6.40 LPA , respectively. KPMG, Accenture, Nucleus Software were among the few top recruiters of GNDU.

tables.context: Is GNDU good for placement?
How is the placement of BTech at GNDU?
What is the highest placement package at Guru Nana

faqs.question: Is GNDU good for placement?
faqs.answer: A total of 79 companies offered job opportunities to the students passing out in 2024. The highest package stood at INR 18.43 LPA and the average package offered was INR 6.40 LPA. Check the complete insights of Guru Nanak Dev University placements 2024 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) No. of students placed 652 Highest package INR 18.43 LPA Average package INR 6.40 LPA No. of companies offered jobs 79

faqs.question: How is the placement of BTech at GNDU?
faqs.answer: The University has released the overall placement data on its official website. From 2022 to 2024, the number of students placed has declined year-on-year. On the other hand, a fluctuating trend was recorded in the number of companies that offered job opportunities. Refer to the table below for a detailed analysis of GNDU placement trends: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) No. of students placed 993 875 652 No. of companies offered jobs 88 61 79

faqs.question: What is the highest placement package at Guru Nanak Dev University?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered to the 2024 passing-out batch was INR 18.43 LPA. Earlier, the highest package offered in 2023 was INR 19.57 LPA. Looking at the past three years' statistics, declining trend was recorded in the Guru Nanak Dev University the highest package, which is depicted below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) the highest package INR 44 LPA INR 19.57 LPA INR 18.43 LPA

faqs.question: What are the career prospects of pursuing a BSc at Guru Nanak Dev University?
faqs.answer: Pursuing a BSc at Guru Nanak Dev University can lead to bright career opportunities in various sectors. The career prospects primarily depend on a variety of factors such as, chosen specialisation, preferred sector, skills of the graudates, etc. The university offers a BSc in various specialisations. BSc graduates of the university can build careers in the fields of education, IT, healthcare, research, etc. For better career prospects after a BSc , graduates can pursue higher education with courses like MS, MSc or MBA.

highlights.description: GNDU is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #12 by the India Today 2025 under the University (Government) category. It ranked #77 in the QS World Rankings 2026, internationally. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The GNDU rankings have been explained in the article below:

nirf.description:
GNDU is consistently recognized as one of the top institutes across all major categories by NIRF 2023. It has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2023, GNDU fell 7 ranks to #87 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2023, GNDU fell 4 ranks to #48 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. In the 'University' category, GNDU ranked in the top 50 in the country for the second consecutive year in 2023. Students can refer to the table below for the GNDU NIRF rankings:
Read less

qs_world.description:
GNDU has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, GNDU fell 43 ranks to #329 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, GNDU fell 9 ranks to #77 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev University Amritsar Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
There are two messes and two canteens in the hostel and both are run on a contract basis. There are some indoor games facilities like table tennis, carom board, volleyball and two badminton courts are also available within the premises of the hostel for the students. The students have access to the internet through Wi-Fi in all the rooms. Girls hostel is well-equipped with facilities like the internet with wi-fi, medical room, utility shop, photo state, PCO-cum-stationary store, general store, reading hall, mess, canteen, etc. 
Local students from within a radius of 40 kilometres (25 kilometres in case of girls), evening students, employees and part-time students are not eligible for admission to the hostel.
facilities: Holds approximately 543,357 documents, including books, bound journals, theses, reports and manuscripts.
Subscribes to about 134 Indian journals, 52 foreign journals, and 24 newspapers, and has acquired over 15,600 e‑books.
Rare and manuscript collections include around 5,174 rare books and 1,511 manuscripts.

library.description:
The library remains open on all the days of the year except on two National Holidays i.e. 26th January and 15th August. It opens from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. on weekdays and 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. on weekends and other holidays. 
Bhai Gurdas Library is subscribing 87 Foreign and 146 Indian Journals. In addition to it, a library is also receiving about 150 journals as a gift. The library is a member of INFLIBNET which is providing access to 15,000+ e-journals and six databases. The library is also subscribing more than 200 journals through IEEE. It have 1,516 rare manuscripts relating to Punjab History, Culture, Sikh Religion and other faiths. There are 22 departmental libraries also for the convenience of the students and teachers.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Handball Court, Softball Court, Kho- Kho, Kabbadi, Hockey stadium, Archery, Velodrome

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Saroop Rani Government College For WomenReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: No placement, affordable.
reviews.review_text: It was average. There was Wi-Fi at the start only. Laboratories were good. Classrooms were good. The library was good. The hostel was good. The canteen was not hygienic at all. Medical facilities were there. Sports and games were available in college. NCC was present. Overall, it was good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Apeejay College of Fine ArtsReviewed on 31 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I think this college can be improved with some changes.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The college does not provide hostels. Food quality is not up to the mark and can be improved. Medical facilities are good. For sports and games, the college is not as strong as some other colleges. There is room for improvement in the overall infrastructure.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Lyallpur Khalsa CollegeReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent college campus.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. There are Wi-Fi, smart boards, a library, and all other facilities available. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, with quality food and medical facilities available. We play indoor as well as outdoor games like cricket, volleyball, badminton, tennis, and carrom etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Apeejay College of Fine ArtsReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: They conduct less interactive classes, which are so boring.
reviews.review_text: Only the exact number of students is admitted to all the courses to lessen the crowd and to improve the performance. Sports and other physical activities are scheduled only once a week. There are certain liberties in hostel premises and other things. We visit the library only during free periods and break hours.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Baring Union Christian CollegeReviewed on 27 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are well-qualified, but placement through this college seems next to impossible.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is not bad. It is good enough to stay focused. Surroundings are also clean and tidy. There are no issues with the infrastructure because the classrooms are spacious. Moreover, the library also has a large volume of books in every niche.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Nanak Dev University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. Wi-Fi facility was available. The library was also present. Modern classroom and computer labs. Hostel quality was also good. All essential amenities were available in the college. Sports and games were encouraged by the University.

reviews.review_heading: MBA at GNDU: Fees, placement and faculty overview.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent for the course and hostel. Adequate lighting, ventilation and fans are available in classrooms and hostel rooms. The department also has Wi-Fi and projectors for students and teachers. There are ramps for wheelchairs as well.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Amritsar Group of CollegesReviewed on 25 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Campus life, hostel life was good, but some of the teachers were so rude.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and structures are normal, not that good and not too bad. It's like okay. Wi-Fi is available at every point in the college. Labs are there, but not for agriculture students because they don't have permission to pursue this course now.

reviews.review_heading: University for Punjabis only.
reviews.review_text: Superb infrastructure for sports. I am cutting a star because of the hostel. Hostels are not well-maintained, but otherwise, the grounds and libraries are top class. They provide various facilities to students, such as a gym, pool, etc. Many canteens are not so good, and the mess is very poor.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Golden Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 22 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good campus life with decent facilities and helpful staff.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was average but good enough for daily classes. Labs had the basic equipment we needed, and Wi-Fi worked most of the time. Classrooms were clean and comfortable. The library was helpful, but it needed more updated books. Hostel rooms were okay, and the food was manageable. Sports and medical facilities were simple but useful when required.

reviews.review_heading: There are a lot of extra curricular activities like - shooting, swimming, etc.
reviews.review_text: Neat and clean hostel and good infrastructure. Hostel rooms are good and neat and clean. Washrooms are clean. There is also a lift in the hostel. Food in the mess is nice and can be eaten. There are many shops in the hostel where we get all our necessary things.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty, placements, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of our department is good, and many more departments, such as UBS, Agriculture, and the UIT department, have better infrastructure. Moreover, we have a health centre on our campus which includes great and experienced doctors and helpful staff.

reviews.review_heading: Good Engineering College .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course was extremely good. Wi-Fi was available in the college. Labs were well-equipped with instruments. Library was present in the campus. Hostel was also good it's has water cooler, decent washrooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Apeejay College of Fine ArtsReviewed on 10 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Admission to the M.Com Course in the year 2025-26.
reviews.review_text: The department features Wi-Fi classrooms, labs for accounting software, and a respectable library with resources related to commerce. There is a gym and a sports field, and the hostel is manageable. Food quality is mediocre and occasionally monotonous. Although it is available, medical care is not always available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Apeejay College of Fine ArtsReviewed on 9 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The M.Com course intake for the year 2026 provides a lot of information, including placements, etc.
reviews.review_text: Good classrooms with Wi-Fi, accounting software computer labs, and a library with trade journals. Sports facilities and the hostel are both good. The mess food is average with little variation. Limited medical assistance is available. The college organizes many sports and games facilities.

data.description: Guru Nank Dev University has an experienced faculty who are PhD, diploma, and degree holders. GNDU also invites faculty for guest lectures and let students interact with renowned personalities. Most of the faculty members working at GNDU are doctorates.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Guru Nanak Dev University

likes.text: Many companies visited our university to hire students, and some of them are Nagarro, Software AG, TCS, Infogain, Chickmick, TT Consultants, etc.
The placements in this particular campus are good, and students get appropriate exposure and experience during their study to clear various interview rounds.

college_info.college_name: SAGE University Indore: Courses, Fees, Admission 2026, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary: SAGE University Indore admissions 2026 are open for all the courses. Interested candidates can apply online through the university page or admission portal. A few more updates and announcements related to SAGE University Indore are given below:

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes at SAGE University are its MBA & MSc courses with the SAGE University MBA having fees of around INR 1.5 Lakhs to 17.5 Lakhs. SAGE University MSc and MBA graduates are given job opportunities across top companies such as HCL, Wipro, etc.
Students will find that these courses are highly sought-after for a variety of reasons with the university offering Industry Immersion Programmes and Industry Internships to prepare students for the job market with On the Job Training (OJT) that will give graduates of SAGE University a leg-up compared to other universities and colleges. Also, the university curriculum is taught not only through classrooms and theory but also project-based learning allowing students to gain practical knowledge.
Further, the MSc programme features a diverse range of specialisations including:
Students of the MBA and other programmes have access to labs as well as a range of value added courses and skill-oriented programmes for developing managerial and other key skills such as Digital Lab, Language lab, Marketing lab, Finance lab, Leadership lab, etc. These value added courses and certfications have their curriculum created and are offered in association with top companies such as Microsoft, Google, Huawei Technologies, Amazon AWS Educate, Apple, HP & Red Hat Tech.
A few other popular programmes include BTech, BCA and MCA that offer great ROI on fees and placements for e.g. SAGE University Indore BCA fees are INR 2.1 Lakhs to 3 Lakhs, and the SAGE University Indore MCA fees are INR 1.3 Lakhs to 1.7 Lakhs, while SAGE University Indore fees for BTech stand around INR 1.5 Lakhs to 20 Lakhs. Interested students can also check out some of the other SAGE University Indore popular programmes:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college has decent facilities and placements, with reasonable fees.

review_content.Placements: About 40% of students get placed in this course. The highest package is 50 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. Companies like Flipkart, Amazon, ICICI Bank, Wipro, TCS, and Deloitte visit the college for placements. Around 50–70% of students get internships in small companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Both girls’ and boys’ hostels are available in this college. The college is far from the main city but is located on the main highway. Paid bus facilities are available for students. Wi-Fi is available only for teachers. Labs and the library are good. Mess and canteen facilities are decent. Sports and games events happen in the college regularly.

reviews_list.review_title: Very good quality for the student who want good education with the moderate feels.

review_content.Placements: Stage University is one of the most well-known colleges for placement. The average package is 5 to 8 lakhs per year. Our college has a good reputation, which helps us in interviews. More than 20 to 30 companies come for recruitment. Internship programmes are there for building students' knowledge about work.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Our College has a very big ground nearby, 5 acres. The hostel is very big, with 4000 students living there. The hostel provides good quality food and a variety of foods, Wi-Fi, mineral water, and many more.

content.Placements: Around 50–60 percent of students in the course get placed. The highest package offered is 20–25 LPA, while the lowest package is about 6–8 LPA. The average package is around 10–15 LPA. About 50–60 percent of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good facilities. Wi-Fi works smoothly. Labs are neat and clean for both students and teaching staff. Classrooms are of good quality. They are neat and clean The library remains silent during study hours. The college does not have a hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, a good experience in MCA at SAGE University.

content.Placements: The MCA course provided decent placement opportunities. Approximately 60 percent of our batch students have been placed. The average package was around 3-4 LPA, and the highest package offered was about 8 LPA, while the lowest was around 2.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, and some smaller IT companies visited the campus. Most students were offered roles such as software developer, web developer, system analyst and technical support. Many students also got internship opportunities, either through college or on their own.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college has decent facilities and placements, with reasonable fees.

content.Placements: About 40% of students get placed in this course. The highest package is 50 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. Companies like Flipkart, Amazon, ICICI Bank, Wipro, TCS, and Deloitte visit the college for placements. Around 50–70% of students get internships in small companies.
content.Infrastructure: Both girls’ and boys’ hostels are available in this college. The college is far from the main city but is located on the main highway. Paid bus facilities are available for students. Wi-Fi is available only for teachers. Labs and the library are good. Mess and canteen facilities are decent. Sports and games events happen in the college regularly.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Very good quality for the student who want good education with the moderate feels.

content.Placements: Stage University is one of the most well-known colleges for placement. The average package is 5 to 8 lakhs per year. Our college has a good reputation, which helps us in interviews. More than 20 to 30 companies come for recruitment. Internship programmes are there for building students' knowledge about work.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Our College has a very big ground nearby, 5 acres. The hostel is very big, with 4000 students living there. The hostel provides good quality food and a variety of foods, Wi-Fi, mineral water, and many more.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A very good college for students who want a job, but the fees are also high.

content.Placements: Stage Institute is one of the most well known colleges for placement. The average package is 5 to 8LPA. Our college has a good reputation which helps us in interviews. More than 20 to 30 companies come for recruitment. Internship programs are there for building students knowledge about work.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good. Our college has a very big ground nearby of 5 acres. Hostel is very big with 4000 students living there. The hostel gives good quality food and a variety of food, Wi-Fi, mineral water, and many more.

admission_overview.college_name: SAGE University Indore Course Admissions 2026 (Open): Fee, Application Process, Eligibility

admission_overview.title: SAGE University Indore Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: SAGE University Indore admission 2026 is open. The university offers admission based on merit or entrance exam scores of the aspirants. SAGE University Indore conducts SAGE JEE or SEE for admission to UG and PG courses. The university offers courses such as BTech, BPharma, MBA, MTech, etc. The university also offers PhD courses. To get admitted to SAGE University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. The university also offers PhD and Diploma programme. The application process at SAGE University, Indore is conducted online.

eligibility_selection.title: SAGE University Indore Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: SAGE University offers many courses at the UG, PG, and doctoral level. The mode of study is full-time. Some of the popular courses offered at the university are BTech, BSc, MBA, BBA, and MSc. The admission process for the BTech course is based on the SAGE Entrance Exam. Check below popular SAGE University Indore courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: Class 12 with Maths, Physics & Chemistry as the subjects & a minimum of 50% total

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with Maths, Physics & Chemistry as the subjects & a minimum of 50% total
Class 12 with 50% total with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics/Biology
Class 12 with 45% total (40% marks for Category SC/ST/OBC)
Class 12 with 50% total in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics/ Biology
Bachelor's degree with a 60% total (45% aggregate for candidates belonging SC, ST, OBC category of Madhya Pradesh)

faqs.answer: Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate is the basic eligibility for BPharma at SAGE University Indore. However, the university offers 5% relaxation to candidates belonging to SC/ ST and OBC categories. SC/ST/OBC category candidates need a minimum of 40% aggregate in Class 12 to be eligible for the course.
faqs.question: What is the basic eligibility for SAGE University Indore BPharma?

faqs.answer: Candidates must pass Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics/ Biology to apply for BArch programme at SAGE University Indore. Aspirants who have passed a three-year Diploma examination after Class 12 with Mathematics as a compulsory subject can also apply.
faqs.question: Who can apply for BArch at SAGE University Indore?

faqs.answer:
SAGE University Indore offers a Master of Science M.Sc. Programme offers six specialisations at the Institute of Sciences and the Institute of Biological Sciences. It is a full-time programme of a two-year duration. The curriculum of the programme is divided into four semesters. The course fee for the M.Sc. Programme ranges between INR 60,000 and INR 1.10 Lacs. To apply for the M.Sc. Programmes, candidates must submit an application form in the online/ offline mode. Along with the form, they are required to submit several supporting documents and an application fee of INR 1,600. Eligibility: Bachelor's degree in a relevant discipline after Class 12 with Maths Physics & Chemistry as subjects and a minimum of 50% aggregate
Selection: SAGE University Entrance Exam SEE score.
faqs.question: How to get admission to M.Sc. At SAGE University Indore?

faqs.answer: SAGE University BPharm admissions take place through the SAGE University Joint Entrance exam (SEE). There is no option of direct admission as everyone has to appear for the exam and secure a valid score to be eligible for admission.In addition to that, only those candidates are eligible to appear for the SEE exam who have a minimum aggregate of 50% in their Class 12 exams. Therefore, candidates can apply for admission at SAGE University through Class 12 exams but their selection would be based on SEE entrance score.
faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in SAGE University BPharm?

paragraphs: SAGE University, Indore admission process is common for all courses. The admission process involves application submission, entrance exam, interview, and payment of a fee to confirm admission to the university. Check below the steps to get a seat in the university:
1: SAGE University Indore Application Process 2026

Individuals who wish to join SAGE University Indore must apply by filling an application form (SAGE JEE (SEE) for the preferred programme.Applicants can applyonline and offline.Candidates need to pay INR 1,600 as an application fee.
2: Selection/ Shortlisting of Candidates

SAGE University Indore admission to various courses is merit-based or entrance exam-based. The university considers conducts SEE for admission to UG and PG courses. SAGE University Indore also accepts scores in national or state-level entrance exam for some courses.
3: Payment of Admission Fee & Admission Confirmation

Candidates need to pay the admission fee of the course to confirm their admission at the university. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification. Aspirants need to pay theSAGE University Indore feesto confirm their seats at the university.
For more information about SAGE University, Indore Admission Process check out the below video:

courses_data.name: SAGE University, Indore BTech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: SAGE University, Indore BTechis offered through the SAGE Institute of Engineering and Technology. The duration of the course is four years. The BTech and BTech (Hons) are available in a full-time mode and have over eight semesters. Eligibility Criteria: Class 12 with Maths, Physics & Chemistry as the subjects & a minimum of 50% aggregate.

faqs.question: How to get admission to BTech course at SAGE University, Bhopal?
faqs.answer: SAGE University conducts SEE for shortlisting candidates for BTech course. SEE is an online test conducted for admission to various UG and PG courses of SAGE University. After completion of the selection rounds, the university releases a merit list to announce the names of the shortlisted candidates. The shortlisted aspirants are called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at SAGE University Indore?
faqs.answer: SAGE University Indore offers BTech for four-years at the UG level. The full-time BTech programme is offered in below specialisations:Computer Science & EngineeringCivil EngineeringElectronics & Communication EngineeringComputer Science & Information TechnologyMechanical Engineering

courses_data.name: SAGE University, Indore MBA Admission 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, XAT, CMAT, CAT, CBSE 12th, ISC, MPBSE 12th
courses_data.description: SAGE University Indore offers MBA course at the PG level. The MBA course duration is two years spread over four semesters. To enrol for course admission, candidates must complete graduation with a 50% aggregate. Aspirants are selected based on national-level entrance exam scores, i.e., SEE.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure of MBA course at SAGE University Indore?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for MBA at SAGE University Indore isINR 1.6 lakh and INR 10 lakh. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seats. In case, candidates are unable to pay the fee within the time, his or her admission will stand cancelled.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MBA at SAGE University Indore?
faqs.answer: SAGE University Indore offers admission to MBA based on the scores of the candidates in SEE. The university conducts SAGE Entrance Exam in online mode. Candidates must complete their graduation with a minimum of 60% aggregate to apply for MBA at the university.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to MBA at SAGE University?
faqs.answer: Candidates can apply for SAGE University MBA through the university website. Admissions into the MBA programme take place through the national level entrance exams, such as CAT/ MAT/XAT/CMAT, etc.Candidates can follow these steps to secure admission into the programme:Apply for admission at the university website.Appear for CAT/ MAT/XAT/CMAT/SEE.Appear for GD & PI rounds.Pay the admission and tuition fee.SAGE University MBA offers 840 seats across various specialisation. Seats are first filled t

faqs.question: How many seats does SAGE University offer for MBA?
faqs.answer: SAGE University offers 840 seats for its MBA programme with the highest number of seats provided by MBA in Human Resource Management and MBA in Marketing Management. Both of the courses offer 120 seats to candidates. The rest 720 seats are divided among the rest of the courses with each MBA course averaging around 60 seats each.

courses_data.name: SAGE University, Indore BSc Admission 2026
courses_data.description: SAGE University Indore offers BSc (Hons) courses at the UG level. The duration of the course is three years.Given below are the eligibility and selection criteria for both the programmes: Eligibility & Selection Criteria:

faqs.question: Is there a reservation policy in SAGE University BSc?
faqs.answer: As per the data available on the official website, there is not much information about the reservation policy at SAGE University for its BSc course. Since the university is privately owned, it might not adhere to the reservation policy set by the government of India and Madhya Pradesh State Government. Candidates are advised to check with the admissions office regarding the same.

faqs.question: What is the fees for BSc (Hons) at SAGE University Indore?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for BSc (Hons) isINR 90,000andINR 14 lakhat SAGE University Indore. Candidates must pay the course fees to confirm their seat. The fee range includes all the specialisations. Aspirants must pay the fee within the duration to avoid admission cancellation.

faqs.question: Is it difficult to get into SAGE University BSc?
faqs.answer: No, it is not difficult to get into SAGE University BSc as their is only one round of selections. SAGE University BSc admissions take place through the SAGE University Joint Entrance exam (SEE). If a candidate has a valid SEE score they are eligible to apply for admission in the BSc programme.The SEE exam is not as tough as other national-level entrance exams in the country, as the competition is much less than other exams. Thus, it is not very difficult to get into SAGE University BSc.

faqs.question: Do I need to apply via the SEE exam for SAGE University BSc?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can apply for SAGE University BSc through the SEE exam. The registrations for the exam will open in January and will go on till May. The exam takes place in two phases from June to August. Candidates can apply and appear for the exam to get a seat in the university's BSc programme. A valid SEE score is necessary to be eligible for admission to the university.

courses_data.name: SAGE University, Indore BBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: At the UG level, SAGE University Indore provides a three-year BBA to the students. The university offers an BBA offered is spread over six semesters. Students seeking admission must have passing scores in their past qualifying degree or equivalent. The tuition fee ranges between INR 2.3 lakh-INR 15 lakh. Check more course details below:

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BBA course at SAGE University, Indore?
faqs.answer: SAGE University Indore offers a regular Bachelor of Administration (BBA) programme at SAGE Institute of Management Studies (SIMS). It is an undergraduate programme of three-year duration. The eligibility and selection criteria is mentioned below:Eligibility-Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate in any stream from a recognised school boardSelection- Valid score in SAGE University Entrance Exam (SEE)

faqs.question: Which are the BBA specialisations offered at SAGE University Indore?
faqs.answer: SAGE University Indore offers a three-year full-time BBA course at the UG level. The university offers BBA in Human Resource Management, Markering, Finance, Event Management, Aviation, Business Analytics, E-Commerce Management, Logistics & Supply Chain Management, etc. Candidates can apply for BBA after completing Class 12.

faqs.question: Is it mandatory to take SEE for BPhrama admission at SAGE University Indore?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is mandatory to take SEE conducted by SAGE University Indore for candidates seeking admission to BPharma at the university. While Class 12 is the basic eligibility for the course, the final selection of candidates is based on SEE scores.

faqs.question: Is it mandatory to take SEE for BPhrama admission at SAGE University Indore?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is mandatory to take SEE conducted by SAGE University Indore for candidates seeking admission to BPharma at the university. While Class 12 is the basic eligibility for the course, the final selection of candidates is based on SEE scores.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at SAGE University Indore without an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot get admission at SAGE University Indore without in house entrance exam.  SAGE University Indore admission is offered to undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, diploma, and certificate courses under 14 multi-disciplinary institutes. The university accepts SEE, NATA, JEE Main entrance exam scores for various courses such as BArch, BTech, MBA etc.

faqs.question: Is admission open in SAGE University?
faqs.answer: Yes, SAGE University is open. Interested students can visit the oficial website to apply for the respective courses. SAGE University admissions are based on merit in the last qualifying examination or Joint Entrance Examination (SAGE-JEE (SEE) conducted by the university. SAGE University Indore admission is offered to undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, diploma, and certificate courses under 14 multi-disciplinary institutes.

faqs.question: Is it difficult to get admission at SAGE University BA?
faqs.answer: No, it is not as difficult to get admission into SAGE University BA as the admissions take place through the SAGE University Joint Entrance exam (SEE). The exam is not as tough as other entrance exams as there is not a lot of competition to clear this exam.In addition to that, candidates do not have to appear for further rounds of admission in BA, the admission is done based on merit secured in SEE entrance exam. Thus, it is not as difficult to get a seat in SAGE University BA if one has a valid SEE exam score.

faqs.question: When does SAGE University BSc admissions start?
faqs.answer: SAGE University BSc admissions take place through the SAGE University Joint Entrance exam (SEE). There is no direct admission option as everyone has to appear for the exam and secure a valid score to be eligible for admission.In addition to that, only those candidates who have a minimum aggregate of 50% in their Class 12 exams are eligible to appear for the SEE exam. Therefore, candidates can apply for admission at SAGE University through Class 12 exams but their selection would be based on SEE entrance score.
