The hostel facilities are average and comfortable. The food in the mess and canteen is simple and hygienic. Medical help is available on campus. The college also has sports and games facili...

reviews.review_heading: The college has decent facilities and placements, with reasonable fees.
reviews.review_text: Both girls’ and boys’ hostels are available in this college. The college is far from the main city but is located on the main highway. Paid bus facilities are available for students. Wi-Fi is available only for teachers. Labs and the library are good. Mess and canteen facilities are decent. Sports and games events happen in the college regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Very good quality for the student who want good education with the moderate feels.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Our College has a very big ground nearby, 5 acres. The hostel is very big, with 4000 students living there. The hostel provides good quality food and a variety of foods, Wi-Fi, mineral water, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: A very good college for students who want a job, but the fees are also high.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good. Our college has a very big ground nearby of 5 acres. Hostel is very big with 4000 students living there. The hostel gives good quality food and a variety of food, Wi-Fi, mineral water, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: SAGE University  review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course is good and supports both theoretical and practical learning. The classrooms are modern classrooms with a snart board and the classroom is spacious and well equipped and there are also projectors and hostel facilities are decent and comfortable for students. The rooms are clean and regularly maintained, and the mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: It has some great infrastructure and living life; I think it is great for starting my college life.
reviews.review_text: I think the college infrastructure is quite good. It has great things like a stage, sports complex, and basketball courts. The hostel rooms are nice and have great facilities like cleaning services, toilet services, room cleaning, and mess (food and lunch).

reviews.review_heading: Reality of SAGE University, Indore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is great. It is built above the mountains, and it looks very beautiful in the rainy season. It has a great library. In the library, we also get the Wi-Fi connection, but the network in the college is not that good. Currently, they are upgrading. It also has a hostel with Wi-Fi and clean facilities. The mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Stage University is worth taking admission and is a value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is actually pretty solid. Classrooms are clean and well-maintained. Labs have all the essential equipment we need for AI ML work. The campus Wi-Fi can be a little moody sometimes, but most of the time it's fast enough to get things done. Hostel life is decent too. Rooms are okay in size, and the common areas are regularly cleaned. The mess food is like normal college mess food, and it's not amazing.

reviews.review_heading: The college has great infrastructure, good faculty, and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not so cool, but there exist some labs like Apple Lab, Nvidia Lab, etc. Digital boards are in some classrooms. The quality of the hostel is good enough most of the time. The food is good, sometimes it is not good, and there is a dedicated sports complex in the college for sports purpose.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and best faculty with great experience.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are amazing. There are 11 to 15 departments, and each department has its own labs, classrooms, faculty members, and facilities. There is a central library. Sports, games, mess, and canteen facilities are also highly advanced.

reviews.review_heading: Good potential, but it needs an infrastructure upgrade and a better placement cell.
reviews.review_text: Our department had very good Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, fully equipped labs, and a well-stocked library. The hostel was clean and comfortable with good security. The mess and canteen provided tasty, hygienic food. Medical facilities were reliable. The campus offered great sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely nice and well.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are available in the course, and the department's Wi-Fi is in good condition. The labs are also in a neat and clean condition. The classrooms are also neat and clean for students and staff, and the library is so silent for study purposes.

reviews.review_heading: The college is nice, and I recommend it to others.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like classrooms are neat and clean. Wi-Fi runs very smoothly and is available for students and staff. The library is very silent to study so that students can focus on their studies. Hostel is very neat and clean for both girls and boys, and is very nice. The quality of food is nice for us.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are amazing. There are 11 to 15 departments. Each department has its own labs, classrooms, faculty members, and facilities. There is a central library. Sports, games, mess, and canteen facilities are also highly advanced.

data.description: Yes, SAGE University Indore has modern hostel facilities for all students with a modern layout and wi-fi facility. The boys hostel is situated on campus. The university provides convenience stores and a number of other amenities for the comfort of the hostels students. Students can select between a single room and a twin-shared room depending on their preferences. For female students, the university provides a separate residence. The girls' hostel is likewise located exclusively on campus. Furthermore, hostel students at SAGE Indore not only have access to amenities including a convenience shop and cafeteria/mess, but the girls' hostel is also surveilled for the safety of the students.

Placement offer to all students in different discipline and various sectors like CS IT, Pharmaceutical Sciences, Mechanical and management discipline.

college_info.intro:
Babu Banarasi Das University Lucknow consists of more than 10 schools, including the School of Engineering, the School of Management, the School of Legal Studies and the School of Computer Applications, among others. BBDU Lucknow offers various UG, PG, certificate, and PhD courses, across many streams such as management, technology, engineering sciences, legal studies, education, and humanities, among others.
The BTech programme is one of the most popular offerings at the university. Baba Banarasi Das University offers the BTech programme in several specialisations, such as Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and others. The popularity of the BTech programme offered at BBDU is attributed to its state-of-the-art engineering school equipped with both modern and traditional ways of learning and excellent faculty. The BTech graduates of BBD University Lucknow are placed in top-notch companies such as Infosys, Ola, TCS, Sony, Godrej, and many more.
Below mentioned are some of the most popular BBD University Lucknow courses, along with eligibility, selection criteria, and BBDU Lucknow fee:

faqs.answer: A:    The total course fee for BBA ranges between INR 2.40 Lacs and INR 4.2 lakh. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to BBDU BBA course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must pass Class 12 with 50%-55% aggregate to apply for BBA course. The fee for BBA varies as per the specialisation. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode. The application fee is INR 500 for each course.

Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode. The application fee is INR 500 for each course.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth doing a BCA from Babu Banarasi Das University?
overview_faqs.answer: The highest package offered during BBDU Management and Computer Application placements 2024 stood at INR 10 LPA. Earlier, according to the university placement report 2023, the the highest package offered was INR 14.75 LPA and till April 30, a total of 729 students were placed during BBD University placement 2023. A total of 238 companies visited and the average package offered to top five students was INR 8.90 LPA.Note: The stats mentioned above is the overall placement report. hence, it is not course specific.Students can also check detailed Babu Banarasi Das University placement stats here.

review_summary.college_name: BBDU Lucknow Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure are excellent and on average for a college.

content.Placements: 5 to 10 percent of students are placed in college. The highest package of BBD is 48 LPA in Microsoft btech. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Top companies are Microsoft accenture google Flipkart, Cisco, Amazon, TCS etc. 20 to 30 percent of students got intership. The role of the course is to offer b tech and other courses.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good. Labs are nice and the best library is good. Classrooms are nice. Canteens are excellent like Nesscafé, Burger Singh and Dominoz franchise. Bbd college in large stadium for cricket and other activities basketball and tennis courts in the college

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not good. The campus is good. The food is not good.

content.Placements: There are low placements, so we have to get placements on our own capabilities. Only relying on the university will not get us placed. We can expect students to get a package ranging from 2-3 LPA only. Companies that come for placements are HCL, Infosys, etc. We can get internships at IBM, but it's completely based on our skills.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is good with Wi-Fi and labs. Classrooms are like schools with no AC, but it's not a big deal, so I can consider them good. The library is decent and not fancy. There are lifts in the university building, but they are very slow. The campus is clean and feels good. Hostel food is bad. Facilities are good, like a gym, basketball court, and tennis court. There is also a stadium, which is big. I would rate 9 out of 10 for sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college in Lucknow.

content.Placements: 40 percent of students got placed. The highest is 12 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Very few got internships from my B.Tech CS course. Many groups offer their role in maintaining the extra curricular activities. You can take part in one of those groups to be a member of it and experience how the management works in different situations.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are awesome. Food and rooms in hostels are much more decent. Games are there. Tennis court, badminton, volleyball, and mainly a cricket stadium are available. Rather than games, the medical facilities are also very good. Library of the college is good, and the stock of books is also nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college in Lucknow.

content.Placements: 40 percent of students got placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest package offered is 2.5 LPA. A very few got internships from my B.Tech CS course. Many groups offer their role in maintaining the extra curricular activities. You can take part in one of those groups to be a member of it and experience how the management works in different situations.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are awesome. Food and rooms in hostels are much more decent. Games are there. Tennis court, badminton, volleyball, and mainly a cricket stadium are available. Rather than games, the medical facilities are also very good. Library of the college is good, and the stock of books is also nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Every year, the college gives good placements and high packages.

content.Placements: Almost every year, 70-80 percent of students get placements. 23-24 LPA is the highest package, the average packages are 3 to 4 LPA, and the mean is 12 to 13 LPA. TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, etc. are the top companies and recruiters which come in the college for placements. On an average, 32-40% from my course got internships in companies like HCL and Cognizant. The top roles offered are assistant manager, project manager, data analyst, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi, libraries, and labs. Classes are well-equipped with modern design and devices, such as smart boards, and well-maintained furniture like tables and chairs. Generally, the food is good, and on any special occasion, they bring better food with deluxe parties. The sports facilities are well maintained with good opportunities, welcoming the students to show their talent.

admission_process.title: Babu Banarasi Das University  Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Babu Banaras Das University admission 2025is currently open. Admission to BBDU is based on merit and entrance. The university accepts national-level entrance exams like CLAT, CAT, etc., for admission to specific courses.BBD Universityoffers more than 25 courses through 11 schools at UG, PG, certificate and doctoral levels. The mode ofBabuBanarasi Das University course admissionsis primarilyonline.

Admission to BBDU is based on merit and entrance. The University offers courses such asBTech, BSc, BDS, BBA, LLB,etc. at theUG leveland theMBA, MTech, MSc, MCA programmes, etc. at thePG level. Candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses at BBDU. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria forBabuBanarasi Das University course admissions2025:
Graduation- 50% aggregate

Note:The relaxation in qualification and reservation is as per UGC and State Govt. norms.
To check out the admission process for other UG & PG courses,make your course selection here
Students can check the detailedBabuBanarasi Das University course admissions process:
1: BBDU Application Process

BBD University application process is conducted both online and offline modes. Candidates must fill in all necessary details and submit the form to confirm candidature. Students can check the detailedBBD University feestructure here.
2: Merit List Publication

Following the application period, the university releases a merit list indicating the minimum required scores for eligibility in various courses. Aspirants meeting or exceeding the cutoff marks proceed to the subsequent selection phase.
3: Counselling Session

After appearing for the respective entrance exams, candidates must appear for counselling round. After the counselling round, candidates will receive the confirmed seat after completing few more steps.
4: Admission Confirmation
For final admission, shortlisted candidates must pay the fees and confirm the seat. This step finalises the enrollment process at BBDU.

BCA at BBDU Lucknow is offered in three specialisations under the School of Computer Applications.The requirements of the applicants for the BCA course are that they should have completed Class 12.The BCA program at BBDU can be gained by merit with a minimum of 50 per cent in Class 12, and hence it will ensure that students with a strong academic background are considered to undertake this program.

faqs.question: In how many specialisations BCA courses are offered at BBDU?
faqs.answer: BBDU Lucknow's BCA programme spans three years, encompassing six semesters, and is offered in three specializations under the School of CA. The BCA course is offered in three specialisations namely, BCA, BCA in Data Science and AI in Collaboration with IBM andBCA in Cyber Security & Forensics in Collaboration with IBM. The minimum eligibility is passing Class 12. Admission to the BCA programme at BBDU is merit-based, with a minimum requirement of 50% in Class 12.

description: BBDU cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

BBDU NEET UG cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the BDS course for various categories under the Home State quota. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks till 4 rounds.

For the General HS category, the BDS cutoff in the last round was 77788. This means that this is the maximum rank at which admissions are allowed. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff for the first and last rounds for the General HS quota.

As per the BBDU BDS cutoff 2025, the last round rank was 77788. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoff was 304455 and 1078764, respectively, for the General HS quota candidates. After analysing these ranks, we can conclude that the competition for this category for the BDS course has been fluctuating over the years.
To know the cutoff for other courses, categories, rounds, etc., use the filters in the table below.
Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the previous year's cutoff trends for the General All India category students:

BBDU accepts UPTAC cutoff ranks for admission to the BE/BTech course. Admission for the year 2025-26 is over. To know when the applications, exams, etc., for the next academic session start, check the table below.
Candidates can refer to the table given below to download the consolidated previous year's UPTAC Counselling Rounds for the General All India category students:

The BBDU BDS cutoff 2025 can be seen in the table below, along with the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023. Students needed to attain a rank of 77788 or lower to be able to gain admission at this university. This is the requirement for the students under the General HS quota. To know the maximum and minimum cutoff ranks for other rounds, categories and years, students can view the table below.

In this section, students can access the BBDU MDS cutoff 2025, 2024, as well as 2023. As per the first round, the most competitive course was MDS in Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, with a cutoff of 4356. On the other hand, the most popular course in the last round was MDS in Conservative Dentistry and Endodontics, with the cutoff being 6103.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure are excellent and on average for a college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good. Labs are nice and the best library is good. Classrooms are nice. Canteens are excellent like Nesscafé, Burger Singh and Dominoz franchise. Bbd college in large stadium for cricket and other activities basketball and tennis courts in the college

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good. The campus is good. The food is not good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good with Wi-Fi and labs. Classrooms are like schools with no AC, but it's not a big deal, so I can consider them good. The library is decent and not fancy. There are lifts in the university building, but they are very slow. The campus is clean and feels good. Hostel food is bad. Facilities are good, like a gym, basketball court, and tennis court. There is also a stadium, which is big. I would rate 9 out of 10 for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in  Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Labs are awesome. Food and rooms in hostels are much more decent. Games are there. Tennis court, badminton, volleyball, and mainly a cricket stadium are available. Rather than games, the medical facilities are also very good. Library of the college is good, and the stock of books is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Good  college in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Labs are awesome. Food and rooms in hostels are much more decent. Games are there. Tennis court, badminton, volleyball, and mainly a cricket stadium are available. Rather than games, the medical facilities are also very good. Library of the college is good, and the stock of books is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Every year, the college gives good placements and high packages.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi, libraries, and labs. Classes are well-equipped with modern design and devices, such as smart boards, and well-maintained furniture like tables and chairs. Generally, the food is good, and on any special occasion, they bring better food with deluxe parties. The sports facilities are well maintained with good opportunities, welcoming the students to show their talent.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, average placements, and a large green campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is very good. Labs, classrooms and library are well maintained and properly equipped. As a first year student, our classes are on the 5th floor of 8 floor as well 2 ground floors building, and getting a lift at 9 a. m. is difficult, so we often use the stairs, which actually helps in staying fit. Hostels are in good condition, though not perfect. Mess food is sometimes good and sometimes average, while the canteen food is quite good. Medical facilities are av...

reviews.review_heading: The college is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi works well, labs are fantastic, and classrooms are spacious and well-equipped. The library is big. Hostels are not very suitable for living. Mess food is so bad that people sometimes get sick. Facilities at BBD (Babu Banarasi Das) institutions in Lucknow generally receive mixed reviews, with hostels often rated average to poor (especially food quality), while medical and sports facilities are usually available. Wi-Fi, libraries, and labs are generally well-regarded.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent in terms of placement, and the quality of study is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very good because the buildings are well-maintained, and a beautiful infrastructure is provided by the college. The internal structure of my building is very good. Classrooms are well-maintained, and a digital board is present in all classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: College is good only for rich people, and if anyone comes from middle class, then this is not good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Everything is very much okay. But the hostel facilities are not good. The food in the mess is very poor quality. The hostel fees are also very high, they charge 80,000 per annum for three B. Ed rooms, and they don’t provide facilities like high-end amenities. They give only one almirah and one B. Ed with table and chair, and the rooms are very small, so it’s not good.

reviews.review_heading: Small talks about college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, not that bad. It's in working condition and maintained. It's okay working, but they upgraded their infrastructure last year, but it's not that good. They were updated from the last one we had before, so it’s okay, but not that okay. You can work with it.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college to take admission in.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Banarasi Das University is not that great. It has average infrastructure. It has a large library, and they also provide Wi-Fi to all the departments. The quality of the hostel is average, and the food was okay. This college also provided a mess.

reviews.review_heading: BBDU Lucknow offers great faculty, placements, and a lively campus for learning and growth.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in my course are very good. We get many seminars, we have labs and a classroom with video representation, a proper quiz, and fully AC, centralized AC, and many books related to our course. Our hostel is also good with full safety and security, and we have a proper medical area where students get proper treatment, and the quality of food is also good. There are many options on the menu that they cook regularly, and we also have a proper play area in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for low fees.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are well and good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is also average, but the food quality is very poor, making it not worth staying there. The course completion, the sports game facilities, medical facilities, and mess and canteen facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for low fees.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The library is well and good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is also average, but the food quality is very poor, making it not worth staying there. However, during the course, the sports, game facilities, medical facilities, mess, and canteen facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for low-budget studies.

paragraphs: The total course fee for BBA ranges between INR 2.40 Lacs and INR 4.2 lakh. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to BBDU BBA course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must pass Class 12 with 50%-55% aggregate to apply for BBA course. The fee for BBA varies as per the specialisation. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode. The application fee is INR 500 for each course.

The total tuition fee for various course at Babu Banarasi Das University is different as per courses. Students can check the table below to know the total tuition fee for various courses at BBDU Lucknow:

Babu Banarasi Das University Lucknow provides several merit and need-based scholarships to students. Some of the scholarships offered at the university include Research Fellowship, Scholarship for SC/ST Category Students, Scholarship for OBC and Minority categories, etc.  The Research Fellowship is offered to PhD students in the form of financial assistance. The university also offers financial assistance to the students coming from the economically weaker sections of the society. The SC/ ST/ OBC scholarships are offered to students belonging to the respective minority community.

review_summary.college_name: MDU Rohtak Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of everything about this college.

content.Placements: Only a few students are placed, and the package is very low. You could find a job like that anywhere, and it is done by low-level companies. Internship level is also very low. I don’t know about top roles, but the average role is minimum-wage worker.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very bad. We don’t even get classrooms for some of the classes and have to study outside. Nor do we get access to labs, and there is no Wi-Fi. There is a library, but the books there are useless. There is no mess or medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor Of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Average study but poor college life.

content.Placements: There are very low placements. Do not expect so much about placements. There are very few companies for recruitment in our course. The average package offered in our course is 3 LPA. There are very few students who got internship. In conclusion it does not offer many opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The library is available but there is no Wi-Fi available in it. Classrooms are average. There is no mess available in college. Canteen is available but it always remain close as there is no food available. College gives time to time opportunities for participation in various sports and games. NCC is also present.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (B.B.A.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of our Aggarwal College Ballabgarh.

content.Placements: 2/3 students placed in my course last placement drive. The highest package for UG student 3.7 LPA, the lowest package for UG student 2.1 LPA. Top companies like TCS, HDFC Life, Bajaj Finance, and etc. 70 percent students got internship in companies like Escort Group. Top roles offered in HR, Finance, Marketing, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi enabled smart classes and hi-tech labs, huge library. Canteen food cost for one person 70. Medical facilities and facilities for physically impaired person, lift facility, emergency exit plan. Working on hostel facility. Sports activities weekly.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college with good placements and average hostel life and facilities, rest campus is good.

content.Placements: Placement criteria are good and above average. Placement opportunities are available in this college, and if you have a good skill set in any programming language or data analytics, then you can easily get a package up to 10+ LPA. I am talking about the MCA department.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the course is average, or I would say okay, as the course is outdated and the subjects are repeated, since we have already studied them in BCA. So for MCA, the course is mostly the same with some little changes. I would say the MCA course should be updated to gain new knowledge. Talking about the hostel, the hostel living is good if you get a 3 bed room, but if you get a 4 bed room or a 6 bed room, then the experience is literally not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are good, supportive, and well-qualified. Infrastructure is so cool.

content.Placements: In my course, not many students get placements. I'm new in college, so I don't know the highest and the lowest packages offered to students. From our seniors, I got to know that not many students get placements directly from college. Almost 60 percent of students get internships from my course. Companies like Wozti Infotech and HCL hire students from our college.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and the library are so good. The hostel fans are not working. Labs are also good and working. In the hostel, Wi-Fi is not working regularly. Hostel mess (food) is also good. Medical facilities are also good. Sports like kabaddi and other athletic games happen from time to time, so students can easily participate.

admission_overview.college_name: MDU Rohtak Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Application Form, Dates

admission_overview.title: MDU Rohtak Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: MDU Rohtak admissions are currently open. The university conducts entrance exam for admission to MBA, LLM, MA and other courses. Besides, the university also offers admission to candidates based on their national-level entrance exam or qualifying exam scores. MDU Rohtak offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels on campus and via its affiliated colleges. The university also offers programmes in distance education mode via its Centre for Distance and Online Education, MDU. Interested candidates can fill out the application form for the preferred course on the university's website.

eligibility_selection.title: MDU Rohtak Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: MDU admission to the UG and PG courses is based on merit and scores in the course-specific entrance exam. MDU also conducts an entrance exam for admission in MBA, LLM and other courses. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The selection for popular courses such as MBA and LLM is based on MDU Rohtak entrance exam. The table below carries the eligibility and selection details for some of the offered MDU Rohtak courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate
Bachelor's degree/ Shastri examination (new scheme) of a 3 year duration with at least 50% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST candidates of Haryana)
LLB (Professional) with a minimum of 50% aggregate
Class 12 with at least 45% marks in aggregate (42.75% aggregate for SC/ ST candidates of Haryana only)

Candidates who have scored at least 50% aggregate (47.5% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Blind/ Visually and Differently Abled candidates of Haryana only) either in bachelor's degree or in the master's degree in Science, Social Sciences or Humanity or BBA/ MBA degree

faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for MBA admissions in most colleges require a minimum percentage in graduation degree. Additionally, most MBA colleges select candidates based on the scores of accepted entrance exams. At MDU Rohatk, candidates who have passed master or Bachelors degree/Shastri examination (new scheme) of a three-year duration with at least 50% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST candidates of Haryana) or any other examination recognised by MD University as equivalent thereto, can apply for MBA programme. Candidates can also pursue MBA at colleges offering Online MBA courses. They can also check out college offering Online Executive MBA programmes.

Interested aspirants must check the eligibility criteria and apply as and when the application window opens.

paragraphs: MDU Rohtak admission processincludes various steps such as registration, selection, document verification and fee payment. Candidates are first required to apply for the course of their choice. The application form is available online on the official website of the university. Below are the steps forMDU Rohtak admission:-
1.The admission process begins with registration of th candidates. Application forms are available online on the official website of the university.
2.The university considers merit of the candidates for admission to courses like MA, PG Diploma, etc.

3.Once the selection rounds are over, MDU Rohtak releases a merit list to announce the names of the shortlisted candidates. Such aspirants are further called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to pay theMDU Rohtak feeto confirm their seat in the university. The list of documents required during the admission are as follows:

MDU Rohtak feeis a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually. Coming to affordability, it is one of the strong reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships have made education accessible but the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Check below the total tuition fee for topMDU Rohtak courses:
Note:This data is taken from official website/ sanctioning body and may vary.

MDU seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the intake for top MDU Rohtak courses:
Note:This data is taken from official website/ sanctioning body and may vary.

MDU Rohtak reserves seats for various categories such as SC, ST, EWS, etc. Candidates falling under the specified categories can avail the reservation benefit only if they hold the documents proving their claim. The university reserves 15% of the sanctioned intake for All India Open Category (including Haryana) and 85% for the state quota. Below are the reservation criteria followed at MDU Rohtak:
10% of State Quota to Scheduled Castes (8.4% of Total Intake)
10% of State Quota to Deprived Scheduled Castes (8.4% of Total Intake)
MDU offers courses at campus and via more than 100 affiliated colleges.

courses_data.name: MDU Rohtak MA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: MDU Rohtak offers a two-yearMAcourse spread across four semesters. This course is taught through the Department of Humanities and Social Science across 16 specialisations. The selection for this course is entrance-based. Those who want to take admission to the MA course must fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria of MDU.

faqs.question: Which are the MA specialisations offered at MDU Rohtak?
faqs.answer: MDU Rohtak offers MA for a duration of two-years in the below specialisations:EnglishHindiDrawing & PaintingSanskrit

faqs.question: How much is the cost of MA at MDU Rohtak?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MDU Rohtak MA ranges betweenINR 800 and INR 74,000. The fee is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative. Aspirants must pay the programme fee after completion of the selection process to confirm their seat in the university.MDU Rohtak provides financial assistance to MDU students in the form of scholarships. Students can avail the scholarship benefits by meeting the set criteria. Apart from the tuition fee, a registration fee needs to be paid by the student

faqs.question: I've scored less than 50% in graduation. Can I get admission in MDU for MA?
faqs.answer: To get admission in the MA course at MDU University, students need to fulfill eligibility and selection criteria. A candidate scoring a minimum of 45% in graduation is eligible to apply for MA admission at the university. The candidate also must have scored at least 45% in Class 12. Admission to this course is entrance-based. In case a candidate fails to get admission at MDU for MA, they can also check out other colleges offeringOnline MA courses.

faqs.question: Does MDU Rohtak accept JEE Main scores?
faqs.answer: Yes, MDU Rohtak accept JEE Main scores for admission to the BTech and various other courses. Candidates must prepare well for the JEE Main exam. Students must prepare according to theJEE Main syllabus.Students must read theJEE Main booksand pepare accordingly.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in MDU Rohtak directly?
faqs.answer: No, the university does not offer direct admission. MDU Rohtak admission to a lot of courses is done through entrance exams. The university conducts an entrance exam to shortlist candidates for MA, MBA, LLM, etc. However, for a few non-centralised courses, admission is merit-based. Thus, for these courses, the candidate's scores in the last qualifying examination are considered for selection. Hence, the candidates must prepare well in advance as a lot of students apply for admission to MDU Rohtak but seats are limited.

faqs.question: Does MDU Rohtak fall under CUET?
faqs.answer: No, MDU Rohtak is not a participating university of CUET. MDU Rohtak shortlists candidates for most of the courses based on the entrance exam conducted by the university. To appear for the exam, candidates need to download MDU admit card. The university considers academic merit for admission to courses like MA, PG Diploma, etc. The first level of selection after the application process will be either based on entrance exam or academic merit.

faqs.question: When can I start to register for MBA admissions at MDU CPAS?
faqs.answer: MBA admissions at MDU ended in June 2025. The registrations for the next academic year 2026 will open in July 2026 and the merit list will be released thereafter. Candidates whose name appears on the merit list will be required to pay their admission fees by end of July 2026. Candidates can check the MDU CPAS brochure for more details.

faqs.question: What is the fees of MDU Rohtak MBA 2 years?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MDU Rohtak MBA ranges between INR 1,100 and INR 5.3 lakh . The fee is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative. Selected candidates need to pay the course fee after completion of the selection process to confirm their seat in the university. Only after the payment of programme fee, admission to MDU MBA is confirmed. MDU Rohtak provides financial assistance to MBA students in the form of scholarships. Students can avail the scholarship benefits by meeting the set criteria. Apart from the tuition fee, a registration fee needs to be paid by the students in the start. The application fee is INR 1,000 for MBA course.

description: MDU Rohtak cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various UG and PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the MDU Rohtak JEE Main cutoff 2025, along with other exams across various courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are below:

MDU Rohtak BTech cutoff 2025 is available here, along with the last two years' cutoff data. In the General AI category, the last round closing ranks were in the range of 167341 and 1389859 for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering. This cutoff range is valid for MDU Rohtak-affiliated colleges. Considering the ranks, University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Maharshi Dayanand University had the most competitive last round cutoff rank of 167341, for CSE admission. In the first rou

MDU Rohtak JEE Main cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to the B.Tech. course across multiple specialisations. For the General category students under the AI quota, the cutoff ranks varied between 167341 and 1389859, wherein the most competitive specialisation was CSE. The cutoff was released for different affiliated colleges, of which the most competitive was the University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Maharshi Dayanand University. In 2024, the CSE last round cutoff rank for

MDU Rohtak offers the BTech programme via its affiliated colleges. For 2026, the dates are announced. Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important JEE Main 2026 dates.

Tabulated below are the round and year-wise consolidated JEE Main cutoff PDF lists. This will help students understand the Maharshi Dayanand University's past years' cutoff trends. JEE Main is the accepted exam for B.Tech. admission, across multiple specialisations.

MDU Rohtak accepts the JEE Main rank, followed by HSTES counselling for selecting students to its BTech and BPharma courses. For the students belonging to the General AI quota, the last round closing rank was 37 for BPharma admission. For other categories, rounds and quota, use the provided filtres:

MDU Rohtak accepts MP BE scores for admission to BE/ BTech courses. The closing rank after Round 1 seat allotment results for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 1053688 for the General category All India students. Candidates seeking MDU Rohtak BE/ BTech admissions through MP BE can check the round-wise and category-wise closing ranks in the table below:

MDU Rohtak Gurugram University cutoff 2023 for the BEd course has been released up to Round 2. As per MDU Rohtak cutoff 2023, the closing percentile for BEd courses offered at Rao Ram Singh Collge of Education stood at 82.6, for Pataudi College of Education at 74.6, for Drona College of Education at 74.67 and Sardar Patel College of Education at 71.63 for General category All India Quota. highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is MDU Rohtak. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #43 under Pharmacy category, and #46 under State Public University. MDU Rohtak excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around MDU Rohtak rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Haryana In 2025

nirf.description:
MDU Rohtak has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for MDU Rohtak indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, MDU Rohtak's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Pharmacy', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, MDU Rohtak fell 5 ranks to #43 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'State Public University' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, MDU Rohtak fell 11 ranks to #46 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
As per the overall score, MDU Rohtak has been placed at a good position by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment.

hostel_campus.college_name: MDU Rohtak Infrastructure: Campus Facilities

hostel.description: The University provides residential accommodation on the campus to over 4000 students in its 19 hostels. Mess in each hostel is run by the residents on cooperative basis. Each hostel has facilities for indoor games, recreation, STD, and canteen and Wi-fi internet connectivity is available in some of the hostels. Girls hostel has cyber cafe, facilities for computer printing, typing, photocopying service, packed eatables, cold drinks, and coffee.
facilities: Fully furnished common rooms for newspaper reading

data: 622 acres (with built-up area of 3,75,000 sq. meters)
Delhi Road, near Delhi Bypass, Rohtak
Central Library, Computer Centre, Health Centre, Sports Facilities, Hostels, Guest House, Canteen, etc

library.description: Maharshi Dayanand University library system comprises Vivekananda Library, named after Swami Vivekananda, has carved a niche for itself in the University firmament. It has the capacity to accommodate more than 3,58,300 volumes of books and bound journals in its stack areas, Reading Hall with capacity for 963 readers, 13 Scholars’ Rooms, a Committee Room-cum-Videoconferencing Hall. The Library has five satellite libraries – Law Library, IMSAR Library, and UIET. Library, Math Library, and Hotel & Tourism Library. Digital Library which provides e-Resources, Remote Access, e-Journals, e-Reference Sources, etc. to the students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Football Ground, Squash Court, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Boxing Ring, Wrestling Hall, Athletics Track, Astroturf Hockey, Lawn Tennis Court, Kabaddi Hall, Judo Hall

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dronacharya Government CollegeReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of everything about this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very bad. We don’t even get classrooms for some of the classes and have to study outside. Nor do we get access to labs, and there is no Wi-Fi. There is a library, but the books there are useless. There is no mess or medical facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by DAV Centenary College, FaridabadReviewed on 10 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Average study but poor college life.
reviews.review_text: The library is available but there is no Wi-Fi available in it. Classrooms are average. There is no mess available in college. Canteen is available but it always remain close as there is no food available. College gives time to time opportunities for participation in various sports and games. NCC is also present.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aggarwal CollegeReviewed on 10 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of our Aggarwal College Ballabgarh.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi enabled smart classes and hi-tech labs, huge library. Canteen food cost for one person 70. Medical facilities and facilities for physically impaired person, lift facility, emergency exit plan. Working on hostel facility. Sports activities weekly.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ganga Institute of Technology and ManagementReviewed on 4 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college with good placements and average hostel life and facilities, rest campus is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the course is average, or I would say okay, as the course is outdated and the subjects are repeated, since we have already studied them in BCA. So for MCA, the course is mostly the same with some little changes. I would say the MCA course should be updated to gain new knowledge. Talking about the hostel, the hostel living is good if you get a 3 bed room, but if you get a 4 bed room or a 6 bed room, then the experience is literally not good.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are good, supportive, and well-qualified. Infrastructure is so cool.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and the library are so good. The hostel fans are not working. Labs are also good and working. In the hostel, Wi-Fi is not working regularly. Hostel mess (food) is also good. Medical facilities are also good. Sports like kabaddi and other athletic games happen from time to time, so students can easily participate.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by St. Andrews Institute of Technology and ManagementReviewed on 29 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is very good. In this fee structure, you can take admission it is value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the colleges is very good. It brings many rewards to the architecture department.  The infrastructure is very good and very attractive for the students and the hostel is not very good as compared to college it has a big separate mess for boys and girls.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by St. Andrews Institute of Technology and ManagementReviewed on 27 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is very good, but the hostel life is not very good.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure was very good. The college building had many well-designed wings and attractive architecture. The architecture department was very good and well. Hostel was not good. It was very bad, but the hostel staff were very helpful.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by St. Andrews Institute of Technology and ManagementReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College life is good. The college infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms were good and fully air-conditioned. The campus provided Wi-Fi throughout. The hostel was also good, but the hostel staff sometimes behaved rudely with students. Overall, the college life was very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Government College ,JhajjarReviewed on 25 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good for study, facilities, but not for placements or crowd.
reviews.review_text: If I talk about infrastructure or facilities, then our college provides good facilities such as smart classes, libraries, and labs for each course. In the library, there is a proper sitting area and Wi-Fi connection with all types of books present for students. If I talk about a mess or hostel, I don't know about it because I am a regular student.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Maharshi Dayanand UniversityReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college is overall good.
reviews.review_text: Personal guidance is provided to students by teachers, and regarding infrastructure, it might be the best thing I liked about my college. Classrooms are well cleaned and tidy, with digital projectors available. The library has a lot of space for students and also has various guidebooks. The hostels are good not that much good, but I can say the food provided in the canteen or mess is delicious. There is also a medical center available just outside the hostel department. There are various games a...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by World College of Technology and ManagementReviewed on 14 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, but needs some changes.
reviews.review_text: In our college corridors, there is Wi-Fi on every floor. Lab of our college has all the tools needed for that particular subject. Library is very peaceful and silent. The quality of the mess food is very good, the canteen is not that good, but okay. Sports and games are excellent.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dronacharya College of EngineeringReviewed on 14 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college focuses on academics but does not focus on activities like events and sports.
reviews.review_text: In my college, a hostel is available but temporarily, and it is not in use for some reason. My college provides Wi-Fi facility for all students with a smart board in all classrooms. My college has a library with lots of books. There are 2 canteens. Labs are provided with all equipment. For medical facilities, 1 medical room is available. There is a large campus for sports.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest students add some more money and go to DU and other colleges.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The canteen is not that hygienic, but it is good and not that bad. Students can easily come and go as it is on the main road, so there is easy transportation for students. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games also happen here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Maharshi Dayanand UniversityReviewed on 13 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, but a little less satisfied with placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very beautiful, and the classrooms are large. Hostel rooms are big enough for 2 students, and the washrooms are cleaned daily. Hostels are big and nice, and the mess food is delicious in the girls' hostel. Girls' hostel closing times are 8 pm in summer and 7 pm in winter.

reviews.review_heading: Good thanksgiving chance to review about my college for 2016 students.
reviews.review_text: There are lots of facilities available inside the university, like fans, AC, and water service available all the time. Wi-Fi is also available for students, and faculty members are very supportive and kind-hearted. The canteen food is amazing and available at good prices. There are lots of sports events organized for both students and faculty. I love playing volleyball, and the coach is very supportive of students.

data.description: Maharshi Dayanand University (MDU Rohtak) has experienced faculty members. MDU Rohtak faculty are diploma, PhD, and degree holders. MDU Rohtak faculty has years of experience. MDU Rohtak arranges faculty and student exchange programmes and also invites faculty for guest lectures.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Maharshi Dayanand University

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, Nagaroo, Polestar, Capgemini, etc., visited the campus.
Amazon, Wipro, JK Cement, Byju's, and TCS provided internships for students to secure their future.

likes.text: The infrastructure of our college was very good for study with all modern facilities like conference rooms, Wi-Fi, and a library with all good books related to the curriculum.

The hostel is very good, and the food provided by the mess is of good quality.

college_info.intro:
Symbiosis Institute of Health Sciences' popular courses are MBA and BSc. The institute offers BSc specialisations in Medical Technology, Radiotherapy, and Mental Sciences. SIHS Pune BSc students are placed in top companies in various sectors. BSc students can work as Radiation Therapist, Medical Physicist, Mental Health Counsellor, Clinical Trial Coordinator, and others.
Symbiosis Institute of Health Sciences is one of the eminent institutes. The institute offers an MBA specialisation in Hospital & Healthcare Management. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Hospital Administrators, Healthcare Consultants, Medical Practice Managers, Policy Analysts, and others. The below-mentioned are SIHS Pune's popular programmes:

individual_reviews.course: Master of Public Health (MPH) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure, peaceful place, and nice faculty members.

content.Placements: I'm in my 3rd semester, so it's difficult to say, but I think the placement opportunities depend on us. Our skill set, approach, and where we want to see ourselves, along with guidance from the faculty members. The roles are policy makers, working in NGOs, as researchers, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of the food is average because they have to cook for a lot of people. Classrooms and the library are good, and overall, the infrastructure is excellent. Other than that, facilities in the hostel are very good, we provide a hygienic and clean environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Technology (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with every facility of the college.

content.Placements: The total percentage of students placed in this course is 70%. The highest package is 21 LPA. The lowest package is 6 LPA. Recruiting companies are Philips, GE, Siemens, Toshiba, and Fujifilm. Many of the companies are there like I already mentioned 70%. The roles offered are in sales, applications, and technologies.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available on campus. We have Wi-Fi facilities, sitting area, cafeteria, and library. Many of the things are there. The best part of the college is fully greenery on our campus. Like everyday, we get a different kind of food. Our college has a hospital on the campus and too much big grounds are there. Every year they organise sports games from every department.

admission_overview.description: Symbiosis Institute of Health Sciences admission process 2025 is entrance-based, followed by a Personal Interview. The application process is completely online at the institute. Symbiosis Institute of Health Sciences, also known as SIHS Pune is a constituent of Symbiosis International (Deemed University). It offers BSc, MSc, MBA and diploma courses at the graduation and postgraduation levels in the field of Health Sciences. To apply for SIHS Pune, candidates must have a minimum of 50% aggregate in Class 12 and a bachelor's degree for UG and PG courses, respectively. For MBA admission, candidates need to qualify the SNAP entrance test. admission_process.title: Symbiosis Institute of Health Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Admission to SIHS Pune is online through its official website. The institute has courses for various specialisations in full-time mode. Symbiosis Institute of Health Science Pune admission process involves registration, merit list, and admission confirmation. Follow steps given belowto get a seat at the Symbiosis Institute of Health Science:
STEP 1: Symbiosis Institute of Health Science Application Process 2025

Apply online on the official website of college. Pay an application fee to complete the application procedure. Registration fee is different for different courses. Candidates are also required to apply for entrance exams separately if their desired course requires them to.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Symbiosis Institute of Health Science Pune shortlists candidates based on entrance exams such as SNAP or institute-level entrance exams. The college will display a provisional merit list. The candidate would be called forEntrance Exam + WAT + PIfor MSc and BSc courses, respectively.
STEP 3: Merit List and Admission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the university releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted a seat in the institute. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.answer: The institute admits students based on entrance exam such as SNAP for MBA, institute based entrance exam for BSc and MSc course. The institute offers courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply through the official website. Apart from the entrace exam, the candidate also have to sit and appear for WAT+ PI. Hence, if the candidate can clear all the stages, the student will be eligible for the interested course.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for BSc at SIHS Pune?
faqs.answer: Candidates while applying for BSc programme in any specialisation offered at Symbiosis Institute of Health Sciences must payapplication feeof INR 1,500 during the time of registration. This application fee paid by candidates during the application process is non-refundable and non-transferable.

paragraphs: During the Symbiosis Institute of Health Sciences placements 2024 recorded a highest package of INR 19 LPA offered to MBA HH graduates. The average and median packages offered stood at INR 7.95 LPA and INR 9 LPA , respectively. The season had 106 offers and secured 100% placements for all the students. The insurance sector emerged as the top recruiting sector with 34.90% share . In total 45 recruiters took part in the placements and the notable recruiters include- Aditya Birla, Apollo, Accenture and many more. The season 2024 witnessed multiple and diverse offers for students from the Healthcare sector. The recruiters offered different profiles across domains such as Consultancy, Diagnostics, Healthcare IT, Hospitals, Insurance, and Medical Devices during the SIHS placements 2024.

hostel_campus.college_name: Symbiosis Institute of Health Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure, peaceful place, and nice faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the food is average because they have to cook for a lot of people. Classrooms and the library are good, and overall, the infrastructure is excellent. Other than that, facilities in the hostel are very good, we provide a hygienic and clean environment.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with every facility of the college.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available on campus. We have Wi-Fi facilities, sitting area, cafeteria, and library. Many of the things are there. The best part of the college is fully greenery on our campus. Like everyday, we get a different kind of food. Our college has a hospital on the campus and too much big grounds are there. Every year they organise sports games from every department.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, qualified faculty members, amazing placements, no fests and events .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi has been provided to everyone. Classrooms are well-ventilated with a smart board system. The library is provided with a wide range of books accessible to every student. All the sports are available on campus, and tournaments are held every year between institutes. The college has its own hospital where all the services are provided either for free or at a discounted rate for the staff and students of Symbiosis.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Symbiosis Institute of health sciences, Lavale, Pune.
reviews.review_text: Adequate infrastructure have been provided even though it could have been better. Good quality of food, playground for sports, medical care facilities are available. Libraries have a video range in selections of books in all areas. The hostels facilities are present for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Symbiosis Institute of Health Sciences, Symbiosis International, Pune.
reviews.review_text: The outline of the course needs improvement as we require to learn more than what is given. We require a good base regarding the specialisations they offer, which is not cleared by them. Giving an observation ship was not enough.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides the best infrastructure, and all the facilities were provided by our college are at its best level. Events were organized at several times. The college also provides different workshop which was mandatory for all students to attend, and it was fruitful for the students.

reviews.review_heading: A mutually beneficial place for your learning.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Symbiosis campuses is amazing as they provide comfort and homely feeling to every student. There are many facilities available like Wi-Fi, classrooms, recreational facilities, and sports for all the students in the campus. Campus life at SIHS helped everyone learn a lot of things and made us independent people. The classrooms, medical facilities, and canteen are good enough for everyone who wants to be part of SIHS.

reviews.review_heading: Think 10 times before getting an admission here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not provided for the students. There are just 3 classrooms for 200 students and just around 150 chairs. We got a hospital/health centre on our campus. The library is good. The institute is not at all interested in sports and game hence, they don't provide anything. I have also heard the annual sports budget of my institute is around 3 lakhs and this all goes into the pocket of some person in admin block, and same goes with the cultural budget. The canteen is best. Good food with reasona...

reviews.review_heading: Average faculty, good infrastructure and the facilities and food are also good
reviews.review_text:
The college infrastructure is good. There are computer lab facilities and Wi-Fi are available. The library is very well-equipped with good reference books which are very helpful. The college has limited number of classrooms which then cause a bit problem. Symbiosis Center of Healthcare is a medical care center on the campus which conducts health check-ups every year. These also help in case of medical emergencies. The staff team is good and caring.
But there are no proper courts for games.
The c...

reviews.review_heading: Been an amazing learning and developmental process.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure and facilities were average to good.
Not as good as compared to other big MBA Colleges like IIMs, NMIMs etc., but all the facilities were there including a library, medical facilities and volleyball court.

The College has decent infrastructure situated in heart of the city, well connected. It has average sized Library and well equipped lecture halls. The Faculty is very renowned and well experienced from field of healthcare and allied sciences. There are renowned guest speakers; conclaves and other seminars. The Post Graduate program is one of their best and their flagship course. The placement scenario is quite good. Nearly 100% placements with many MNCs lining up can be found. There is a Decent ... reviews.review_heading: Review of Symbiosis Institute of Health Sciences, Symbiosis International, Pune.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, clean washrooms, spacious buildings, elevators, etc. The hostel has bathrooms. They are clean. The quality of the food is average. Our canteen is great. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our classrooms are equipped with smart boards. Classrooms are spacious. The hostel is average. Around 3-4 students can stay in each room.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides excellent faculty members and quality education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but it does not have a huge campus. Inspite of that, all the facilities are available along with an up-to-date library and a computer lab. There is also a gym and a wellness centre on the campus along with an on-campus ATM.

data.description: Symbiosis Institute of Health Sciences Pune appoints well trained and expert faculty members. The faculty focuses on therotical and practical knowledge to the students. The faculty are passionate and committed to helping the students in their career pathways. They engage the students with the latest activities and innovate teaching and quality research.

college_info.intro:
Centurion University Bhubaneswar offers UG and PG courses across various specialisations such as Science, Engineering, Law, Pharmacy, Management, and others. BTech, MBA, and BSc are the flagship courses offered at Centurion University of Technology & Management, Bhubaneswar.
The BTech programmes offered at the institute is a full- time, four- year programme, covering core courses in the areas of CSE, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, Agricultural Engineering, and others. The MBA programme offered by the Centurion University BBSR is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Agribusiness Management, Finance, HR, Marketing, and others. The below-mentioned are Centurion University Bhubaneswar's popular programmes:

review_summary.college_name: Centurion University Bhubaneswar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Centurion University review.

content.Placements: The placement in our course was the best among all courses. The placement percentage was around 85–90 percent. The highest package was also secured by our course only, i.e., 22 LPA. The average package was around 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Accenture, Deloitte, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facilities, a library, and modern classrooms were available. Computer labs, laboratories, and workshops were well equipped with instruments. Hostel quality was also good. Sports and games were encouraged by the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: You will enjoy the college.

content.Placements: Only a few students were placed, nearly 35% students in our course. Minimum package is 3 LPA, and the highest I don't have any valid proof because college says nearly 24, but we don't believe. Wipro, Amazon, and TCS recruit. More of them were placed in Wipro or TCS. Software engineer and supervisor roles were offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very good, and I recommend you visit it as there are lots of places like the butterfly garden, gram tarang, etc. Wi-Fi is here, but don't rely on it as they have less network speed. The library is here, but it doesn't have new books, all are old. The hostel is very bad, I heard it, but I don't know that much because I am a day scholar.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Also a very good college.

content.Placements: In our college, a minimum of 70% students are placed in our course. The lowest package of the last year is 3 LPA, and the highest package is 10 LPA. Many top recruiting companies come, like IBM, and an old senior of our college is placed at Google.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is the best. There are many types in our college. A big ground, a volleyball court, a gym area, and a swimming pool are available in the college. The classroom is completely AC and very spacious.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aerospace Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Very satisfied with the college. Infrastructure, facilities, faculty members, and all are good.

content.Placements: 80 to 85% students were placed. The highest package is 6 to 7 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiters are Tata, Godrej, Alphabets, HAL, etc. Every Student needs to do internship, which is also provided by the college. College will provide its own internship programme. Service Engineer, Designer, Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Every possible facility is available in the college as well as the hostel. Food is good, Wi-Fi was available, and the Lab was also very useful. They also have an option available of AC luxury in a hostel that was value for money. I also chose the luxury one, and all the facilities were good.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated Master of Science (M.Sc.) + Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is recognized as one of the best skill institutions in Odisha.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities at the college are impressive. Starting from the second year, students participate in internships at various hospitals. Many graduates are recruited by these same hospitals based on their performance, and there are also opportunities to secure positions at renowned institutions such as AIIMS.
content.Infrastructure: College is set in a peaceful and green environment, making it a pleasant place to study. The hostels are well-maintained, with spacious rooms and all necessary facilities provided. Hostel wardens are also very cooperative and ensure students feel comfortable.

admission_overview.college_name: Centurion University Bhubaneswar Course Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Cutoffs, Application Process

admission_process.title: Centurion University of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Centurion University of Technology and Management (CUTM) Bhubaneswar, offers UG, PG and Diploma courses with a diverse range of over 100 courses across various fields, includingEngineering, Management,Science, Mass Communication and Media,Design, Hotel Management, and Pharmacy. ForCenturion University Bhubaneswaradmissions, candidates are required to appear for the CUEE which is conducted by the University. Admission to courses offered in the field of Management, Technology, Science and Engineering requires a valid score in CUEE.

Centurion University Bhubaneswar coursesoffer a range of diploma, UG, PG, research-level and certificate programmes offered through multiple departments working under it. Some of the popular courses offered at Centurion University Bhubaneswar are mentioned in below table along with their eligibility criteria:
Class 12 (Physics, Chemistry, Maths) with 50% aggregate (5% relaxation for reserved category)
BSc in respective disciplines
Bachelor's degree
Class 12 (Physics, Chemistry, Maths/Biology) with 45% aggregate
CUEE BPharm

Step 1: ApplicationTheprocess ofadmissionat Centurion University of Technology and Managementstartswiththe online application formsubmittedonitsofficialwebsiteby the aspirant.Inadditiontotheapplication,thefeewouldbeleviedaspertheprogrammechosen.However,inadditiontothat, the candidate is supposedto upload scanned copies of documentsincludingacademic transcripts, mark sheets, certificates, and a passport-sizephotograph.

Step 2: Entrance ExamSome of the programmes at the university have entrance examination of their own, referred to as CUEE. On the other hand, some of the university takes specific scores from national level exams like JEE Main, SAT, or even any other national level exam for entrance purpose. Candidates can choose between appearing in CUEE or submitting their scorecard for national level exam; however, this depends upon the rules followed by the program.

Step 3: Selection and CounsellingAfter the application and entrance exam (if applicable), candidates are shortlisted based on their scores. Those who are shortlisted will then be called for counseling, after which they can choose their program depending on merit and seat availability. To confirm their seat, candidates must accept the seat offered to them and pay the admission fee. After seat acceptance, original documents must be submitted for verification to complete the admission process.
For more information about Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar Campus Admission Process check out the below video:

faqs.answer: Being under a reserved category, you qualify for entry to the BTech programme at Centurion University with 45% in Class 12 based on the 5% relaxation in eligibility. However, for entry into BTech at the university, a valid score from the Centurion University Entrance Exam (CUEE) is also needed.

faqs.answer: Yes, the Centurion University Bhubaneswar admission portal is open. Students seeking admission to the 2025 batch can now apply for their preferred course. Moreover, to get a seat, students who satisfy the eligibility requirements can go to the official website of the university and submit an application form for the preferred course. Admissions are granted based on the CUEE.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for the BTech programme at Centurion University?
faqs.answer: A candidate must have completed class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics securing at least 50% marks. Relaxation of 5% is allowed for candidates belonging to reserved categories. In addition to the above requirements, a valid score in the Centurion University Entrance Exam, CUEE is also mandatory for admission to BTech programs offered by Centurion University.

paragraphs: As per the official website, the highest package offered during placements 2023 was INR 13.8 LPA .
