individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Mass Communication - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Gurugram University review.

content.Placements: Approximately 80 percent of students were placed in our course. The highest package offered in our course was 12 LPA. The average package was around 5–6 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Times Network, Today Network, TV9, etc. Top roles offered in our course were news anchor, Actress, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. Wi-Fi facility, modern classrooms, and a library were also available. The quality of the hostel was also good. Mess and canteen food was also good in taste. Sports and games complex was available in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (B.PT.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: You can take admission in it.

content.Placements: The placement record for the Bachelor of Physiotherapy at this university is just average. The average package offered is 7 LPA, and the highest package is 12 LPA, with around 50% of the placements. 75% attendance is compulsory to appear in the placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the Gurugram University is very good. There are two campuses. One campus is located in Sector 51, Gurugram, and the other campus is located in Sector 87, Gurugram. The labs are very well maintained. And the library is well stocked.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (B.PT.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is above average but not very good.

content.Placements: The placements for physiotherapy in this university are just average because last year, around 40% students only got placements. The highest package offered is 9 LPA, and the average package offered is 3-5 LPA. To appear in the placement cell, students must have a 5 CGPA at least and 75% attendance.
content.Infrastructure: The college has great infrastructure, it is under construction right now. The college has 2 campuses, one in Sector 51, Gurugram and the other in Sector 87, Manesar. There is no hostel right now, but in the next few years, they will provide a hostel and many facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (B.PT.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The university is above average.

content.Placements: The placements offered are just average, there is no such good placement. On average, 50 percent of students get placement with a decent package. The highest package offered is 15 LPA, and the average package offered is 6 LPA, which is quite good. To appear in the placement cell, students must have 75 percent attendance.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is just wow in the next 4-5 years because there are two campuses. The old campus is in Sector 51 Gurugram, and the new campus is in Sector 87. The BPT course is in the new campus. The new campus is under construction, and the hostel is also under construction.

admission_overview.title: Gurugram University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Gurugram University admissions are offered based on both academic merit and entrance score depending on the programme. The university offers UG, PG, and diploma programmes. These courses are offered in the fields of Engineering, Pharmacy and healthcare, Humanities, Management, Science, Arts, etc. Further, the university also offers PhD courses in Pharmacy, Law, Management, Psychology, etc. The admission process for Gurugram University commences online. Students have to go through the HSTES counselling for seat allotment to most of the courses. The university accepts vali scores in exams, such as JEE Mains, CUET, and more. Interested students can go through the following sections to learn about the admission process and eligibility for Gurugram University.

eligibility_selection.title: Gurugram University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Gurugram University course admission is subject to fulfilment of the course-specific admission criteria. The university offers courses in full-time mode. Itt conducts an internal entrance exam for admission to PhD programmes. However, candidates with UGC NET / CSIR NET scores are exempted from the internal entrance exam. The general eligibility for Gurugram University admission is as below:

paragraphs: Gurgugram University admission processstarts with an eligibility check. Eligible students can then apply online and go through the selection process and admission confirmation. The university accepts students through entrance/ merit + counselling basis. Eligible students can follow the steps below to complete the admission atGurgugram University:
Application Process 2025

Interested students can go to theGurugram University Samarth portaland fill the application form with all the required details. A non-refundable amount of INR 1000 for the General Category and INR 250 for the Scheduled Caste is to be paid when finally submitting the form.
Selection Process 2026

After submitting the application form candidates will be summoned for the department-wise entrance exams. The applicants are scrutinised based on their performance in the entrance exam/ past academic performance. The university shortlists students based on either academic merit or entrance performance. Seats are offered through the HSTES counselling.
Admission Confirmation
Selected students have to report for verification of documents and pay theGurugram University admission feesto complete the admission process.

TheGurugram University fee structureincludes components, such as tuition fees, library fees, lab fees, exam fees, and more. Students have to pay some of these components only once at the time of admission. The rest are to be paid either annually or semester-wise as per the guidelines. Students can pay the fees through Credit Card/ Debit Card/ UPI/ Net Banking, etc. See below the table to know about theGurugram University feesfor some of the popular programmes:
Note: This information is taken from official sources and can change.

Gurugram University offers a limited seats for its courses. The intake is different for each programme and specialisation. placement_data.title: Gurugram University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Placement cell Gurugram University tries to develop student's careers. They give students imp skills, guidance, & connections to successfully navigate the ever-changing professional environment. Their mission focuses on closing the divide btw education & industry, making certain that every student graduates as a self-assured, industry-prepared professional. During the 2025 Gurugram University placement drive over 1500 paid internships were provided to students.

Candidates interested in taking admission at Gurugram University can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 253896 and 424648 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. outlook.description:
Gurugram University has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Law (Government)' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for Gurugram University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Law (Government)' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, Gurugram University's rank is #12, the same as last year's rank in the 'Law (Government)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_text: In my college, a hostel is available but temporarily, and it is not in use for some reason. My college provides Wi-Fi facility for all students with a smart board in all classrooms. My college has a library with lots of books. There are 2 canteens. Labs are provided with all equipment. For medical facilities, 1 medical room is available. There is a large campus for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Gurugram University review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. Wi-Fi facility, modern classrooms, and a library were also available. The quality of the hostel was also good. Mess and canteen food was also good in taste. Sports and games complex was available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the Gurugram University is very good. There are two campuses. One campus is located in Sector 51, Gurugram, and the other campus is located in Sector 87, Gurugram. The labs are very well maintained. And the library is well stocked.

reviews.review_heading: The college is above average but not very good.
reviews.review_text: The college has great infrastructure, it is under construction right now. The college has 2 campuses, one in Sector 51, Gurugram and the other in Sector 87, Manesar. There is no hostel right now, but in the next few years, they will provide a hostel and many facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The university is above average.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is just wow in the next 4-5 years because there are two campuses. The old campus is in Sector 51 Gurugram, and the new campus is in Sector 87. The BPT course is in the new campus. The new campus is under construction, and the hostel is also under construction.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good, and there are two campuses of Gurugram University, one campus is in Sector 51, Gurugram and the second campus is in Sector 87, Manesar. The new campus is under construction. The physiotherapy department is in the new campus. The library is well-maintained. Labs are very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government College Sector-9, GurgaonReviewed on 19 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Budget-friendly with good teachers and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: For being a government college, here the infrastructure is good and provided courses are nice. There are so many courses available so you don't have to feel sorry for what you want to learn. In our college, we have canteen and library. We have Wi-Fi support in every corner of the college so it is a good thing. The library is also good.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in Gurugram University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Gurugram University is above average. There is a separate building for the department of physiotherapy, which is under construction. Once the construction is complete, the department will shift to that building. The library is excellent and well-stocked.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in this.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is under construction. The new buildings are very excellent. There are two campuses here in Gurugram. The old campus is located in Sector 51 in Gurugram. The new campuses are located in Sector 87 in Gurugram (near Kankrola village).

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is under construction, but I can say that once the construction is complete, its is the best university offering Bachelor of physiotherapy in Haryana. The building is extremely good with full AC. The labs are very good. All things are good, and the old is also good.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admissions, and you can study well to achieve your success.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Gurugram University Sector 87 is under construction. There are no proper classes, and hostel facilities are not available. There is no proper facility for the students to live in the PG. There is no library. Campus is under construction.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in it, but there are some good choices.
reviews.review_text: Gurugram University has two campuses. One campus is new, which is located in Sector 51, Gurugram, and the new campus is in Sector 87, which is under construction. Some of the courses are in the new campus, and some are in the old campus. Once a new campus is complete, all courses will come to the new campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government College Sector-9, GurgaonReviewed on 3 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty, extracurricular activities, and good placement in 2025.
reviews.review_text: There is a great facility in our college. Wi-Fi is also available for students in our college, and a great variety of foods are available in our canteen. The quality of food is also average, but after all, college is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government College Sector-9, GurgaonReviewed on 23 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am happy because of good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are available, and the infrastructure of my department is good, but not well-maintained. Wi-Fi is available in labs. Classrooms are spacious, but some are also dark and small. The quality of water is good in some water machines. Canteen food is acceptable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government College Sector-9, GurgaonReviewed on 23 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The most useless government college.
reviews.review_text: There is infrastructure in the college, but there is no Wi-Fi, the condition of the classrooms is not good, and many essential items in the labs are missing. The library is also very small and does not have relevant books, and the librarian is also not available in the library to issue books.

paragraphs: The fee for MBA in Gurugram University is around INR 66,00- INR 1.8 lakh. Other than the tuition fee, students have to pay other one-time charges like University Development, lab fee, field work, etc. . However, this fee is sourced from unofficial sources. Hence, is indicative. In order to check out the latest and exact fee break-up students are advised to visit the official website or reach out to the admission office for details.

Yes, there are scholarships for the Scheduled Caste Category students at Gurugram University. The university offers Post Matric Scholarship Scheme of GOI for welfare of candidates belonging to the Scheduled Caste Category. As per letter No.3/44-2012 Sch. (2) dated 18.06.2013 of the Director General Higher Education, Haryana, Panchkula, students, whose parents/guardian income is upto INR 2.50 Lacs per annum, are eligible for the scholarship.

The scholarshisp offers students include enrollment/registration, tuition, games, union, library, magazine, Medical Examination and such other fees compulsorily payable by the student to the institution or University/Board. Refundable deposit like caution money, security deposit are, however, excluded. For students admitted under this scheme, the application form has to be submitted by the students to the concerned Chairperson/Director of the Department/ Institute.

Gurugram University extends a range of scholarships that include fee waivers and concessions for meritorious and needy students. Scholarships at Gurugram University are on the university page and can be downloaded and printed as an application form which lists the types of scholarships and their requirements.

The BCom fee at Gurugram University ranges from INR 1.44 Lacs to INR 1.8 Lakh. The BCom fee includes one-time charges like University Development, lab fees, fieldwork, etc. Final admission to the BTech cousre is confirmed once the admission fee is paid within the stipulated period. To check out the latest and exact fee break-up students are advised to visit the official website or reach out to the admission office for details. *This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

college_info.college_name: AKTU: Courses, Fees, Admission 2026, Placements, Ranking, Scholarships

highlights.summary: Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University admissions 2026 are currenlty open for various courses. A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University are BTech and MBA. The college offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Further, the college offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively, with a comprehensive curriculum.
The most sought after BTech specialisations include Computer Science, Computational Science, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Engineering, and Information Technology. BTech graduates from AKTU are placed in top companies like TCS, HCL Tech, Infosys, Accenture, Wipro, etc.
AKTU courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the Dr APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University popular programmes in the table provided below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students get substantial industry exposure
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Organized & proactive placement process
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    The placement statistics for AKTU are not available on the official website for the year 2023. However, as per the media report,  13 BTech students were placed during the placement drive 2022. A total of seven students were placed with a salary package of INR 4.90 LPA from BTech Computer Science and IT branch. faqs.question: How many offers were made during AKTU placement drive?

faqs.answer: A:    A total of 50 companies visited the campus AKTU placement 2024 for IET (Institute of Engineering & Technology). Companies such as Sprinklr, Microsoft and Google offered highest package of 53 LPA, 52 LPA and 49.5 LPA.

The university has maintained a 90% placement record, offering salary packages ranging from Rs 1 Lacs per annum to as high as Rs 20 Lacs per annum. For the year 2022, the AKTU the hi

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Abdul Kalam Technical University Lucknow offers a plethora of programmes at UG, PG, diploma, and doctoral levels. AKTU courses are offered across numerous domains which incude Management, Engineering, Arts, Commerce, Medical Sciences, Science, Law, and so on. The popular UG courses that the university offers include BTech, BPharm, BCA, BBA, BVoc, BCom, BArch, etc to students while at the PG level, MBA, MCA, MTech, MPharm, MCom, MSc, MArch, and many more courses are offered.

faqs.answer: A:    The AKTU fees for various courses is cumulative of several fee components. These components are tuition fees, hostel fees, one-time fees, etc. The fee components and amount vary across the colleges affiliated with AKTU. Across all the AKTU-affiliated colleges offering a BPharma, the total fee ranged between INR 1.3 Lacs and INR 5.4 lakh. The mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the university/affiliated colleges. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the total fee for B.Pharma at AKTU?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for MCA courses at AKTU ranges from INR 59,000-INR 3.5 lakh. Candidates also have to pay tutition fee and hostel fee. Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: What is the fee for MCA at AKTU?

faqs.answer: A:    AKTU releases cutoff through its affiliated colleges. At 15000 score, it is possible to get admission to a few colleges including R. D. Engineering College Technical Campus, for which the last round closing score was 16842 for the General AI category candidates. Other best college at this score could be Shri Ramswaroop Memorial College of Engineering and Management, with last round closing score of 16384. Technical Education and Research Institute (TERI, Ghazipur) could also be considered which had the last round closing score of 15844.
faqs.question: Can I get into AKTU with 17000 percentile?

faqs.answer: A:    AKTU CUET PG cutoff 2024 was the deciding criteria for admission to the MCA course. The cutoff was released through affiliated colleges of the university. The last round closing ranks for various affiliated colleges varied between 435 and 17104. The college with the toughest cutoff was Fort Institute of Technology. Meanwhile, the college with the most lenient cutoff was Axis Colleges. In 2025, the cutoff range for the General AI category could be between 400 and 18000 for various affiliated colleges.

reviews_list.review_title: Overview of MIT Moradabad.

review_content.Placements: Around 30–40 percent of students are placed in the Computer Science and Engineering branch. Placement is better in other branches like civil, mechanical, etc., which is better due to the lower number of students. The highest package is around 20 LPA, the average is 5–6 LPA, and 2 LPA is the minimum. TCS, Infosys, and Wipro are some of the top hiring companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Various bare minimum facilities are available, like Wi-Fi, labs, library, etc. Classrooms have AC and well-ventilated windows. Hostel rooms are average and three-sitter. Mess food is average most of the time. The hygiene of the hostel’s mess is quite disappointing.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence (AI) And Data Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: G.L. Bajaj College is the best in academics.

review_content.Placements: My college is very good in terms of placements. The average package is up to 6 LPA - 7 LPA. The highest package was 47 LPA in the previous year. We can easily see the placement cell. They are always distrustful as companies started to come for overall placements. We get to know that the placement cell helps you a lot to get a job according to your talents and skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are good facilities for sports. The hostel is nice for first-year students. The canteen is good to serve variety of food. Sports are good in college. There are various types of sports like football and cricket. There is a good library in college to learn various kinds of departments. In-campus hostel facilities are also nice. Food quality is not comparable to home food, but still edible and better than other colleges in the locality.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees of BTech in AKTU?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BTech in AKTU ranges between INR 35,600 and INR 12.5 Lacs as per an unofficial source. Since the fee is a sum of tuition fee, it excludes other component of fee structure like exam fee, hostel fee, etc. The above fee is the range of fee for all affiliated colleges. Candidates must check the BTech fee separately for the college they wish to apply for admission. Shortlisted aspirants are required to pay fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat. Candidates need to submit the fee within the stipulated time to avoid rejection.

overview_faqs.question: Is DPharm available at AKTU?
overview_faqs.answer: AKTU offers a full-time DPharm through City Group of College, which is a college affiliated to AKTU. The college offers a two-year Diploma in Pharmacy for candidates who have passed Class 12 in the stream of Science. Admission to the programme is granted based on the applicants' merit in Class 12, subject to fulfiment of the eligibility criteria and availability of seats. The DPharm fee at City Group of College is INR 5.2 lakh. The mentioned fee is sourced from official sources but is still subject to change.

overview_faqs.question: Does AKTU come under CUET?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, AKTU is one of the participating universities of CUET-UG and CUET-PG. Candidates wishing to apply for AKTU CUET courses, must register first at the official website of CUET. Admission to below-mentioned courses is through CUET-UG or CUET-PG:BTechBPharmMBAMCABVoc. BFABDes, etc.

review_summary.college_name: AKTU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, a good value for money campus I would say.

content.Placements: Almost 55 percent of the students are placed in our course and the lowest package is 3.5 LPA while the highest package is 7 LPA. 45 percent of the students get internships in various companies like Biocon, IVRI, Bharat Biotech, etc. I'm not sure about the top roles offered but some are recruited for HR and data management.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good. The campus is full lush green with good classrooms and CCTV cameras almost in every class. The mess is somewhat okay, but the canteen is large with good quality items offered at affordable prices. A huge ground and sports equipment are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because, according to my JEE Main marks, I am eligible for a better college.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies are VISA, Paytm, Wipro, Primathon, Capgemini, Kickdrum, Razorpay, etc. About 65 percent of students are placed from Computer Science and Technology. College placement is good according to past batches, let’s check for our batch in future.
content.Infrastructure: For our course CSE, college infrastructure is not that much good. Our classes are old and AC is not there yet, but they assure us to put AC next year. I do not live in the hostel, but according to my friends, hostel fees for 1 year is about 130,000, which is too high.

individual_reviews.title: Overview of MIT Moradabad.

content.Placements: Around 30–40 percent of students are placed in the Computer Science and Engineering branch. Placement is better in other branches like civil, mechanical, etc., which is better due to the lower number of students. The highest package is around 20 LPA, the average is 5–6 LPA, and 2 LPA is the minimum. TCS, Infosys, and Wipro are some of the top hiring companies.
content.Infrastructure: Various bare minimum facilities are available, like Wi-Fi, labs, library, etc. Classrooms have AC and well-ventilated windows. Hostel rooms are average and three-sitter. Mess food is average most of the time. The hygiene of the hostel’s mess is quite disappointing.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence (AI) And Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: G.L. Bajaj College is the best in academics.

content.Placements: My college is very good in terms of placements. The average package is up to 6 LPA - 7 LPA. The highest package was 47 LPA in the previous year. We can easily see the placement cell. They are always distrustful as companies started to come for overall placements. We get to know that the placement cell helps you a lot to get a job according to your talents and skills.
content.Infrastructure: There are good facilities for sports. The hostel is nice for first-year students. The canteen is good to serve variety of food. Sports are good in college. There are various types of sports like football and cricket. There is a good library in college to learn various kinds of departments. In-campus hostel facilities are also nice. Food quality is not comparable to home food, but still edible and better than other colleges in the locality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence (AI) And Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college provides the best placement.

content.Placements: 57 LPA is the highest package offered here, and the average package offered is 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini, Autodesk, and many others. This college creates lots of good software engineers. This year's competition is very tough because the number of students being accepted is too high. We have to work very hard during our placement year. Also, all my batchmates have good minds. 70-80 percent student got placed in my college.
content.Infrastructure: My college provides a simple and decent campus that lacks the amenities of a more modern facility. However, the good placement opportunities at GL Bajaj more than make up for it. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, but classrooms are not air-conditioned. GL Bajaj excels in sports, with its football and kabaddi teams consistently winning zonal competitions.

courses_data.name: AKTU BTech Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:Uni-GAUGE, UPTAC, JEE Main, CUET, NTA, UPCAT, CBSE 12th, ISC, UP 12th, CUET-PG
cutoff_tables: B.Tech. in Carpet and Textile Technology
B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering
B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering
B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering
courses_data.description: BTech is a four-year flagship course each comprising two semesters. Each semester shall have teaching for 90 working days as prescribed by AICTE from time to time. AKTU offers BTech at campus in five specialisations through Institute of Engineering and Technology. AKTU also offers BTech in 41 specialisations through affiliated colleges. Candidates unable to get admission in the AKTU BTech programme can also opt for online courses.Online BTechcourses allow students to complete their degree along with their work. Aspirants with score less than the ones required for full-time admission can also go for online course.

faqs.question: Does AKTU accept CUET for BTech?
faqs.answer: Yes, AKTU accepts CUET score for BTech. AKTU admission to BTech through CUET is for two specialisations:AgricultureBiotechnologyApart from these, CUET score is accepted for direct entry to the second-year of BTech course. Candidates can apply for CUET for BTech (LE) admission.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BTech in AKTU?
faqs.answer: Students are selected based on entrance exam scores for the BTech course admission at AKTU. Check the detailed steps below:1:Aspirants should check the official website of AKTU affiliated college for admission.2:Candidates should have qualified JEE Main, CUET, KEAM or IPU CET for admission to BTech course.3:The counselling process of shortlisted candidates will be managed and regulated by AKTU based on which the candidates will be allotted seats.

faqs.question: Can I get into AKTU with 72% in class 12?
faqs.answer: The colleges affiliated to AKTU accepts IPUCET exam for admission to UG and PG courses. The basic criteria to get into AKTU through IPUCET exam is to have a minimum aggregate of50% marks in class 12and for PG courses, the minimum aggregate50% marks in Bachelor's Degree. So, if you are securing a percentile of72in class 12th, it is more than enough to appear for IPUCET to get into AKTU.

faqs.question: I have scored less than 60% in Class 12. Can I get admission for B.Tech in AKTU?
faqs.answer: AKTU BTech admission is entrance-based and done based on JEE Mains and UPTAC. The minimum percentage required in Class 12 to apply for the course ranges between 45% and 75%. Hence, 60% is a safe score in most cases, as long as you also clear the selection criteria. In case a candidate does not score enough, or wants to consider other options forBTech admissions, they can always opt for other colleges offeringonline BTech courses.

placement_report.college_name: AKTU Placements 2025: Average Package, Highest Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: AKTU Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to AKTU IET ( Institute of Engineering and Technology ) Brochure 2025, the highest package offered in 2024 was INR 53 LPA . The highest package offered Off-campus that year was I NR 1.2 Crore per annum . The overall average package offered during AKTU placement 2024 for IET was 8.2 LPA . Top recruiters such as Sprinklr, Microsoft and Google visited the campus during the placement drive 2024.

During the AKTU placements 2024, 13,898 students were placed in diverse sectors. In addition, the AKTU average package recorded for the 2024 passing-out batch was INR 4 LPA. Over 6,000 job opportunities were made to the 2024 batch students. More than 150 plus campus drives of different companies were organised including on-campus and off-campus.
For more information about AKTU check out the below video:

tables.context: Is Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University worth
What is the placement scenario for BTech at AKTU?

faqs.question: Is Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University worth it?
faqs.answer: The worth of the University is determined by the placements offered at the end of course completion. The University has released the annual report 2023-24 which includes the 2024 placement data. Check the complete insights of AKTU placements 2024 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) Students placements 13,898 Total job opportunities 6,000+ No. of campus drives 150+

faqs.question: How many offers were made during AKTU placement drive?
faqs.answer: More than 6,000 job opportunities were made in technical and non-technical streams during the 2024 placements. For the Institute of Engineering and Technology, 10 international offers and 44 PPOs were made in 2024.

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario for BTech at AKTU?
faqs.answer: The placement statistics for AKTU are not available on the official website for the year 2023. However, as per the media report, 13 BTech students were placed during the placement drive 2022. A total of seven students were placed with a salary package of INR 4.90 LPA from BTech Computer Science and IT branch. The table below showcases the salary package offered and the number of students placed (BTech) recorded during the placement drive 2022: Profile Offered No. of students selected Salary Package Offered Project Manager 4 INR 3 LPA Associate Trainee 2 INR 3 LPA NA 7 INT 4.90 LPA Note: The placement data mentioned in the table above is gathered from media report. Hence, the stats may vary further.

faqs.question: What are the placements for AKTU MBA?
faqs.answer: As per media reports, 1,531 students were selected in TCS. A total of 318 students were placed with a package of INR 7.60 LPA in TCS Digital and rest 1,213 students were placed with a package of INR 3.60 LPA in TCS Ninja during AKTU placement 2025. Furthermore, a campus placement drive was organized by an Ed-Tech company on behalf of T&P cell. In this placement drive, MBA and BTech students from affiliated colleges has taken part. According to media report, a total of 12 students have been selected for the post of Sales Executive with CTC of INR 4.12 LPA.

faqs.question: Which companies are the top recruiters during AKTU placement drive?
faqs.answer: A total of 50 companies visited the campus AKTU placement 2024 for IET (Institute of Engineering & Technology). Companies such as Sprinklr, Microsoft and Google offered highest package of 53 LPA, 52 LPA and 49.5 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the average placement package offered at AKTU?
faqs.answer: As per the IET placement report 2024, the average package recorded in 2024 was 8.2 LPA. At overall University level (basis annual report), the average package was 4 LPA in 2024.

faqs.question: What is the fees of BTech in AKTU?
faqs.answer: The fee structure for BTech at AKTU can differ between government and self-financed colleges affiliated with AKTU. Government colleges typically have lower tuition fees as we compar that to self-financed institutions. In some cases, chosen BTech specialisation (for eg, Computer Science Engineering might cost more than Civil Engineering) can influence the fee structure. However, the total course fee for a BTech programme at AKTU can range anywhere between INR 35,600 and INR 12.5 lakh.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MCA at AKTU?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MCA courses at AKTU ranges from INR 59,000-INR 3.5 lakh. Candidates also have to pay tutition fee and hostel fee. Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

description: AKTU cutoff 2025 will be available soon. The university accepts the JEE Main entrance exam score for BTech admission, followed by the UPTAC Counselling process. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for different categories. Aspirants preparing for admission can check out the exam-wise sections below to view the AKTU cutoff for different courses and categories. For the AKTU cutoff 2025, stay tuned to this page. Further updates are below:

AKTU cutoff for the several BTech specialisations is based on JEE Main scores followed by the JEE Main Counselling. The JEE Main Counselling 2024 has been concluded after the release of the Round 8 Seat Allotment for AKTU JEE Mains cutoff. The University offers admission to BTech courses through the affiliated colleges. Of all the courses, BTech in Computer Science Engineering has emerged as the most competitive course to be offered at the affiliated colleges including Institute of Engineering a

AKTU accepts JEE Main scores for admission to the BTech course. As per the AKTU BTech Cutoff 2024, the last round closing rank for BTech Computer Science Engineering stood at 30752.6 for Institute of Engineering and Technology (IET), Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University after Round 8 Seat Allotment result. In 2023, the closing rank for BTech CSE at IET was 51075 and in 2022, it was 23127. On analysing the past year trends, it can be concluded that AKTU has witnessed a fluctuating trend fo
Some of the important dates related to AKTU BTech cutoff 2025 are given below:
Candidates can refer to the table given below to download the consolidated year-wise cutoff list for the General category students for AKTU admission to BTech:

AKTU offers admission to various PG courses including MBA and MCA based on CUET PG scores followed by round-wise counselling. The university offers these courses through affiliated colleges. The university releases the merit lists for candidates who qualify for the cutoff. As per the AKTU cutoff 2024, the Round 1 closing score for MCA offered at Fort Institute of Technology is 17104, which is the highest score of top PG colleges for the General category students belonging to All India Quota. Can

AKTU accepts CUET PG scores for admission to postgraduate courses including MBA, MCA and MSc. According to AKTU cutoff 2024, the closing ranks for MCA is 17104 for Fort Institute of Technology, 16842 for R. D. Engineering College Technical Campus, 15844 for Technical Education and Research Institute (TERI, Ghazipur), 13732 for Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology (NIET), and 435 for Axis Colleges. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the CUET PG c

Abdul Kalam Technical University after Round 4 Seat Allotment result. In 2022, the closing rank for BTech CSE at IET was 23127 and in 2021, it was 35236. As per AKTU cutoff 2024, the last round closing ranks for BTech in CSE stood at 151726, whereas in 2023 it was 102880 and in 2022 at 93841 for the General category All India candidates. reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Khandelwal College of Management Science and Technology (KCMT)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good value for money campus I would say.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. The campus is full lush green with good classrooms and CCTV cameras almost in every class. The mess is somewhat okay, but the canteen is large with good quality items offered at affordable prices. A huge ground and sports equipment are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by G.L. Bajaj Institute of Technology and ManagementReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because, according to my JEE Main marks, I am eligible for a better college.
reviews.review_text: For our course CSE, college infrastructure is not that much good. Our classes are old and AC is not there yet, but they assure us to put AC next year. I do not live in the hostel, but according to my friends, hostel fees for 1 year is about 130,000, which is too high.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by MIT Group of Institutions, MoradabadReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Overview of MIT Moradabad.
reviews.review_text: Various bare minimum facilities are available, like Wi-Fi, labs, library, etc. Classrooms have AC and well-ventilated windows. Hostel rooms are average and three-sitter. Mess food is average most of the time. The hygiene of the hostel’s mess is quite disappointing.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by G.L. Bajaj Institute of Technology and ManagementReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: G.L. Bajaj College is the best in academics.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities for sports. The hostel is nice for first-year students. The canteen is good to serve variety of food. Sports are good in college. There are various types of sports like football and cricket. There is a good library in college to learn various kinds of departments. In-campus hostel facilities are also nice. Food quality is not comparable to home food, but still edible and better than other colleges in the locality.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by G.L. Bajaj Institute of Technology and ManagementReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college provides the best placement.
reviews.review_text: My college provides a simple and decent campus that lacks the amenities of a more modern facility. However, the good placement opportunities at GL Bajaj more than make up for it. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, but classrooms are not air-conditioned. GL Bajaj excels in sports, with its football and kabaddi teams consistently winning zonal competitions.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by United Group of Institutions - UGI AllahabadReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the infrastructure, but this satisfied due to AKTU exams and there frauds.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is so good, but the hostel mess is really a mess. It's better take a room in Ada side and live there. Please don't opt hostel is worse. The quality is so bad. Every year zonal is sponsored and chooses students went to the state.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Shri Ramswaroop Memorial College of Engineering and ManagementReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I just wanna state I've made my future unclear after getting into this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is all over average, and the curriculum is just okay. The quality of faculty in the college is just normal, and not so high-class teachers are present for the classes to be taken. Most of the faculty here have passed through here only. They are just the least concerned.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Goel Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college placement section must be improved for students.
reviews.review_text: As a student of the Goel Institute, Lucknow, I would like to suggest that the facilities and infrastructure available in my course, B.Com (Hons), are very good, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, etc. The quality of the facilities in my hostel, like the mess food, is edible and scheduled.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by GNIT College of PharmacyReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: An okayish college with basic exposure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okayish, well occupied, and functioning labs are present. The Ayurvedic lab is also there. Classrooms are comfortable and good enough to study, college have a library with an average collection of books. The college canteen isn't upto the mark, except a basic infrastructure.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Khandelwal College of Management Science and Technology (KCMT)
reviews.review_heading: It is good, especially value for money, and a good environment as well.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, the college is a full, lush green campus, and the college classrooms are not the best, but satisfactory. Wi-Fi is okayish, but having good labs and research, and a well-stocked library. Medical facilities are good for the students who suffer from any kind of problem or issue.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Janhit Institute of Education & InformationReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Janhit Institute of Education & Information.
reviews.review_text: It is not so good and not so bad, but moderate for students who just have to do a degree without getting involved in any other academic activities. There is a library section in the college and a computer lab too. There are no medical facilities in the college. There is a small canteen. There are no sports and games areas, as it is just a college for those who just want a degree.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by ABES Institute of Technology (ABESIT)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this course is good for students. Our college offers many facilities, such as an all-time Wi-Fi facility and fully air-conditioned classrooms. The library is very big and provides a calm environment. Many hostels are available in this college for students where they live with love.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater NoidaReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: All over, good college, good infrastructure and good campus life.
reviews.review_text: There is a hostel facility. 24/7 Wi-Fi is available. A gym is available. The quality of food is not very good because it is not nutritious. The canteen meal is overall good, but the prices of canteen food are high, not too high but still high. Sports activities include cricket, badminton, volleyball, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Goel Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college placement section must be improved.
reviews.review_text: As a student of Shri Ram College of Commerce, I would like to suggest that the facilities and infrastructure available in my course, B.Com (Hons), are very good, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, etc. The quality of the facilities in my hostel, like the mess food, is edible and scheduled.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Lloyd Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Reviewing the general idea of the college.
reviews.review_text: The classes are good for the students. I didn't have any problems with that, but the AC doesn't work sometimes, so take it for what you will. There is no Wi-Fi for students. You have to use data, and it doesn't get a signal half the time. The labs are good.

data.description: AKTU Lucknow has a well educated faculty, and they possess higher degrees from famous universities. The university also invites guest speakers from other universities/institutes.

paragraphs: AKTU provide scholarships to meritorious students who belong to SC/ ST/ OBC category under the regulations of the UP State Scholarship scheme. Every year, UP state releases the notification for fee reimbursement for the students of AKTU and its affiliated colleges. Students studying in AKTU can register themselves for fee-waiver scholarship schemes through the "Scholarship & Fee Reimbursement Online System of UP State". New students can register online for UPTU Scholarship by visiting the official portal designed for fee reimbursement procedures.

college_info.intro: Christ College Bangalore is famous for its MBA, BTech, and other courses. The students of these Christ University Bangalore courses are placed in big companies like Sandisk, McKinsey & Co, Vedanta & Engagely AI. Christ University Bangalore Central Campus gives MBA programme in collaboration with Technical University, Würzburg-Schweinfurt (THWS), Germany and other universities. The university has set up curriculum that is suitable for the current business environment. The university has even been ranked by the NIRF 2025 at the 57th position under the Management category. The highest salary secured by the students in 2025 stood at INR 32 LPA, whereas the average salary offered was INR 7 LPA. Below mentioned are some of the Christ University popular courses & their eligibility & Christ University Bangalore MBA Fees:

placements.overview: The modes of Christ College, Bangalore course admissions are online and offline. Admission criteria for Christ University Bangalore is merit & entrance exam scores. Candidates must take part in the Christ University Bangalore application process before the last date of application. Students must prepare well for the Christuniversity Bangalore accepted entrance exam. The accepted entrance exams for admission to the Christ University Bangalore UG and PG courses are CAT, XAT, CMAT, Karnataka PGCET, ATMA, MAT, GMAT, GRE, and others. Candidates who wish to get Christ Bangalore admission must first visit the official website of the university which is https://christuniversity.in/. Select the course and pay the application fee. Enter all the details in the application form with the required info. Submit the application form. review_summary.college_name: Christ University Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc (Hons) in Psychology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Christ University is a good college with good academic and extracurricular exposure.

content.Placements: Mandatory internships and service learning courses are incorporated in the course to enable networking. Since internships have to be pursued from the 1st year, students have a higher probability of getting placed. The institution also encourages students to do courses and participate in extracurricular activities.
content.Infrastructure: Canteen has a variety of options such as Domino’s, Express Coffee, etc. There are other outlets, such as Subway and Leon’s, in the college vicinity. Infrastructure is ample and well-maintained. It includes private study rooms, a 2000-seater auditorium, an amphitheatre, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) (Hons) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and relevant courses.

content.Placements: The placement percentage ratio at Christ University Yeshwanthpur campus is quite satisfactory, and varies according to different programs and specialisations but to give it a number, around 70-90% of students get placed. The highest package goes up to 33 LPA, and often ranges between 15 LPA - 30 LPA. While an internship is an integral part of the university, all students have to actively take up internships. Top recruiters for Yeshwanthpur campus are Deloitte, DE Shaw and Co, Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: This campus is one of the youngest campuses amongst all Christ campuses, a lot of care and thought has been put into the infrastructure. It has been well-paced with modern technologies. There is proper space for sports, a well-equipped, and established auditorium.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Sep 2024)- B.Com (Hons) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Not worth the hustle for a degree.

content.Placements: Around 87% of the students get the placements. There are students who secure more CGPA scores therefore companies that offer great LPA packages. Very few students with good portfolios get through the interviews with good packages and hard work matters.
content.Infrastructure: There are Wi-Fi jammers, classrooms are clean, and library is pretty much spacious. The food can be disgusting as it has no taste, sports but medical facilities are very generous. Hostels and washrooms are clean. It has been 4 years since it's built.

individual_reviews.course: MBA (Business Analytics) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is the best university for MBA course.

content.Placements: MBA courses are well represented in recruitment here. Every year, approximately 30–35 companies visit the college to recruit students. Top hiring firms include Mahindra & Mahindra, IndusInd Bank, and Bank of Baroda. The package offered is 23 LPA–36 LPA. Our batch placement was excellent with several students employed in reputable companies. Top positions available include investment banker, HR manager, and others.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is clean, and the atmosphere at the university is always positive. The buildings are well-maintained and there are gardens and parks where people can socialize. The university cafeteria serves delicious meals. The campus is situated on the outskirts of the city making it pollution-free and healthy.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall best University for M. Com. course.

content.Placements: Almost all of the students were placed in reputable companies. The highest salary offered is 25 LPA, while the lowest is 5 LPA. Top recruiters include Byju’s, Jaro Education, and Planet Spark. The training and placement officer is quite helpful, and securing internships and jobs is simple. Higher-level roles include tax advisory, financial analyst, and others.
content.Infrastructure: Our university infrastructure is extremely good. There are restaurants on both ends of the campus. The university offers a bus service that stops at the campus. The campus also contains a library, a gym, a parking lot, and Wi-Fi is available on both ends of the campus and throughout the surrounding areas.

admission_overview.title: Christ University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Christ University admissions are based on entrance exam scores of the candidates. The university conducts a Common University Entrance Test or CUET to shortlist candidates for admission to various UG and PG programmes. Aspirants have to also further pass the interview round conducted by Christ University. Besides, the university also accepts scores in national-level entrance exams for admission. The university offers programmes at UG, PG, diploma and doctoral levels across various streams such as Science, Management, Arts, Commerce, etc. Aspirants have to fill out the Christ University application form online for the preferred programme.

paragraphs: Admissions are open currently at Christ Bangalore. Candidates must pass entrance test conducted by the university and personal interview for admission.Christ University admission processincludes application, selection rounds and document verification.
STEP 1: Christ Bangalore Application Process 2026

The application process for all programmes at Christ (Deemed-to-be University) is conducted online. Students can fill out theChrist University application form 2026on the official website. The application fee isINR 5,000for all programmes.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Candidates who have applied for any course at Christ University Bangalore must appear for the selection rounds. Christ Bangalore conducts Christ University Entrance Test for admission to courses such as BSc, BTech, BBA, BCom, etc. The university also accepts national-level entrance exams such as XAT, CAT,NATA, etc. for admission to specific courses.
STEP 3: Shortlist Release and Final Offer
Selected candidates receive an E-Offer of admission. The offer is valid up to date in the offer letter.
STEP 4: Document Verification & Fee Paymenet

Candidates must opt for a preferred date and time. However, the fee payment must be done online. Canddates are required to pay theChrist University feefor the first year. Students are also required to go through the document verification.

faqs.answer: Christ University offers an Executive MBA programme to students at the PG level. The fee for this programme is around INR 6.4 lakh. faqs.question: Who is eligible for Executive MBA at the Christ University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed a UG level examination with a minimum of 50% aggregate or equivalent grade in any degree from a recognised university can apply for Christ University Executive MBA programme. Aspirants must also have a minimum of two years of work experience to apply for EMBA.Aspirants with one-year of work experience can also apply with a valid composite score of 500 & above in MAT,  300 or above in GMAT/ GRE or 60 percentile or above in CMAT/ CAT/ XAT/ ATMA.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Christ University?
faqs.answer: Getting into Christ Bangalore depends completely on meeting the minimum eligibility criteria and performance of students in the selection rounds conducted by the University. placement_data.title: Christ University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Christ University has released the placement details for the Class of 2025. A total of 4065 students were placed during Christ University placements 2025, of which 2495 were from the UG programs and 1570 from the PG programs. The highest and the average package offered to the batch 2025 was I NR 32 LPA and INR 7 LPA . The students received job offers from various recruiting industries like Manufaturing, Engineering, Auditing Retail, Real Estate and Consulting, etc. Some of the top recruiters of Christ University in 2025 include DE Shaw, Deloitte, KPMG, PwC, Goldman Sachs, Accenture, EY, JP Morgan, Capgemini , etc.

nirf.description:
Christ University Bangalore has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Christ University Bangalore indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the prior years, it has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend. In 2024, Christ University Bangalore climbed 10 ranks to #90 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2024, Christ University Bangalore climbed 7 ranks to #60 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown an increasing trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, Christ University Bangalore climbed 8 ranks to #93 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
In the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2024, Christ University Bangalore's rank is #60, the same as last year's rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Across the years, it is observed that Christ University Bangalore is consistently recognised as a highly-ranked institute in different categories by Outlook 2024 among other institutes by excelling in key areas such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, and many more.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Science' category have demonstrated a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2024, Christ University Bangalore's rank is #8, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'BBA' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2024, Christ University Bangalore's rank is #5, the same as last year's rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Christ - Yeshwanthpur CampusReviewed on 5 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Christ University is a good college with good academic and extracurricular exposure.
reviews.review_text: Canteen has a variety of options such as Domino’s, Express Coffee, etc. There are other outlets, such as Subway and Leon’s, in the college vicinity. Infrastructure is ample and well-maintained. It includes private study rooms, a 2000-seater auditorium, an amphitheatre, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Christ - Yeshwanthpur CampusReviewed on 22 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and relevant courses.
reviews.review_text: This campus is one of the youngest campuses amongst all Christ campuses, a lot of care and thought has been put into the infrastructure. It has been well-paced with modern technologies. There is proper space for sports, a well-equipped, and established auditorium.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Christ - Yeshwanthpur CampusReviewed on 25 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Not worth the hustle for a degree.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi jammers, classrooms are clean, and library is pretty much spacious. The food can be disgusting as it has no taste, sports but medical facilities are very generous. Hostels and washrooms are clean. It has been 4 years since it's built.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university for MBA course.
reviews.review_text: The campus is clean, and the atmosphere at the university is always positive. The buildings are well-maintained and there are gardens and parks where people can socialize. The university cafeteria serves delicious meals. The campus is situated on the outskirts of the city making it pollution-free and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best University for M. Com. course.
reviews.review_text: Our university infrastructure is extremely good. There are restaurants on both ends of the campus. The university offers a bus service that stops at the campus. The campus also contains a library, a gym, a parking lot, and Wi-Fi is available on both ends of the campus and throughout the surrounding areas.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Christ - Lavasa, Pune CampusReviewed on 26 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It provides top-notch results in placements.
reviews.review_text: The overall crowd of the campus is too small, considering the strict regulations and policies, students are afraid of choosing the college. In case we have done anything against the college policies, direct punishments are provided before the conversations.

reviews.review_heading: Christ University, central campus.
reviews.review_text: The classroom is fully equipped with projectors, and the campus has its own library facilities, labs and Wi-Fi. We have a separate block allotted to sports and games, where there is a multitude of games that one can play and at the same time, great medical facilities in times of sickness or injuries. Lastly, there are multiple canteens across the campus offering a vast array of food choices, and the quality of food is very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Christ, Bannerghatta CampusReviewed on 20 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college, value for money, and secure future.
reviews.review_text: Everything is the best, from the infrastructure to the mess to the hostel. Everything is new and up to date. The food we get in the mess is completely hygienic and properly prepared. To be very honest, it is fresh. We get homely food here, and hostel facilities for boys are also provided.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Christ - Lavasa, Pune CampusReviewed on 19 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: All about Christ University, Pune, Lavasa.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is amazing, with many sports facilities like pickle ball, volleyball, cricket, and air hockey offered for us. Proper Wi-Fi facilities are available for all the students on the campus with proper credentials and IDs for accessing the Wi-Fi facility.

reviews.review_heading: Honestly, a brilliant atmosphere and a good college.
reviews.review_text: The college has all facilities required to sustain in your college life, all the way from proper infrastructure to Wi-Fi and all amenities. Wi-Fi might not work as the number of students in campus is too large to accommodate, but the student Wi-Fi and library etc. work well for classwork and assignments.

reviews.review_heading: The college life is so good, but the academics are hectic.
reviews.review_text: The university infrastructure is very good. It includes 4 different blocks and a Research and Development Block. The library is well-equipped. It has separate sections for both UG and PG students. The hostel is well maintained and provides good facilities. The university offers coaching for various games. It especially cricket, football, and Kho. Medical facilities are on campus for emergency cases.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by School of Law, Christ UniversityReviewed on 3 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Christ University - A place for your career.
reviews.review_text: Christ University Bangalore has a campus that is expanded across 100 acres. There is a lot of greenery in the whole campus and a lot of sports facilities, with canteens and eateries also available. If we talk about the academic infrastructure, we have a library that has more than 10000 books offline and online, and we have high-tech classrooms with a smart projector to make the classroom experience more technology-based and easier. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The college campus has two ho...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Christ - Kengeri CampusReviewed on 22 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This university is best in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this course is very good for the students. This university offers many opportunities like all-time Wi-Fi facilities for the students and faculty, and the classrooms of this college are fully air-conditioned. This college has a big library for the students. The hostel of this college is very big for the students, and the food in both the canteen and mess hall is very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Christ - Delhi NCR CampusReviewed on 18 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Strong infrastructure, good exposure, but mixed ROI.
reviews.review_text: The campus has multiple labs based on your program. It includes science labs, computer labs, language labs, media/performance labs, and engineering labs. There is a multi-disciplinary library with a good collection of books, journals, reference titles, and more. Hostels are managed either directly by the university or through affiliated service providers like EZYSTAYS.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with good placements and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with projectors and speakers, the campus has multiple panel rooms for meetings and discussions and offers multiple additional courses. Mess food is good and reasonably priced. The college has good facilities for sports.

data.description: Christ University Bangalore faculty are PhD, diploma, and degree holders. Eminent personalities such as Dalai Lama, Sudha Murty , and others are notable visitors to the campus. faqs.answer: A:    The data related to KLE University BPharma placements has not been released by the university. However, KLE University NIRF report 2024 is available. Based on the report, the median package offered during UG 4-year placements in 2023 was INR 3 LPA. A total of 116 UG students were placed during KLE University placements 2022. The median package offered to UG (4-year) students in 2022 was also INR 3 LPA. In 2021, it was INR 6.8 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the placement scenario for B.Pharma at KLE University?

faqs.answer: A:    According to the data at the University's official website, the highest package offered at KLE Technological University during 2021 placements stood at INR 11.4 LPA. The average package offered for UG courses was 6.8 LPA and 87 students were placed out of 297 students and for PG courses the average package was 11.6 LPA and the number of students placed was 124 out of 223.
faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at KLE University?

faqs.answer: A:    KLE Technological University provided many great opportunities to the students for placement in the recent years. Many companies visited the university and recruited a large amount of students in the year 2021. The list of the top recruiters of KLE Technological  University in the year 2021 is presented below: Fortis Escort HospitalKIIMS Hospital Jehangir HospitalHospitality
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of KLE University?

faqs.answer: A:    BPharma graduates of KLE University can build a career in the healthcare, pharmaceutical research, and the pharmaceutical industry. as Pharmacists, Drug Inspectors, Clinical Pharmacists, Chemical Technicians, Medical Writers, Medical Representatives, etc. They are also eligible for various government sector jobs in their field. To advance their knowledge, candidates can also pursue an MPharma. For more information, vist: Career scope after BPharma
faqs.question: What are the career prospects after pursuing B.Pharma at KLE University?

faqs.answer: A:    KLE University accepts various entrance exam scores for admission to different programs. The specific exam accepted for a particular programme depends on the program's requirements. For undergraduate programs, common exams include the KLE Scholastic Aptitude Test (KLE SAT), Joint Entrance Examination Main (JEE Main), Consortium of Medical, Engineering and Dental Colleges of Karnataka (COMEDK) Undergraduate Entrance Test (UGET), and National Eligibility Test (NEET). For postgraduate programs, common exams include the Postgraduate Common Entrance Test (PGCET), Graduate Pharmacy Aptitude Test (GPAT), Common Admission Test (CAT), and Management Aptitude Test (MAT).
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by KLE University?

faqs.answer: A:    B.Sc. Nursing, Anaesthesia Technology, B.Sc. Cardiac Care Technology, B.Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology, Neuroscience Technology, Perfusion Technology, B.Sc. Radiology, and B.Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology are among the Allied BSc courses that KLE University provides. For these courses, there are often between 10 and 100 seats available. There are ten seats available for each of the B.Sc. programmes in anaesthesia technology, radiology, and neuroscience technology. Further, there are 15 places available for each of the B.Sc. programmes in Perfusion Technology and Cardiac Care Technology. For the B.Sc. Nursing programme, KLE University offers 100 seats. The university has reportedly announced a total of 160 seats for this academic year.

overview_faqs.question: Is BPharma available at KLE University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, KLE University offers a BPharma at its Belgavi, Bangalore and Hubballi campuses. The UG-level programme is available in modes of regular and lateral entry (to the third semester). The programme is spread across four years. The total course duration is further divided in eight semesters. BPharma admission at the university is based on the scores of KAHER-AIET/KCET. BPharma fee at KLE University is INR 6.44 lakh. Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for four-year BPharma at KLE University?
overview_faqs.answer: The KLE University BPharma tuition fee is INR 6.44 Lacs for four years. Other components inlcuded in the KLE University fees are security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, etc. The one-time charges, such as library security deposit, institute security deposit, grade card, and more have to be paid once at the time of admission. It must be noted that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: KLE University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: KLE will help you get into a fine hospital in Europe as well as the Middle East.

content.Placements: The college offers only 100 intakes for the bachelor's degree, and there are usually no placements, but I guess there are opportunities for the master's to get placed in Canada.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and the sports events are handled and organized in a good manner. The skill labs include the latest technology. I won't recommend the hostel facility because the food isn't good, as many of my friends said, but the rooms of the hostel are overall okayish. The practicals are done well, and almost all the equipment for physiotherapy is available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Why JNMC may or may not be for you.

content.Placements: JNMC adds a strong value to your resume. USMLE is given significant importance. Research opportunities are abundant, and teachers are supportive. We travel to different countries to showcase our research. The hospital is very large, with a 2400-bed capacity, providing excellent hands-on experience.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has a general store, bookstore, temple, cafe, sports complex, skill lab, playground, gym, and dairy. The girls' hostel also has a cafe, salon, laundry, and gym. Washrooms in the college do not have soap. Wi-Fi is available. But it is a bit slow. The food is good, and the cafe is very affordable.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The life in JNMC, Belagavi.

content.Placements: In medical college, there are usually no placements. There are just internships and after that, if you wish to work somewhere as an MBBS graduate then JNMC as a college on your resume will look strong as this institution goes back to 1963. Many people have cracked NEET PG from here, and the clinical knowledge you get from the patient flow is amazing.
content.Infrastructure: There is a campus with Wi-Fi that works throughout with good internet speed. There is a world-class library present here. I genuinely love the library as there is no book on medicine, you won't find here. The catalogue is vast and impressive. There is also a reading room that is open for students 24/7. Labs here are also world-class and they incorporated newer technologies into curriculum to enhance the learning process. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and ACs and are generally well thought out.

admission_overview.college_name: KLE University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection and Dates

paragraphs: KLE University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national or state-level entrance exams such as NEET, NEET-PG, KCET for admission to specific courses.KLE Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Medicine, Pharmacy, Science, etc.

KLE University offers more than 25 courses in full-time mode. Candidates need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to get admission. Below are theKLE University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

KLE University offers admission to most of the courses based on entrance-exam scores. Aspirants first need to apply for their preferred course to participate in the selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat at KLE University:
STEP 1: KLE University Application Process 2025
Candidates need to apply online on the official website of the university. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,500 to register for most of the UG and PG courses.
STEP 2: Selection

The university shortlists candidates based on their entrance-exam score or merit in the last qualifying exam. KLE considers NEET scores for MBBS, BAMS, BHMS and BDS. NEET-PG is score is required to get admission in MD, MS, MDS and PG diploma courses.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Once the selection process is over, candidates need to participate in the counselling and seat allotment process. NEET-qualified candidates are required to participate in counselling conducted by the Medical Counseling Committee (MCC) / Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA) / AYUSH Admission Central Counseling Committee (AACCC). Selected aspirants must pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
