placement_report.college_name: KLE University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: KLE University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per KLE University NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 1.8 LPA , INR 3 LPA and INR 3.8 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 1-year , PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at I NR 17.64 LPA , INR 4.2 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, the NIRF report 2023 is released. As per the report, 116 UG and 335 PG students were placed during KLE University placements 2022. The median package offered to UG (4-year) and UG (5-year) students was INR 3 LPA and INR 6 LPA . For PG courses, the median package offered during KLE University placements 2022 ranged between INR 3.35 LPA and INR 11.4 LPA, respectively.
KLE University Placements 2022:

data: KLE University Placements 2022: The median package for UG (5-year) courses increased by nearly 67% in 2022 when compared with 2021 The median package for PG (6-year) courses decreased by nearly 7% in 2022 when compared with 2021

faqs.question: What is the highest paying job in Tourism?
faqs.answer: Food and Beverage Director and General Manager of a premier international hotel chain hold highest earning position in Tourism industry. Food & Beverage Director is responsible for managing all parts of organization's food and beverage planning and service like - menu planning costing preparing and presenting food and beverages adhering to quality and safety requirements

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at KLE University?
faqs.answer: According to the data at the University's official website, the highest package offered at KLE Technological University during 2021 placements stood at INR 11.4 LPA. The average package offered for UG courses was 6.8 LPA and 87 students were placed out of 297 students and for PG courses the average package was 11.6 LPA and the number of students placed was 124 out of 223.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of KLE University?
faqs.answer: KLE Technological University provided many great opportunities to the students for placement in the recent years. Many companies visited the university and recruited a large amount of students in the year 2021. The list of the top recruiters of KLE Technological University in the year 2021 is presented below: Fortis Escort Hospital KIIMS Hospital Jehangir Hospital Hospitality

faqs.question: How are MBBS placements at KLE University?
faqs.answer: A specialised placement unit at the institution makes sure every student is placed appropriately in both national and international organisations. Every year, KLE University holds placements when a large number of students are hired by highly regarded medical organisations. Throughout the KLE University placement process, students are assisted and guided by a group of professionals. In addition, KLE University offers mock exams, interview preparation, competitive exam training, and career-oriented training. Students in the UG 4 year programme were offered a median pay of Rs 6.8 LPA, while those in the UG 5 year programme were offered a median salary of Rs 4 LPA, according to KLE University's 2020–2021 placement data.

highlights.description: Consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies, KLE University is one of India’s top institutes. Recently, the institute ranked #151-200 in the NIRF 2025 under the Overall category, #101-150 under University, and #11-50 under Sustainable Development Goals. The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The following article covers all the information around KLE University rankings:

rankings.highlight: 4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Karnataka In 2025

nirf.description:
KLE University has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, KLE University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.

qs_world.description:
KLE University has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for KLE University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, KLE University fell 180 ranks to #681 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been noticed that in the 'Southern Asia' category, the institute's ranking has fallen when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, KLE University fell 69 ranks to #212 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by KLE Institute of PhysiotherapyReviewed on 24 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: KLE will help you get into a fine hospital in Europe as well as the Middle East.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the sports events are handled and organized in a good manner. The skill labs include the latest technology. I won't recommend the hostel facility because the food isn't good, as many of my friends said, but the rooms of the hostel are overall okayish. The practicals are done well, and almost all the equipment for physiotherapy is available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, KLE Academy of Higher Education and ResearchReviewed on 15 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Why JNMC may or may not be for you.
reviews.review_text: The campus has a general store, bookstore, temple, cafe, sports complex, skill lab, playground, gym, and dairy. The girls' hostel also has a cafe, salon, laundry, and gym. Washrooms in the college do not have soap. Wi-Fi is available. But it is a bit slow. The food is good, and the cafe is very affordable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, KLE Academy of Higher Education and ResearchReviewed on 29 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my admission in the college.
reviews.review_text: Library has AC. The study room allows us to study in the comfort of our hostel room. There is a table, chair, cot, fan, and almirah in a room, and big enough to allow playing football in the room itself. A water cooler to quench the thirst in the scorching heat of Belgaum.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides one of the best campus facilities.
reviews.review_text: The center features several laboratories, including an analytical laboratory, a microbiological laboratory, a cell culture laboratory, and a molecular biology and bioinformatics laboratory. These facilities focus on critical areas like phytochemicals, drug delivery, molecular biology and genetics, microbiology, cell culture, cancer biology, bioinformatics, and drug discovery. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, including the hostel, and can be easily accessed using your university registra...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, KLE Academy of Higher Education and ResearchReviewed on 8 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The life in JNMC, Belagavi.
reviews.review_text: There is a campus with Wi-Fi that works throughout with good internet speed. There is a world-class library present here. I genuinely love the library as there is no book on medicine, you won't find here. The catalogue is vast and impressive. There is also a reading room that is open for students 24/7. Labs here are also world-class and they incorporated newer technologies into curriculum to enhance the learning process. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and ACs and are generally well thou...

reviews.review_heading: Life time experience 1 can cherish.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the campus is well-built. The infrastructure is student-friendly. There is 24/7 Wi-Fi. Labs are well-equipped. We have 24/7 reading rooms. The library contains 30,000 books which include all languages. It has medical and non-medical books. Hostels are well-furnished and compared to other hostels, ours is the best and cost-effective. We have a canteen facility which is open till night 10 PM. We get health insurance which covers our family as well.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, KLE Academy of Higher Education and ResearchReviewed on 8 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College review.
reviews.review_text: We have different types of clubs like the Journal Club and Publication Club. The college has a large library with a wide range of books that are easily accessible. There is also a digital library with subscriptions to different paid sites where we can access articles and full books in PDF format. The college holds a yearly event where both faculty and students mutually organize and participate. Various sports and other activities are available. Events have featured Bollywood and Hollywood celebr...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Shri B.M.Kankanawadi Ayurveda MahavidyalayaReviewed on 17 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and patient flow in the hospital are better than in other colleges.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24 hours. Both a library and digital library are available. Classrooms are well-developed with modern amenities. Labs are well-equipped with the latest machines and medical instruments. Both male and female hostels are available with high-quality facilities. The quality of food is good in both boys' and girls' hostels separately. A sports ground and indoor games are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by KLE Institute of PhysiotherapyReviewed on 11 Jun 2023)
reviews.review_heading: In short, this college is one of the top physiotherapy colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: Speaking about facilities, the college has a multitude of facilities, which makes it a better place to live and have a good college life. There is a bus facility, Wi-Fi, and the best labs in anatomy and physiology with foreign materials, which makes it the best.

reviews.review_heading: It is definitely a good college, but the facilities, according to the fees, are not satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: It is quite good and has good infrastructure, but the facilities, according to the fees, are not good. The teachers are also dedicated to their work and friendly to the students, but only the principal (in every college) is very strict about the professionalism of the students.

reviews.review_heading: Fantastic college. Lots of opp. for learning with capable staff and best equipment.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure with availability of dedicated labs, and function hall, Hostel facility in the campus is available for both the girls. Boys get very well maintained district ground, with availability of mess with very good food, availability of well maintained library with upto more than 10000 books for the medical field.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Shri B.M.Kankanawadi Ayurveda MahavidyalayaReviewed on 2 Nov 2021)
reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely good because a lot have succeeded studying here, and the faculty are supportive.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was okay. Food is good. The canteen is awesome. Good medical facilities are available 24/7. A big ground is available for all games and equipment for sports. There are sports facilities like cricket, football, basketball, shotput, throwball and kabaddi court.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, KLE Academy of Higher Education and ResearchReviewed on 21 Aug 2021)
reviews.review_heading: It is a remarkable college to learn clinical skills, and it has a good reputation.
reviews.review_text: The most important requirement for an MBBS student is a good hospital. This college has one of the best hospitals. You can find all types of cases. Classrooms are huge and comfortable with AC facilities. The library is well-equipped. There's a sports complex and swimming pool, gym and athletic track. Mess and hostel are okay, but there are many cafes on the campus, which are very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, KLE Academy of Higher Education and ResearchReviewed on 12 Apr 2019)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and cleanliness.
reviews.review_text: There are no infrastructure related problems. The campus has ATMs, bank, cafe, cooperative store, gym, swimming pool, table tennis, badminton, tennis, basketball, carrom etc. Hostels are well maintained and cleaned at least 2 times a day. Electricity supply is available 24/7. The college and hospital are well-equipped. Wi-Fi facility is available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2017Offered by Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, KLE Academy of Higher Education and ResearchReviewed on 3 Apr 2019)
reviews.review_heading: Joining this college is the best decision of my life.
reviews.review_text: It is the largest charitable hospital in Asia. The number of patients visits here is good. Hospital is well-equipped with all the facilities. The campus is spread over 100 acres. This college has separate sections for the patients who pay to get medical assistance and the patients who get treated for free. There is also one generic medical store where medicines are sold at cost-effective rates. There is a huge canteen available in the hospital for staff and patients' relatives. They also provide...

paragraphs: The Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) programme is offered at Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, KLE Academy of Higher Education and Research. The course lasts for 66 months (full time). It is a course level for UG degrees. The entire cost of tuition is approximately INR 82.35 lakh. Other components than tuition fees may be included in the fees. The fees associated with an internship that is required may not be included in the annual fees range. According to the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC), DGHS, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India, the aforementioned cost is applicable. Additionally, the university provides internships with a median pay of Rs. 4.08 Lacs per year.

The KLE University BPharma tuition fee is INR 6.44 Lacs for four years. Other components inlcuded in the KLE University fees are security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, etc. The one-time charges, such as library security deposit, institute security deposit, grade card, and more have to be paid once at the time of admission. It must be noted that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: Is Adesh University very expensive for MBBS?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee for MBBS at Adesh University is Rs 11.9 Lacs per year.This fee is charged with a stipulation of a 10% annual increase. The fee for NRI students is $1,25,000 for the whole course.The university has a total of 150 seats for MBBS, with 68 open merit seats,  37 scheduled caste seats,  15 backward classes seats,  7 physically handicapped/orthopedically handicapped seats, and 3 migrants from Jammu & Kashmir due to terrorist violence seatsThe fee for NRI students is $44,000 for the whole course.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery(BDS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college with good placements and extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: Placements depend on students' hard work. Our seniors got 77th rank all over India and one went to America to DDS. Its facility is very helpful and students should start their clinics but there are high opportunities to work which helps students to get many jobs. The practical work is very good in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good. The hostel fee for both boys and girls is Rs. 90,000. The hostel facility for girls is much better than for boys. The girls' hostel food is excellent than the boys' hostel. The menu is good. The night menu is not good. It depends on students to manage the evening food. The food quality is not good. Air conditioners include additional charges of Rs. 90,000 in sharing. Each student should pay Rs. 45,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Radiology and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Radiology in Adesh University.

review_content.Placements: The college did not provide us with any placements. We only got an internship, which we had to pay for and do a lot of work for. No companies came to visit us, and no jobs or placements were offered to us.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure that was provided is good. The classrooms were fully digitalized, and the labs were good for practical purposes. The hostel and mess were acceptable, though not that great.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are highly qualified and dedicated to their jobs. The courses they offer are very good, and they prepare students for every situation. The semester exams are moderate, not too hard, and students are able to pass them.

overview_faqs.question: What is unique about Adesh University?
overview_faqs.answer: Adesh University has medical, dental and nursing college in the same campus at walking distance. This close vicinity between the colleges allow for better exposure from practical aspects of the field.The teaching is great and make you ready to step out into the professional world when you graduate. There are cafes, shops and food joints within the campus. There is an outlet for shopping and McD and KFC in walking distance. The buses stop just outside the GATE of the campus.

overview_faqs.question: Is Adesh University very expensive for MBBS?
overview_faqs.answer: Adesh University in Bathinda, Punjab, offers MBBS with a first-year fee of INR 15.5 Lakhs. Private medical colleges in India are generally expensive with fees varying significantly .Therefore, while Adesh University's MBBS programme is relatively costly, it is in line with the expenses of typical private medical colleges in India.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MBBS at Adesh University?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee for MBBS at Adesh University is Rs 11.9 Lacs per year.This fee is charged with a stipulation of a 10% annual increase. The fee for NRI students is $1,25,000 for the whole course.The university has a total of 150 seats for MBBS, with 68 open merit seats, 37 scheduled caste seats, 15 backward classes seats, 7 physically handicapped/orthopedically handicapped seats, and 3 migrants from Jammu & Kashmir due to terrorist violence seatsThe fee for NRI students is $44,000 for the whole course.

overview_faqs.question: Is Adesh University under CUET?
overview_faqs.answer: Adesh University is not under CUET.Adesh University is not affiliated with CUET (Central Universities Entrance Test). Adesh University is an independent institution located in Bathinda, Punjab, India. thus its under or dependent on the CUET (Central Univeristies Entrance Test).

review_summary.college_name: Adesh University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: In short, I say this college infrastructure is good. The faculty is also helpful to students.

content.Placements: Almost all students were placed in different fields. The highest package went to about Rs. 50,000. Companies that offered jobs like Cipla, Mankind, etc. Roles offered in our course were Clinical Pharmacist, Clinical Researcher, Academic Professions, and Hospital Pharmacist as well.
content.Infrastructure: There were well-cleaned washrooms, classrooms, and the hospital, all maintained well. Wi-Fi was available all around the campus of the university and hospital. Facilities in the hostel included coolers and a well-functioning air conditioning system. The quality of food in the mess and canteen was excellent. Medical facilities were available across the campus. Sports and games were also provided by the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I love my college in every way.

content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure, including well-furnished labs, a library, and classrooms with Wi-Fi. We do all our work on computers because our college has good partnerships with companies that provide computers. We are very thankful for that.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is very good in our college because teachers are knowledgeable and well-educated. Semester exams are not very tough but average, as teachers sometimes provide help with papers. The pass percentage is 35% in each exam.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery(BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college with good placements and extracurricular activities.

content.Placements: Placements depend on students' hard work. Our seniors got 77th rank all over India and one went to America to DDS. Its facility is very helpful and students should start their clinics but there are high opportunities to work which helps students to get many jobs. The practical work is very good in this college.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good. The hostel fee for both boys and girls is Rs. 90,000. The hostel facility for girls is much better than for boys. The girls' hostel food is excellent than the boys' hostel. The menu is good. The night menu is not good. It depends on students to manage the evening food. The food quality is not good. Air conditioners include additional charges of Rs. 90,000 in sharing. Each student should pay Rs. 45,000.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Radiology and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Radiology in Adesh University.

content.Placements: The college did not provide us with any placements. We only got an internship, which we had to pay for and do a lot of work for. No companies came to visit us, and no jobs or placements were offered to us.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure that was provided is good. The classrooms were fully digitalized, and the labs were good for practical purposes. The hostel and mess were acceptable, though not that great.
content.Faculty: The teachers are highly qualified and dedicated to their jobs. The courses they offer are very good, and they prepare students for every situation. The semester exams are moderate, not too hard, and students are able to pass them.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery(BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Comprehensive review about my college .

content.Placements: The total seats for BDS are 100. Our batch consisted of 70 students. The course fee is 1.65 lacs plus a 10 percent increment every year. The internship is compulsory at the same college. The top roles offered are comprehensive clinical research projects, continuing dental education programs, and clinical experience.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. We'll maintain lecture halls as well as clinic areas and departments. The library includes books on all subjects and authors. Free Wi-Fi in both hostels and colleges. The hostel has three room types: double, triple, and single. Food is good, as is the canteen attached. All kinds of spots are performed.

admission_overview.title: Adesh University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Adesh University admissions 2025 are both entrance and merit-based. Adesh University offers courses in various fields, such as Management, Science, Commerce, Arts, Law, and more. It offers the UG courses via its affiliated colleges, and the admissions are based on merit scores of the last qualifying exams. Whereas, the PG courses are offered at the university's campus and its affiliated colleges. For the remaining courses, the university conducts an in-house entrance exam.

faqs.answer: Candidates can check the Adesh University cutoff 2023 on the university's website. The cutoff marks will be released in the form of a list. Admission to Adesh University MBBS is based on NEET UG scores followed by NEET UG Counselling. The overall cutoff for Punjab-NEET-Counselling is also listed on the university's website. Additionally, Adesh University MSc Admission 2023 is open and details can be checked on the university's website. Admission to Adesh Medical College is based on NEET UG Exam Score, and the cutoff for the general category can be checked on the MBBSCouncil website. paragraphs: Adesh University seat intakevaries as per the course and specialisation selected by the students. To secure a seat at the university students must participate in the counselling.Adesh University seatsvary for both on-campus and affiliated colleges. Students can check out the following table to learn about the total seat intake for some of the popular Adesh University Dharwad courses:

The admission procedure for Adesh University involves multiple steps, such as appearing for the accepted entrance exam, application, selection, counselling, and admission confirmation. Students seeking admission must fulfil all of the required admission criteria before applying. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailedAdesh University admissions process:
Step 1: Adesh University Application Process 2025

Adesh University's admission processstarts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Adesh University. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online, and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the PG courses at Adesh University is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams, such as NEET, for the selection of respective courses.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds for the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

placement_data.title: Adesh University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Adesh University has not released the placement report or brochure. As per the Shiksha student's reviews, around 50% of the batch was placed in the recent placement drives. The lowest package and highest package offered were INR 1.05 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively. Further, the average package for Adesh University placements in the past few years was between INR 2.2 LPA and INR 3 LPA . Dr. Morpen, Abbot, and Max Hospital were some of the leading companies that hired the students over the past years.

hostel_campus.college_name: Adesh University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: MBA - Graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university

reviews.review_heading: In short, I say this college infrastructure is good. The faculty is also helpful to students.
reviews.review_text: There were well-cleaned washrooms, classrooms, and the hospital, all maintained well. Wi-Fi was available all around the campus of the university and hospital. Facilities in the hostel included coolers and a well-functioning air conditioning system. The quality of food in the mess and canteen was excellent. Medical facilities were available across the campus. Sports and games were also provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: I love my college in every way.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure, including well-furnished labs, a library, and classrooms with Wi-Fi. We do all our work on computers because our college has good partnerships with companies that provide computers. We are very thankful for that.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with good placements and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. The hostel fee for both boys and girls is Rs. 90,000. The hostel facility for girls is much better than for boys. The girls' hostel food is excellent than the boys' hostel. The menu is good. The night menu is not good. It depends on students to manage the evening food. The food quality is not good. Air conditioners include additional charges of Rs. 90,000 in sharing. Each student should pay Rs. 45,000.

reviews.review_heading: Radiology in Adesh University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure that was provided is good. The classrooms were fully digitalized, and the labs were good for practical purposes. The hostel and mess were acceptable, though not that great.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive review about my college .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. We'll maintain lecture halls as well as clinic areas and departments. The library includes books on all subjects and authors. Free Wi-Fi in both hostels and colleges. The hostel has three room types: double, triple, and single. Food is good, as is the canteen  attached. All kinds of spots are performed.

reviews.review_heading: College has good infrastructure and facilities for the students.
reviews.review_text: Adesh University has very good infrastructure and facilities for this course. Laboratories are available for student practice. The college provides Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, classrooms, sports, facilities, etc. Hostel and other necessary facilities are also available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Adesh University.
reviews.review_text: On the university campus, there are six colleges. Our college provides good infrastructure. The campus is huge. The university only offers medical-related courses. A lab is available. There is a central library. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good, but you get bored with the food. The hostel fee is a bit over the top.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is safe, but the infrastructure is not so great. You have to pay for everything, like the AC, fridge, geyser, and kettle, and pay the electricity bill of the hostel. No free laundry is there. The food is hygienic and tasty, but you will probably get bored with the same menu.

reviews.review_heading: This college is affordable for middle-class students with good teachers and atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: We have normal classrooms with fans. Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are not air-conditioned. There is no ventilation in the basement. Library is very good. Hostel facilities are average. The food quality is average. Medical facilities are not free for students. Cricket is only played.

reviews.review_heading: It is an affordable college with good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were normal with Wi-Fi facilities. The library was good. Our college provided drinking water and hygienic atmosphere. The hostel facilities were average but the quality of food was nice. New recipes were served daily. Medical facilities were available for students at affordable rates.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of well-qualified and knowledgeable faculty.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities are not good because the gym is available only for MBBS students. The college has facilities like
a library, labs, playground, gym, auditorium, parking area etc. The hostel quality is good. Food quality is the best in the canteen, just feel like home. Medical facilities are available. Sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: College of my dreams as I am satisfied with the faculty, good infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: 24/7 Wi-Fi, library, all medical facilities available, canteen, different departments, and AC lecture theatres. A very nice environment is provided to the students in our college. As there are various facilities available for us like library, canteen, nearby hostels, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members are awesome. The infrastructure of our college is good. For our course, it is really good enough. Everything is going smoothly, and every rising day becomes awesome here. Tournaments are organised every year. The mess is good for better health. Medical facilities and staff are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Adesh University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in my course is good. Facilities like labs, classrooms, etc., are available. The hostel infrastructure is good. Computers with Wi-Fi are available in the labs. The chemicals are also present to do experiments freely. The library is well maintained for the peaceful study of students. Mess, canteen and medical facilities are the best for students, and they don't face any difficulty.

reviews.review_heading: The best medical university in india.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The college provides Wi-Fi facility and medical facility. The lab is quite spacious and well maintained with basic facilities like - sports, live cricket, basketball, badminton, kabaddi and football can be played on the campus. There are separate room for indoor games like chess, carrom, table tennis. The hostel room are quite spacious.

data.description: Yes, Adesh University follows a semester pattern in its BSc course. The academic year is divided into two semesters of six months each, and students take a group of courses per semester. The university provides different specialisations for the BSc with a three- four-year course duration. The course is divided into six to eight semesters. The system provides educational standards and opens up avenues for further education.

paragraphs: Adesh University in Bathinda, Punjab, offers MBBS with a first-year fee of INR 15.5 Lakhs. Private medical colleges in India are generally expensive with fees varying significantly .Therefore, while Adesh University's MBBS programme is relatively costly, it is in line with the expenses of typical private medical colleges in India.
The fee for MBBS at Adesh University is Rs 11.9 Lacs per year.
This fee is charged with a stipulation of a 10% annual increase.
The fee for NRI students is $1,25,000 for the whole course.

The university has a total of 150 seats for MBBS, with 68 open merit seats,  37 scheduled caste seats,  15 backward classes seats,  7 physically handicapped/orthopedically handicapped seats, and 3 migrants from Jammu & Kashmir due to terrorist violence seats
The fee for NRI students is $44,000 for the whole course.

Along with the fees for a BSc course at Adesh University, students must know that there might be some extra one-time charges as well. These can include application fees, a security deposit, and miscellaneous fees. However, the Adesh University BSc course fee ranges from INR 1.6 Lacs to INR 3.5 lakh. It must be noted that the above-mentioned fee is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

The fee for Adesh University MBA is INR 2.6 lakh. The overall tuition fee may include various fee elements, such as tuition fees, admission fees, security charges, etc. Some fees may be paid once, while a few are paid annually. Check out the following Adesh University MBA fee breakup:

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing B.Tech in CSE from Amity University, Haryana. In our current batch 2025, many students who appeared for placement have relevant skills get placed in their placement session. The highest package is around 15 LPA above, and the lowest package is around 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini, TCS, Yamaha, and many startups. Role offered is software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure at Amity is good with very calm environment. There are many active clubs and societies you and become part of those and explore yourself. You can also make a good connection here. There are only few places where you can get Wi-Fi. Library is one of them and college classrooms are air-conditioned. Hostel is overall good with good facilities for hostel mess. There are 2 messes at Amity and many other outlets for food. Amity has a very big sports complex timing is 1:00 PM - 2:00 PM only.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees of Amity University, Gurugram for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: INR 6.8 Lacs and INR 17.1 Lakh is the total fee range for the MBA programme at Amity University Gurugram. This fee amount contains a lot of factors, such as tuition fees, caution deposit, hostel and mess charges, etc. Some of these are paid once, and some are to be paid semester-wise. For eg., the caution deposit, which is paid only once and refunded later. Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth doing MBA at Amity Noida?
overview_faqs.answer: Amity Noida can be a decent choice to pursue a PG-level Management course. The university offers MBA across 27 specialisations. It also offers international opportunities to its students, where a five-week Study Abroad Program runs at Amity Campuses in London, Dubai, New York or Singapore. Amity University Noida has been ranked continuously for its Management category courses by NIRF. Find below the last three-year ranking comparison for Amity Noida:Ranking Body202120222023NIRF292828To check out the other MBA colleges in India, click hereApart from this, Amity University Noida also offers scholarships under various categories to its students. Further, as per the placements records of the year 2022, the overall highest package offered during the on-campus was INR 58 LPA. The top recruiters visited during the placement drive of Amity Noid Placements 2022 were Cisco, MTX, Airtel, etc. Read more: Amity University Noida Placements

review_summary.college_name: Amity University Gurugram Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My review about this college.

content.Placements: Placement is good enough. High reputed companies placement opportunities. More than 300+ companies including MNCs visited us last year for recruiting us. The average salary package offered is 5.0 LPA, and the highest last year is 17 LPA, which is a good number. Top recruiting companies like Wipro, Infosys, Mahindra, Accenture, TCS, Byju's, and HDFC Bank visited our campus for placements. Software engineer role is offered to the students. Nearly 70 percent of students got an internship in different companies. Different levels of interviews and tests on skill-based packages are conducted.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) Honours/Research - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Amity University, Gurugram.

content.Placements: 45% placement with 15-30 Lacs pachage. 98% student passed the college. In amity the highest package was 67 Lacs and the lowest package was 20 Lacs. Ghe top recruiting companies for my course was google and more. 69% student got internship from my course in google and more big companies .
content.Infrastructure: The hostels are in very good condition. Very good facilities and infrastructure are available for your course and department; for example, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are all very good. The quality of the facilities in hostels is very good. The quality of food is also very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Amity University Gurgaon B.Tech CSE review.

content.Placements: I am pursuing B.Tech in CSE from Amity University, Haryana. In our current batch 2025, many students who appeared for placement have relevant skills get placed in their placement session. The highest package is around 15 LPA above, and the lowest package is around 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini, TCS, Yamaha, and many startups. Role offered is software developer.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure at Amity is good with very calm environment. There are many active clubs and societies you and become part of those and explore yourself. You can also make a good connection here. There are only few places where you can get Wi-Fi. Library is one of them and college classrooms are air-conditioned. Hostel is overall good with good facilities for hostel mess. There are 2 messes at Amity and many other outlets for food. Amity has a very big sports complex timing is 1:00 PM - 2:00 PM only.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Amity University is considered as a good university for studies.

content.Placements: 100% of students got placed in this course. The average salary is 3 LPA to 5 LPA. Medanta, Fortis, Gangaram, and Narayana are the recruiting hospitals. 100% of students got internships from our course at Medanta, Fortis, Gangaram, Narayana, etc. Top role offered in our course is nursing officer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and all are available. Infrastructure is very good. Facilities in hostel and course are good including food of the best quality. Medical facilities are available with doctors and nurses. We have good sports ground and different games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Amazing procedures and life-size equipments to get a thorough knowledge of nursing.

content.Placements: Approximately 80-85% of the students are placed in my senior year while they are still attending classes, and with a very decent and respectful package. Recruiting companies like Medanta, Fortis, Paras, and Sri Gangaram Hospital. We have a 6-month internship in the last semester in a community setting at Medanta and Civil Hospital, Gurugram. Top roles offered are staff nurse, operation theatre nurse, and availability to higher courses.
content.Infrastructure: We have atleast 4-5 different labs catering to each department and having human size models, dummies, and equipments. All the procedures and equipments to perform and practice for the future. Our hostel is a very safe and secure place having sets of 2 beds in each room, 6 students in each suite. For food, we have at least 7 different places with amazing food and a way to connect to people. Medical facilities are available 24X7. Sports events and cultural fests happen twice a year.

paragraphs: Amity University Gurgaon admission is a multi-step process. Candidates seeking for getting admission to various courses of the university must apply at the official website. To admit the right candidates, the university selects students based on selection criteria, which include filling out the application form, qualifying for the selection rounds and paying for the Amity University Gurugram fees at the time of final admission.
Step 1: Amity University Gurgaon Application Process 2025

Students must fill out an application form on the official admission website of Amity University Gurugram (https://portal.amity.edu/NewOnlineForm/Candidate/SignUp). With candidates needing to fill out a separate form in case of multiple course by paying an application fee ofINR 1,100for each form. The new users are required to generate login credentials and fill out an online application form with all the relevant details and documents and submit the form on the admission portal of Amity University Gurgaon.
Step 2: Amity University Gurgaon Selection Process

Amity University Gurgaon admissions are both merit and entrance-based. For most of the UG & PG courses, candidates are selected based on merit of the last qualifying exam of previous education. Further, the shortlisted candidates have to appear for the Personal Interview round as per course requirements. The students are selected based on Amity PhD Entrance Test +Interview by Faculty Member or All India National Level Competitive Examination or NET (viz. UGC / CSIR -NET in Category 1,2 or 3, ICMR- JRF/SRF, ICAR-AICE-JRF/SRF (PhD),GATE, GPAT, DST – INSPIRE, DBT-JRF etc.
Step 3: Final Offer Letter

The final results are declared after the completion of all previous rounds. The information concerning selection will be communicated on the admission microsite as well as via Email and SMS. Selected candidates will get an admission letter along with important information such as semester fee, class commencement date, time, venue of the course, allotment of a hostel (If applied), scholarship (If any) and the list of documents required at the time of joining. Candidates also have to pay a certain amount as per theAmity University Gurugram feesstructure to secure their seats.

faqs.question: What is JEE Main Eligibility cutoff in class 12th for Amity University Gurgaon?
faqs.answer: To be eligible to appear for the JEE Main exam, students need to have at least 75% marks in Class 12 with Maths and Physics as compulsory subjects for BTech courses, PCM for BArch and Maths for BPlan. There is no age limit to apply for the JEE Main; however, to get admission in NITs, IITs and CFTIs, students need a valid JEE Main rank with 75% marks in Class 12.

placement_data.title: Amity University Gurugram Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: During the Amity Gurugram placement drive 2025, in 422 companies visited in total. There were 147 fortune-500 companies and 275 national companies . The placement season 2025 welcomed 280 new recruiters .

As per the Amity Gurugram placement report, 430 recruiters participated and offered various job roles to the batch 2024 across sectors, such as E­-Commerce, BFSI, Consulting, Research , etc. Of all the total recruiters who participated in Amity University Gurgaon placements in 2024, 285 were new and 145 were repeated recruiters. The top recruiters of Amity University Gurgaon placements in 2024 included Amazon, Capgemini, Coforge, UNO Minda, PlanetSpark, etc. Further, according to Amity University Gurgaon Engineering NIRF report 2024, the median package offered to the BTech batch 2023 stood at INR 4.81 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the course fees of BCA Amity Gurugram?
faqs.answer: INR 5 Lacs is the total tuition fee for BCA, as per an unofficial source. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to BCA course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university also accepts CUET UG score for providing admission to BCA course. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled.

faqs.question: What is the fees of Amity University, Gurugram for MBA?
faqs.answer: INR 6.8 Lacs and INR 17.1 Lakh is the total fee range for the MBA programme at Amity University Gurugram. This fee amount contains a lot of factors, such as tuition fees, caution deposit, hostel and mess charges, etc. Some of these are paid once, and some are to be paid semester-wise. For eg., the caution deposit, which is paid only once and refunded later. Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the course fees of BA in Amity Gurugram?
faqs.answer: INR 1.7 Lacs to INR 10.9 Lacs is the total tuition fee for BA as per an unofficial source. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to BA course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university also accepts CUET UG score for providing admission to BA course. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled.

nirf.description:
Amity University Gurugram has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Amity University Gurugram indicate the institute's strong performance in areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF.
The rankings of the institute in the 'University' category have displayed a decreasing trend when evaluated against previous year's rankings. In 2025, Amity University Gurugram fell 7 ranks to #101-150 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Amity University Gurugram fell 2 ranks to #101-150 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Amity University Gurugram fell 20 ranks to #101-15- rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amity University Gurugram Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Amity University provides air-conditioned apartment-style accommodation facility for 2100 students. The rooms are well-lit and well-ventilated, with geysers in every bathroom and TV set in the common room for entertainment.

The separate facilities for boys and girls, caring wardens and a tight security ensure a pleasant stay allowing students to focus on their academics. The air-conditioned residential apartment suites consist of 3 single rooms with an attached bathroom and sitting lounge equipped necessary furniture.
facilities: 20-acre sports complex (Tennis Court,  Cricket Field,  Football Ground,  Basketball court, etc.)

library.description:
Amity University library is an integrated knowledge resource centre that is stocked with approx 50,000 books, 20,000 journals and 2,500 publications. 

Amity students have access to Ebsco Host, UGC-Infonet, INDEST-AICTE, IS1 and Delnet. All Amity students are members of Amizone - Amity Intranet Zone which allows them easy access to these journals and papers.

These Libraries consist of Reference Sections, Circulation Sections, Audio-visual Sections, Periodical Sections and Digital Libraries.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Squash Court, Volleyball Court, Swimming Pool, Table Tennis

All cafeterias of Amity University have menus that are designed by a team of professional dieticians, comprising nutritious and wholesome food to ensure a well-balanced diet. 

There is multi-cuisine food court with facilities like Dosa Plaza, cook house, canteen, etc.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Course curriculum is pretty appropriate, especially for students belonging to an IT background. First two semesters covered the basics of languages like C, C+. Later we learned about some advanced languages like Java, HTML, etc. There re a lot of guest lectures and workshops which are frequently organized for knowledge. Hostel facility is available and also PGs are available near the college. The room offering is good with single as well as double sharing, and the price of separate rooms is high...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amity University, Gurugram.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are in very good condition. Very good facilities and infrastructure are available for your course and department; for example, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are all very good. The quality of the facilities in hostels is very good. The quality of food is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University Gurgaon B.Tech CSE review.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at Amity is good with very calm environment. There are many active clubs and societies you and become part of those and explore yourself. You can also make a good connection here. There are only few places where you can get Wi-Fi. Library is one of them and college classrooms are air-conditioned. Hostel is overall good with good facilities for hostel mess. There are 2 messes at Amity and many other outlets for food. Amity has a very big sports complex timing is 1:00 PM - 2:00 PM o...

reviews.review_heading: Amity University is considered as a good university for studies.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and all are available. Infrastructure is very good. Facilities in hostel and course are good including food of the best quality. Medical facilities are available with doctors and nurses. We have good sports ground and different games.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing procedures and life-size equipments to get a thorough knowledge of nursing.
reviews.review_text: We have atleast 4-5 different labs catering to each department and having human size models, dummies, and equipments. All the procedures and equipments to perform and practice for the future. Our hostel is a very safe and secure place having sets of 2 beds in each room, 6 students in each suite. For food, we have at least 7 different places with amazing food and a way to connect to people. Medical facilities are available 24X7. Sports events and cultural fests happen twice a year.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure is good and canteen food is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, classroom is ventilated, and AC is available. Number of options and variety are available. Classrooms and corridors are always clean. Washrooms are clean and hygienic. Air-conditioned classrooms are available. It provides proper uniforms for clinicals. It also provides laboratory facilities and training.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members. There are 99% placements and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college and hostel is amazing. It has availability of Wi-Fi. Hostel provides clean and quiet environment. Hostel also has medical facilities. We also have labs, library, and classroom. Quality of food is like home and great mess is there.

reviews.review_heading: Studying here always feels like learning something new every day.
reviews.review_text: The environment of the college is very well. They provide good care to the students. Faculty members are very helpful to the students. The canteens are good and only veg and hygiene food is served. Library is also good and all new books are available.

reviews.review_heading: I feel proud as a student of Amity University Haryana.
reviews.review_text: Amity University Haryana has one of the best infrastructure, which is well-maintained in terms of lab classes, library facilities, and the list goes on. AC, non-AC rooms, water cooler, lift, study table, medical facilities, sports complex, playground, and mess food. These are some facilities which are provided to hostellers.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University provided what students needed the most.
reviews.review_text: The facility and the infrastructure are amazing. Classrooms, water facility, library, labs, and Wi-Fi facility are amazing and have all the equipment and books that are needed in the course, and every necessary thing required for the course. Hostel, if we talk about hostel, food is the first thing we have in our mind, and here the food is amazing, including other facilities too, good food quality, and medical facilities, everything is good here.

reviews.review_heading: "Great infrastructure and facilities with diverse student amenities."
reviews.review_text: The ASH department offers excellent infrastructure, including Wi-Fi-enabled campuses and modern classrooms. Hostels are comfortable, but sometimes the food isn't good, while sports facilities enhance the overall student experience, and the medical facilities are also not good in the university.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend others take admission here, especially if they are looking for hotel management.
reviews.review_text: Students who are interested in sports will find a decent sports complex at this university, and tournaments are held at specific times of the year. Hostels are also decent, with food quality being good and offering variations. Hostels also have recreational rooms.

reviews.review_heading: A balanced college with good opportunities and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is actually better than many universities. We have a front office lab, restaurant, kitchen, bakery lab, Wi-Fi, and a library everything. There are approximately 5-6 canteens, and they are very clean. The food is also very good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: The best private university in Haryana.
reviews.review_text: Clean and tidy classrooms with state-of-the-art infrastructure provide a smooth learning experience. The library is a very comfortable place to study. There are multiple cafeterias on the campus to chose from, offering a variety of meal options. A big sports complex includes sports such as tennis, basketball, badminton, football, volleyball, etc. A medical room is available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I'm completely satisfied with Amity University Haryana.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Amity University Haryana is one of the best parts, where vibrant college life truly thrives. Our Amity School of Hospitality department is introduced with two new classrooms along with a new restaurant and kitchen. The hostel offers both AC and Non-AC rooms, along with two hostel messes and a food court.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Punjabi University Patiala ranks #46 under the category 'Pharmacy'.

Punjabi University, Patiala admissions 2026 are open. All the latest updates are as follows:

college_info.intro:
Punjab University Patiala offers a diverse range of programmes to students. The university offers BTech and MBA programme to students as its flagship courses. These courses are offered for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively. Punjabi University courses are offered in full-time mode in several specialisations.
Some of the popular specialisations offered under the BTech programme are Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communications Engineering, Civil Engineering, and more. These courses are highly sought after among students for their placements and career growth with MBA graduates able to take on roles under business analytics, as consultants or even leadership positions. While BTech graduates can take up a range of technical roles. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Punjab University Patiala in the table provided below:

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Students can work with faculty on research projects
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Active but run mostly by students
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    Hostel fees for Engineering Hostels (I. e. Band Singh Bahadur, Mai Bhago Hostel & Bebe Nanki) is INR 920 per month whereas for other Hostels it is INR 420 per month. There are six residential Hostels for boys and seven residential Hostels for girls. The Hostels have all modern amenities for comfortable living for 4000 students. The hostels are given on a merit basis only. The students of low-income groups can be given free accommodation in the University Hostels. Residents of a hostel, where a cooperative mess is being run shall have to pay INR 5000 in advance as a mess bill. This amount is refundable/adjustable as and when the student leaves the hostel or the mess is closed permanently.

The basic criteria are that Candidate should have passed Class 12 with at least 50 percent marks in aggregate in any discipline. review_content.Placements: Our department provides placements after the third year, and many companies visit for placements. Recently, Infosys visited. I don't know exactly the package, but it was around 2-3 LPA. Infosys is considered a top recruiting company. Almost 90 percent of students get placements. review_content.Infrastructure: Many facilities and infrastructure available, such as Wi-Fi for every hostel student, good classrooms, and a library. The quality of the hostel is also quite good. New hostels are being built for students. The food provided is liked by everyone, and I like it too.

faqs.answer: Punjabi University, Patiala, has kept up its spree of winning the highest A grade on a four-point scale amongst over 350 universities in the country. The status is awarded by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC). Punjabi University offers various Undergraduate, Postgraduate, PG Diploma, UG Diploma, Certificate and Doctorate degree programmes. Candidates can apply online for registration. Punjabi University offers courses in the fields of Pharmacy, Library sciences, Management, Commerce, Languages, Computer Application, Performing Arts, Law, Engineering, and Business Administration. The university also has the provision of Lateral entry for some courses.
faqs.question: Q: Is admission to Punjabi University worth it?

faqs.answer: To get admission into BSc courses offered at Punjabi University Patiala, candidates are required to qualify their Class 12 from Science stream with relevant subjects (according to the chosen specialisation selcted by candidates. For admission, candidates must have completed their higher senior secondary from CBSE, PSEB, ISC, UP Board, Maharashtra HSC, MPBSE, Punjabi University Admission. Additionally, the university also accepts valid scores of CUET for admission.
faqs.question: Q: How do I get admission to B.Sc at Punjabi University, Patiala?

faqs.answer: Hostel fees for Engineering Hostels (I. e. Band Singh Bahadur, Mai Bhago Hostel & Bebe Nanki) is INR 920 per month whereas for other Hostels it is INR 420 per month. There are six residential Hostels for boys and seven residential Hostels for girls. The Hostels have all modern amenities for comfortable living for 4000 students. The hostels are given on a merit basis only. The students of low-income groups can be given free accommodation in the University Hostels. Residents of a hostel, where a cooperative mess is being run shall have to pay INR 5000 in advance as a mess bill. This amount is refundable/adjustable as and when the student leaves the hostel or the mess is closed permanently.
faqs.question: Q: What is the hostel fee structure of Punjabi University Patiala?

The duration of the course is 3 years. Candidates who wish to take admission to these courses should fulfil the basic eligibility criteria. The basic criteria are that Candidate should have passed Class 12 with at least 50% marks in aggregate in any discipline. Punjabi University admissions are offered on the basis of merit in the qualifying examination and for some courses marks obtained in the entrance examination. The university conducts an interview for admission to every course.

overview_faqs.answer: An MBA degree from Punjabi University, Patiala can be beneficial for your career in a number of ways: Improved job prospects: An MBA degree from a recognised institution like Punjabi University can help you enhance your career prospects and increase your earning potential. It can open up opportunities for advancement in your current organisation or help you secure a better job in a new company. Specialised knowledge: An MBA programme typically covers a wide range of business and management topics, giving you a comprehensive understanding of various business functions and operations. This knowledge can be applied in various industries, including finance, marketing, operations, and human resources, to name a few. review_summary.college_name: Punjabi University Patiala Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placement is decent here. So, it could be improved.

content.Placements: In the session of 2024-25, there are 75% students got placements in CSE in startup and non-technical companies. The highest package in this session 2025 was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. If we come to average, it is around 4.5 LPA. 60% of students got internship opportunity offered by startup companies. Roles offered are system analyst, full-stack developer, and senior testing engineer.
content.Infrastructure: College building and its infrastructure are designed in the style of old palace which looks very authentic. Lawn is very good. Hostels are available both in AC and non-AC for students. Campus has fully Wi-Fi covered facility. Food and mess are very good. There is also a dispensary for students to give them first aid and immediate response to curve students. There are hockey court, a huge cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, kabaddi court, and badminton court. Indoor stadium is also available. Labs are well-equipped with modern computers, machines, and tools.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. (Hons.) in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Crazy campus Life, low study stress.

content.Placements: I have given 2 stars in case of placements because placements are not done properly in our course. A few of the students get recruited via teachers references, whereas others, vice versa, have to find jobs by themselves. I must say our alumni are most connected to the tour department, and teachers can actually help us get into the good institutions like Indian Express, local Punjab channel, AIR, and web channel.
content.Infrastructure: Our department is good, they have 2 Studios. One has a teleprompter, cameras, and a recording studio, while the other one is audio studio for recording audio and podcasts. But the infrastructure is not as much as required for the course. The media department needs more infrastructure. While the university in general is very good, they have Wi-Fi all over the campus. A big library and reading room on the campus. Every hostel has its own reading rooms. Mess food is affordable, and canteen food is amazing and affordable. Campus Life is amazing.

individual_reviews.course: M.B.A. (Five Years Integrated Programme) in Financial Markets and Applied Management - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: The college helps provide practical knowledge.

content.Placements: Our department provides placements after the third year, and many companies visit for placements. Recently, Infosys visited. I don't know exactly the package, but it was around 2-3 LPA. Infosys is considered a top recruiting company. Almost 90 percent of students get placements. Top roles help in gaining practical knowledge and real-life case studies.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities and infrastructure available, such as Wi-Fi for every hostel student, good classrooms, and a library. The quality of the hostel is also quite good. New hostels are being built for students. The food provided is liked by everyone, and I like it too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College infrastructure and facilities are good.

content.Placements: I am in my 3rd year, and approximately 30 percent of students get placement from this college. The highest package offered is 20 LPA. Top one that Microsoft visited once, but now Infosys comes here for placement. Internship in the 8th sem is totally about it, so every student has to make a project, which is considered as training time. Data handling, Software, AI expert, and for research too.
content.Infrastructure: It has almost all kinds of facilities, good water, all labs have AC, the lecture hall has projectors, and the library area is good. The quality of food is average, but it has a canteen, Wi-Fi in the hostel too, and medical facilities all the time, and time to time events for hostelers at least once a year have been done.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College does not have proper infrastructure.

content.Placements: In this college, not many companies come for placements. This college does not have proper guidance for students. Students are struggling for placements. The college is not utilized properly. They have zero percent of students who have received an internship from this college.
content.Infrastructure: Mess and canteen food are very bad, they do not clean properly. Only 50 student seats can be accommodated in the one-time library. The college has not been cleaned properly. Classrooms are not clean. This college does not have Wi-Fi for students, and the labs are very bad.

admission_overview.college_name: Punjabi University Patiala Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Punjabi University admissionsare based on entrance exam scores or merit. The university accepts scores in JEE Main, GATE, etc. for specific courses. The university offers in Engineering, Law, Science, Arts, etc. Punjabi University offers programmes at UG and PG levels.

Punjabi University shortlists  candidates based on entrance exam scores for a few courses. Admission to most of the courses is based on the qualifying exam. Candidates also have to further participate in the Punjabi University counselling process. Check below popular courses of Punjabi University along with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 or equivalent with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, and English as their subjects with a minimum of 50% aggregate (for General Category)
Graduation with 50% (45% for SC/ST & Disabled Persons Categories)
Graduation with 45% - 50%.
COAP Counselling
(50% marks in the Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree examination (45% marks for SC/ST and handicapped with at least 40% disability)
Merit Based
candidates must have a minimum of 50% marks in their Bachelor's/Master's Degree examination (45% marks for candidates belonging to the SC/ST category and individuals with at least 40% disability)
Merit- Based
50% marks in class 12 examination (45% marks for SC/ST and handicapped with at least 40% disability)
Merit Based
50% marks in class 12 examination (45% marks for SC/ST and handicapped with at least 40% disability)
Merit Based
Check below step-wise Punjabi University admission process:
1: Punjabi University Application Process
Aspirants have to fill out the application form for the preferred course on the university's website. Candidates need to pay an application fee and upload the documents to submit the form.
2: Selection
The university accepts JEE Main for BTech and GATE for MTech. The selection for most of the other courses based on merit.
3: Counselling and Admission Confirmation

Selected aspirants have to further participate in the counselling rounds. The seats are allotted to candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Aspirants have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
For more information about Punjabi University check out the below videos:

faqs.question: Is admission to Punjabi University worth it?
faqs.answer: Punjabi University, Patiala, has kept up its spree of winning the highestA grade on a four-point scaleamongst over 350 universities in the country. The status is awarded by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC). Punjabi University offers various Undergraduate, Postgraduate, PG Diploma, UG Diploma, Certificate and Doctorate degree programmes. Candidates can apply online for registration. Punjabi University offers courses in the fields of Pharmacy, Library sciences, Management, Commerce, Languages, Computer Application, Performing Arts, Law, Engineering, and Business Administration. The university also has the provision of Lateral entry for some courses.

faqs.question: How much percentage is required for Punjabi University Patiala?
faqs.answer: Punjabi University imparts over 800 courses in a variety of fields ranging from Engineering, Law, Science, Arts & Humanities, Commerce and Accounting, Management, Computers & IT, Pharmacy to Library sciences, and many more. Admission to all these courses is based on the aggregate score of the candidates in the qualifying exams. Tabulated below are a few Punjabi University courses along with their percentage:Class 12 with 45-50 %CoursesEligibilityBTechClass 12 with 45-60 %BAClass 12 with 50 %Bachelor's Degree with 45-50 %BScClass 12 with 45-60 %MScBachelor's Degree with 50 %BAClass 12 with 33-50 %BACheck here for course-wise percentage required.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to B.Sc at Punjabi University, Patiala?
faqs.answer: To get admission into BSc courses offered at Punjabi University Patiala, candidates are required to qualify their Class 12 from Science stream with relevant subjects (according to the chosen specialisation selcted by candidates. For admission, candidates must have completed their higher senior secondary from CBSE,PSEB, ISC,UP Board,   Maharashtra HSC, MPBSE,Punjabi University Admission. Additionally, the university also accepts valid scores of CUET for admission.

placement_data.title: Punjabi University Patiala Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Punjabi University has released the placement details for its Engineering and MCA batch 2025. A total of 17 recruiters participated during Punjabi University placements 2025 and presented various job offers to the BTech and MCA batch 2025. The highest package secured by students was INR 6 LPA whereas the lowest salary achieved was INR 2.65 LA. The top recruiters of Punjabi University Patiala in 2025 include Zoxima Solutions, Infosys, SafeAeon,Quark Software, etc.
Earlier, the highest package secured by batch 2024 stood at INR 11 LPA. In 2023 , over 35 recruiters participated and presented more than 141 job offers to the students.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered at Punjabi University placements?
faqs.answer: The average package offered at Punjabi University placements 2024 is yet to be released on the official website. However, the Punjabi University average package offered during the 2023 placement drive stood at INR 5 LPA. The same is presented below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Average package INR 5 LPA Additionally, Punjabi University has released the median package offered in 2023 in the NIRF report 2024. Check out the table below for the course-wise median package offered during Punjabi University placements 2023: Course Median Package (2023) UG 3-year ( BA , BSc , LLB ) INR 4.25 LPA UG 4-year ( BTech , BPharm ) INR 4.28 LPA UG 5-year ( BA LLB ) INR 3.50 LPA PG 1-year ( PGDCA , PG Diploma ) INR 2.50 LPA PG 2-year ( MBA , MA , MSc ) INR 5 LPA PG 3-year INR 5.50 LPA

faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at Punjabi University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BSc Programmes offered at Punjabi University is between INR 8,060 to INR 4.80 lakh. Punjabi University offers BSc In various specialisations. The duration of the course is 3 years. Candidates who wish to take admission to these courses should fulfil the basic eligibility criteria. The basic criteria are that Candidate should have passed Class 12 with at least 50% marks in aggregate in any discipline. Punjabi University admissions are offered on the basis of merit in the qualifying examination and for some courses marks obtained in the entrance examination. The university conducts an interview for admission to every course.

faqs.question: What is the hostel fee structure of Punjabi University Patiala?
faqs.answer: Hostel fees for Engineering Hostels (I. e. Band Singh Bahadur, Mai Bhago Hostel & Bebe Nanki) is INR 920 per month whereas for other Hostels it is INR 420 per month. There are six residential Hostels for boys and seven residential Hostels for girls. The Hostels have all modern amenities for comfortable living for 4000 students. The hostels are given on a merit basis only. The students of low-income groups can be given free accommodation in the University Hostels. Residents of a hostel, where a cooperative mess is being run shall have to pay INR 5000 in advance as a mess bill. This amount is refundable/adjustable as and when the student leaves the hostel or the mess is closed permanently.

highlights.description: Punjabi University Patiala is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #59 in the Pharmacy category. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in Punjabi University Patiala rankings.

rankings.highlight: 8th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Punjab In 2025

nirf.description:
Punjabi University Patiala has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Punjabi University Patiala fell 13 ranks to #59 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has shown stability in trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Punjabi University Patiala's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
